Joshua23:1 Treb that óh ka lheueh Tuhan geubri keuteutraman ateueh bansa Israel; awaknyan hana le jipeukaru meunan cit jiancam lé musoh-musoh jih. Bak watée nyan Yosua ka tuha that-that.
Joshua23:2 Lé sabab nyan gobnyan laju geutawök banmandum umat Israel
Joshua23:3 Gata banmandum ka lheueh takalon peue-peue mantong nyang geupeubuet lé Tuhan Po teu Allah gata ateueh banmandum bansa nyang na disinoe deumi gata. Nyang meujuang keu gata na kheueh Tuhan Po teu Allah gata keudroe.
Joshua23:4 Tanoh bansa-bansa nyang mantong na tinggai
Joshua23:5 Tuhan Po teu Allah gata geupeujeuet bansa-bansa nyan taloe dan jisurot
Joshua23:6 Lé sababnyan
Joshua23:7 Deungon na lagée nyan gata hana teuma meulawok deungon bansa-bansa nyang na mantong tinggai lamkawan gata. Gata hana teuma tateuôh nan-nan dewa awaknyan dan meusumpah ateueh nan nyan. Meunan cit gata hana teuma gata meuiébadat ngon gata sujut ubak dewa-dewa nyan.
Joshua23:8 Teuma gata harôh teutab seutia ubak Tuhan
Joshua23:9 Bansa-bansa nyang rayeuk dan teuga-teuga ka geu-use lé Tuhan deumi keu gata; hana meusidroe pih nibak awaknyan nyang hase jimeuteun jilawan gata.
Joshua23:10 Tieb-tieb ureuëng lamkawan gata hase jipeutaloe meuribée ureuëng nibak awaknyan
Joshua23:11 Lé sababnyan
Joshua23:12 Meunyoe gata hana seutia dan gata meujampu ngon bansa-bansa nyang mantong tinggai lamkawan gata
Joshua23:13 ingat
Joshua23:14 Jinoenyoe ka watée jih ulôn maté. Gata banmandum
Joshua23:15 Teuma
Joshua23:16 Meunyoe gata taliengkeu janji nyang ka geupeurintah ateueh gata lé Tuhan Po teu Allah mangat gata tataát
Joshua24:1 Yosua laju geupeusapat banmandum sukée bansa Israel di Sikhem
Joshua24:2 Óh lheuehnyan Yosua geupeugah ubak awaknyan
Joshua24:3 Laju Ulôn cok Nabi Ibrahim
Joshua24:4 lheuehnyan keu Nabi Ishaq Ulôn bri teuma dua droe aneuëk
Joshua24:5 Óh lheuehnyan Ulôn kirém Nabi Musa ngon Nabi Harun
Joshua24:6 Ulôn ba indatu gata nyan mangat jiteubiet lam nanggroe Meusé
Joshua24:7 awaknyan laju jimeuhôi Ulôn dan jilakée tulông. Lé sabab nyan teumpat lamkawan awaknyan ngon ureuëng-ureuëng Meusé nyan Ulôn peuseupôt
Joshua24:8 Laju Ulôn ba gata u nanggroe ureuëng Amori nyang tinggai nibak siblaih u timu Krueng Yordan. Awaknyan jiprang gata
Joshua24:9 Lheueh nyan
Joshua24:10 Teuma Ulôn hana Lôn seutôt peue kheun Bileam
Joshua24:11 Lheueh nyan gata tajeumeurang Krueng Yordan
Joshua24:12 Bak watée gata tamaju tajak prang awaknyan
Joshua24:13 Tanoh nyang Ulôn jok keu gata
Joshua24:14 “Lé sabab nyan
Joshua24:15 Meunyoe gata hana tatem
Joshua24:16 Teuma lé umat Israel laju jijaweueb
Joshua24:17 Tuhan Po teu Allah geutanyoe nyang ka geupeubeubaih indatu geutanyoe dan tanyoe keudroe nibak jicok keunamiet di nanggroe Meusé. Tanyoe ka takalon buet-buet ajaéb nyang geupeubuet lé Po teu Tuhan. Sabe Tuhan geulindong geutanyoe banmandum buet meuneujak geutanyoe
Joshua24:18 Dan watée geutanyoe tatamong lam nanggroe nyoe
Joshua24:19 Teuma lé Yosua laju geupeugah
Joshua24:20 
Joshua24:21 Lé sababnyan ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyan laju jiseuôt
Joshua24:22 Lé Yosua geupeugah lom
Joshua24:23 “Meunyoe meunan
Joshua24:24 Laju lé ureuëng-ureuëng nyan jikheun ubak Yosua
Joshua24:25 Lé sababnyan nibak uroe nyan di Sikhem Yosua laju geu ikat janji ngon umat Israel; dan disinan gobnyan laju geubri keu awaknyan huköm-huköm dan atoran-atoran nyang harôh awaknyan taát.
Joshua24:26 Banmandum huköm dan atoran-atoran nyan teutuléh lam kitab Huköm Allah. Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan laju geucok sineuk batée nyang rayeuk
Joshua24:27 Óh lheuehnyan geupeugah kheueh laju lé Yosua ubak mandum ureuëng nyan
Joshua24:28 Akhé jih
Joshua24:29 Óh lheuehnyan Yosua aneuëk Nun hamba Tuhan nyan
Joshua24:30 Gobnyan teupeukubu bak tanoh atra gobnyan keudroe nibak Timmat-Serah nibak tanoh meugunong Efraim siblaih utara Gunong Gaas.
Joshua24:31 Simantong Yosua udeb
Joshua24:32 Manyét Nabi Yusuf nyang jiba lé umat Israel nibak nanggroe Meusé
Joshua24:33 Lheueh nyan Eleazar aneuëk Nabi Harun meuninggai cit
Judges1:1 Óh ka lheueh Yosua meuninggai donya
Judges1:2 Geujaweueb lé Tuhan
Judges1:3 Laju jipeugah lé sukée Yehuda ubak sukée Simeon
Judges1:4 dan Yehuda jijak heungkoe laju meusajan-sajan. Dan Tuhan geupeumeunang laju awaknyan ateueh ureuëng Kanaan dan ureuëng Feris. Siploh ribée droe tantra musoh maté di Bezek.
Judges1:5 Awaknyan jijak meurumpok laju ngon Adoni-Bezek
Judges1:6 Raja nyan laju jiplueng
Judges1:7 Geupeugah lé Adoni-Bezek
Judges1:8 Di ureuëng Yehuda nyan laju jijak prang Yerusalem dan jireubot ngon jitot teuma laju banda nyan meunan cit deungon peunduduek banda nyan jipoh maté bube nyang na.
Judges1:9 Óh ka seuleusoe disinan awaknyan jijak lom teuma dan jiseurang Kanaan nyang na tinggai di daerah gunong-gunong
Judges1:10 dan di banda Hebron
Judges1:11 Beudôh di Hebron
Judges1:12 Na sidroe nibak sukée Yehuda nyan
Judges1:13 Otniel
Judges1:14 Bak uroe keureuja teupeukawen awaknyan
Judges1:15 Jijaweueb laju lé Akhsa
Judges1:16 Keuturonan ayah tuwan Nabi Musa
Judges1:17 Óh lheueh nyan meusajan-sajan deungon sukée Simeon
Judges1:18 Tuhan geutulông ureuëng Yehuda sampoe awaknyan hase jireubot daerah meugunong-gunong. Teuma awaknyan hana hase jireubot Gaza
Judges1:19 
Judges1:20 Lagée nyang ka geupeurintah lé Nabi Musa
Judges1:21 Sukée Benyamin hana teuma hase ji use sukée Yebus beujiteubiet nibak banda Yerusalem. Nyang kheueh sabab jih di ureuëng Yebus nyan mantong na tinggai disinan meusapat deungon ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin.
Judges1:22 Sukée Efraim dan Manasye keuturonan Nabi Yusuf
Judges1:23 
Judges1:24 awaknyan meurumpok deungon sidroe ureuëng agam nyang teuka di banda. Jipeugah lé awaknyan ubak ureuëng agam nyang meurumpok nyan
Judges1:25 Teuma di ureuëng agam nyan laju jitunyok ubak awaknyan rot tamong u dalam banda nyan. Lé ureuëng-ureuëng Efraim dan Manasye jitamong laju u dalam bandanyan dan laju teuma jipoh maté bubena peunduduek nyang na tinggai di dalam banda nyan
Judges1:26 Gobnyan akhé jih jiminah u daerah ureuëng Het
Judges1:27 Sukée Manasye hana ji use peunduduek banda Bet-Sean
Judges1:28 Keubit óh lheueh ureuëng Israel meutamah teuga
Judges1:29 Di banda Gezer
Judges1:30 Peunduduek banda Kitron dan Nahalol hana cit jiuse lé sukée Zebulon. Nyang kheueh sabab jih bansa Kanaan teutab mantong tinggai disinan meusapat-sapat deungon awaknyan
Judges1:31 Peunduduek banda Ako
Judges1:32 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ureuëng Kanaan
Judges1:33 Peunduduek banda Bet-Semes dan Bet-Anat pi hana cit ji use lé sukée Naftali. Nyang kheueh sabab jih di ureuëng Kanaan
Judges1:34 Bansa Amori teutab mantong na tinggai di Ayalon
Judges1:35 
Judges1:36 Di siblaih utara Sela
Judges2:1 Malaikat Tuhan geujak nibak Gilgal u Bokhim dan geupeugah ubak ureuëng-ureuëng Israel
Judges2:2 Sabab nyan gata hana jeuet taikat janji peue mantong deungon peunduduek nanggroe nyoe. Miseubah-miseubah awaknyan harôh kheueh gata reuloh.’ Teuma gata hana tapeubuet peue nyang ka Ulôn peurintah ubak gata nyan. Teuma nyang gata peubuet nyang meulawan ngon nyang Ulôn peurintah nyan!
Judges2:3 Lé sabab nyan
Judges2:4 Óh ka lheueh malaikat nyan geupeusampoe haba nyan
Judges2:5 Nyang kheueh sabab jih teumpat nyan teuboh nan Bokhim. Laju nibak teumpat nyan di ureuëng-ureuëng Israel jipeuseumah keureubeuen keu Tuhan.
Judges2:6 Óh ka seuleusoe Yosua geupeuleupah ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyan jijak
Judges2:7 Simantong Yosua udeb
Judges2:8 Yosua aneuëk Nun – hamba Tuhan nyan – meuninggai donya nibak umu sireutôh siploh thon.
Judges2:9 Laju gobnyan teupeukubu nibak tanoh jrat gobnyan keudroe
Judges2:10 Óh lheueh banmandum angkatan nyan meuninggai cit teuma. Dan angkatan nyang dilikot awaknyan ka hana jituri Tuhan
Judges2:11 Óh lheueh nyan ureuëng Israel ka meudesya ubak Tuhan. Awaknyan hana le jiseumah Tuhan Po teu Allah indatu awaknyan
Judges2:12 Teuma Tuhan laju geubeungéh keu awaknyan dan geupeubiyeu mantong geurombolan laén jijak prang sira jireupah awaknyan. Awaknyan hana meudaya jimeuhadab keu ngon musoh-musoh nyang na silingka awaknyan.
Judges2:13 
Judges2:14 
Judges2:15 Tieb-tieb watée awaknyan jijak meuprang
Judges2:16 Hana putôh-putôh Tuhan geukirém keu awaknyan peumimpén nyang meujuang mangat jipeubeubaih awaknyan nibak geurombolan peurampok.
Judges2:17 Teuma awaknyan hana jipeuhiro keu peumimpén nyan. Awaknyan ji seumah ubak ilah-ilah laén
Judges2:18 Meunyoe Tuhan ka geubri sidroe peumimpén keu bansa Israel
Judges2:19 Teuma meunyoe peumimpén nyan ka meuninggai donya
Judges2:20 Sabab nyan Tuhan get that beungéh keu bansa Israel
Judges2:21 Jinoenyoe Ulôn hana Lôn tem le use bansa toh mantong meunan cit deungon nyang mantong na di nanggroe nyoe bak watée Yosua meuninggai donya.
Judges2:22 Ulôn teuma Ulôn ngui bansa-bansa nyan mangat jijak ujoe bansa Israel
Judges2:23 Nyang kheueh sabab jih Tuhan hana geubri meunang keu Yosua ateueh bansa-bansa nyan. Seubalek jih Tuhan geupeubiyeu awaknyan tinggai dinanggroe nyan
Judges3:1 Mangat teu ujoe ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyang hántom na jirasa meuprang di nanggroe Kanaan
Judges3:2 Tuhan geupeubuet lagée nyan na kheueh deungon meukeusut geu peuruno tieb-tieb geuneurasi Israel jimuprang
Judges3:3 Bansa-bansa nyang na mantong tinggai di nanggroe nyan na kheueh: bansa nyang tinggai di dalam banlimong boh banda Filistin
Judges3:4 Awaknyan na nibak teumpatnyan na kheueh sibagoe batée teu ujo keu bansa Israel. Deungon lagée nyan hase kheueh teuteupeue peu kheueh bansa Israel nyan jiseutôt peurintah nyang ka geubri lé Tuhan ubak indatu awaknyan meulalu Nabi Musa.
Judges3:5 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ureuëng-ureuëng Kanaan
Judges3:6 Laju di umat Israel nyan jimeukawen meujampu deungon bansa-bansa nyang na tinggai disinan
Judges3:7 Umat Israel meudesya ubak Tuhan
Judges3:8 Teuma Tuhan geubeungéh keu umat Israel
Judges3:9 Óh ka lheueh nyan umat Israel jimeuhôi jilakée tulông ubak Tuhan
Judges3:10 Tuhan ka geujok kuasa ubak Otniel sampoe Otniel nyan ka jeuet keupeumimpén umat Israel. Jihnyan jijak meuprang
Judges3:11 Teuma aman ngon teuntram kheueh nanggroenyan peuet ploh thon treb jih. Óh lheueh nyan Otniel pih meuninggai donya.
Judges3:12 Umat Israel ka meudesya lom ubak Tuhan
Judges3:13 Raja Eglon nyan laju teuma jimeugabong deungon bansa Amon dan Amalek
Judges3:14 Lapan blaih thon treb jih Israel jijajah lé Eglon.
Judges3:15 Teuma bak watée umat Israel jiteumawök jilakée tulông ubak Tuhan
Judges3:16 Bak si uroe Ehud jipeuget saboh peudeueng meumata dua nyang panyang jih rab siteungoh metée. Laju peudeueng nyan jilat nibak keuieng jih nyang teusöm didalam bajée
Judges3:17 óh lheueh nyan jijak laju sira jiba upeti keu jijak jok keu Raja Eglon. Raja Eglon nyan badan jih lumpah teumbon.
Judges3:18 Óh ka lheueh jipeuseumah upeti nyan
Judges3:19 Teuma Ehud keudroe laju jipiôh óh ka trok nibak batée-batée nyang meu uke nyang to ngon Gilgal
Judges3:20 Bak watée nyan cit teuma Ehud deungon bagaih ban lagée kilat jisuit peudeueng nibak lam sarong nyang meugantung nibak keuieng siblaih uneuen
Judges3:21 Banmandum mata peudeueng nyan trok án ubak go jih jitamong habéh u dalam pruet raja sampoe beusôt trok nibak rhueng dan meunan cit deungon gapah-gapah raja nyan habéh mandum meuhambo uluwa.
Judges3:22 Dan Ehud óh lheueh jipeubuet lagéenyan jipeubiyeu mantong peudeueng nyan meukeumat nibak pruet raja nyan
Judges3:23 óh lheueh nyan jiteubiet laju uluwa sira jitôb pintoe lom jigunci di luwa
Judges3:24 óh lheueh nyan jijak laju jitinggai teumpat nyan. Bak watée hamba raja nyan teuka dan jikalon banmandum pintoe kama teugunci
Judges3:25 Óh ka lheueh jipreh nyang lumpah treb dan raja gohlom cit geubuka pintoe
Judges3:26 Teungoh awaknyan mantong meupreh-preh
Judges3:27 Meunan trok u daerah meugunong Efraim
Judges3:28 “Seutôt ulôn
Judges3:29 Nibak meu heungkoe lam prang nyan awaknyan jipoh maté na kira-kira 10.000 tantra Moab nyang paleng gét; hana meusidroe pi nyang na seulamat.
Judges3:30 Uroe nyan Moab taloe ateueh ureuëng Israel
Judges3:31 Peumimpén nyang seulanjut jih nyoe na kheueh Samgar aneuëk Anat. Gobnyan pi jimeujuang dan geupeubeubaih ureuëng Israel. Deungon tungkat meurabée leumô
Judges4:1 Óh ka lheueh Ehud meuninggai donya
Judges4:2 Teuma Tuhan geupeubiyeu mantong awaknyan ji peutaloe lé Yabin
Judges4:3 Yabin na 900 boh geuritan prang nyang teupeugét nibak beuso. Dua ploh thon treb jih jihnyan jijajah ureuëng Israel deungon keujam. Óh lheueh nyan barô kheueh awaknyan jiteumawök ngon jilakée tulông ubak Tuhan.
Judges4:4 Bak watée nyan nyang pimpén bansa Israel na kheueh sidroe nabi inong nyang nan geuh Debora
Judges4:5 Debora nyan ka jeuet keu lazem nibak gobnyan geuduek-duek di miyueb bak kuruma
Judges4:6 Bak siuroe gobnyan geuyue ureuëng laén mangat jijak hôi Barak
Judges4:7 Teuma Ulôn peujeuet Sisera
Judges4:8 Barak geupeugah teuma ubak Debora
Judges4:9 Geu seuôt lé Debora
Judges4:10 Dan Barak laju geukrah sukée Zebulon ngon Naftali u Kedes. Nyang seutôt Barak dan Debora bak watée nyan na 10.000 droe ureuëng.
Judges4:11 Bak watée nyan na sidroe ureuëng Heber
Judges4:12 Meunan jideungoe lé Sisera bahwa Barak ka geujak u Gunong Tabor
Judges4:13 laju lé gobnyan jipeusapat ban sikureueng reutôh boh geuritan prang nyang teupeugét nibak beuso nyan
Judges4:14 Lé Debora laju geupeugah hai nyan ubak Barak
Judges4:15 óh lheuehnyan geujak prang laju Sisera. Dan Tuhan laju geupeukaru deungon geupeutabu beba banmandum pasokan Sisera meunan cit deungon banmandum geuritan prang jihnyan
Judges4:16 Barak laju geupeucrok geuritan prang dan pasokan musoh nyan trok u Heroset-Hagoyim laju ban banmandum pasokan Sisera nyan geupoh maté; hana meusidroepi nyang geupeubiyeu udeb.
Judges4:17 Bak watéenyan Sisera ka jiplueng u khimah Yael
Judges4:18 Bak watée Sisera teuka
Judges4:19 Geupeugah lé Sisera ubak Yael
Judges4:20 Laju Sisera geupeugah ubak Yael
Judges4:21 Sisera rupa jih lumpah that hék akhé jih gobnyan teugantuek dan laju teungeut deungon teuhanta hana jitée droe. Yael laju jicok saboh palée dan saboh pasak keu khimah
Judges4:22 Bak watée Barak teuka geujak mita Sisera
Judges4:23 Uroe nyan Tuhan geupeumeunang keu ureuëng Israel ateueh Yabin
Judges4:24 Raja nyan maken treb seumaken jiteugon lé ureuëng Israel sampoe akhé jih gobnyan binasa.
Judges5:1 Nibak uroenyan jimeu ca-e kheueh Debora dan Barak aneuëk Abinoam. Meunoe kheueh jipeugah:
Judges5:2 Pujoe kheueh Tuhan
Judges5:3 Deungoe kheueh hai bubena raja dan pangeran
Judges5:4 Bak watée Droeneueh beurangkat nibak Seir
Judges5:5 Gunong-gunongpi meuguncang di daerah peunguasa Sinai
Judges5:6 Di masa Samgar
Judges5:7 Banda-banda Israel hana nyang keumiet
Judges5:8 Bak watée Israel phon jiseumah dewa
Judges5:9 Keu mandum panglima Israel nyang jipeutaba droe deungon sukarila
Judges5:10 Hai gata nyang tapasang di ateueh keuleudée putéh
Judges5:11 Toe deungon mon-mon ié meumata na teudeungoe su ureuëng-ureuëng meuca-e
Judges5:12 Beudôh kheueh hai Debora
Judges5:13 Keusaria nyang na tinggai leubeh jijak meurumpok ubak peumimpén jih
Judges5:14 Awaknyan geujak nibak Efraim u pantôn
Judges5:15 Bubena ureuëng patot Isakhar teuka meusajan ngon Debora
Judges5:16 Pakon awaknyan tinggai lamkawan bubiri-bubiri? Peu kheueh mangat jideungoe ureuëng meurabe jimehôi beulatang peulara jih? Beutôi sukée Ruben hana hase jipeuteuntée sikeub sabab lamkawan awaknyan hana meuteumé haba sipakat.
Judges5:17 Teungoh Zebulon dan Naftali geumeujuang udeb maté di mideuen prang
Judges5:18 
Judges5:19 Di Taanakh
Judges5:20 Meunan cit bintang-bintang meusajan meujuang jilawan Sisera
Judges5:21 Ié Krueng Kison rayeuk bohbah jipeuhanyot musoh. Maju
Judges5:22 Deungon maju teudeungoe kheueh tapak-tapak langkah guda nyang jiparôh lé nyang giduek di ateueh rhueng jih nyan.
Judges5:23 “Kutok kheueh Meros
Judges5:24 Meu untông kheueh Yael
Judges5:25 Sisera jilakée ié
Judges5:26 Deungon pasak dan palée bak jaroe geuhnyan lé Yael geuseukok nibak ulée Sisera sampoe meuhambo aso ulée.
Judges5:27 Bak gaki Yael jih nyan reubah hana le meunyawöng teutiek bak tanoh sampoe trok ajai.
Judges5:28 Nibak ruweueng-ruweueng teungkab mak Sisera jingieng sira geupeugah
Judges5:29 Nyang paleng áréh dumna dendayang jih nyan jijaweueb laju nyang ka jiteumé keudroe didalam até jih nyan:
Judges5:30 “Awaknyan teungoh jipeuweuek ngon jibagi hareuta nyang jireupah
Judges5:31 Seumoga dumna musoh-musoh Droeneueh
Judges6:1 Lom sigoe teuk ureuëng Israel meudesya ubak Tuhan
Judges6:2 Ureuëng Israel lumpah that teumakot keu ureuëng Midian
Judges6:3 Lom teuma tieb-tieb watée bak watée ureuëng tani Israel jijak pula sinaman
Judges6:4 Awaknyan jipeudong khimah didalam daerah ureuëng Israel dan bubena seunaman ureuëng Israel nyan sampoe u daerah sikeulileng Gaza di siblaih u seulatan. Meunan cit deungon beulatang peulara lagée bubiri
Judges6:5 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyan jijak ngon cara meuroun-roun deungon beulatang peulara dan khimah awaknyan dalam jeumeulah nyang lumpah raya. Awaknyan dan unta-unta lumpah that jai keu hase teu itong. Awaknyan jiteuka keu jijak peurusak nanggroe nyan
Judges6:6 dan umat Israel nyan hana hase jipeubuet sapeue u ateueh awaknyan.
Judges6:7 Óh lheueh nyan umat Israel laju jitawök ngon sira jimeulakée ubak Tuhan mangat Tuhan geutulông awaknyan geujak lawan ureuëng Midian.
Judges6:8 Lé Tuhan geu kirém teuma sidroe nabi keu awaknyan. Nabi nyan geupeugah
Judges6:9 Gata ka Ulôn peuseulamat nibak ureuëng Meusé dan nibak ureuëng-ureuëng nanggroe nyoe nyang jijak prang gata. Awaknyan ka Ulôn use nibak nanggroe nyoe bak watée gata tajak prang awaknyan
Judges6:10 Ka lheueh Ulôn peugah ubak gata bahwa Ulôn nyoe kheueh Tuhan Po teu Allah gata
Judges6:11 Bak si uroe malaikat Tuhan geujak ubak Ofra
Judges6:12 Malaikat Tuhan laju geupeuleumah droe ubak gobnyan sira geupeugah
Judges6:13 Ji seuôt lé Gideon
Judges6:14 Óh ka lheueh nyan Tuhan geubri teuma peurintah lagéenyoe ubak Gideon
Judges6:15 Geujaweueb lé Gideon
Judges6:16 “Pasti gata hase!” kheun Tuhan
Judges6:17 Geujaweueb lé Gideon
Judges6:18 Ulôn lakée beuneutem kheueh Tuhan neupreh ilée disinoe sampoe ulôn seuleusoe ulôn bri peunajoh keu Tuhan.” “Get kheueh
Judges6:19 Teuma jijak woe kheueh laju Gideon u rumoh gobnyan
Judges6:20 Malaikat Tuhan nyan geupeugah
Judges6:21 Óh lheuehnyan malaikat Tuhan nyan geu sunyueng laju jaroe gobnyan laju deungon ujong kayée nyang teungoh geumat nyan geu cukéh laju uengkot sie dan ruti nyan. Batée nyan hu laju habéh kheueh tutong jipajoh lé apui uengkot sie dan ruti nyan. Óh lheueh nyan malaikat nyan pi gadôh.
Judges6:22 Gideon sada bahwa nyang teuka ubak gobnyan na kheueh malaikat Tuhan keudroe. Dan deungon teumakot that-that meunan cit yo geupeugah kheueh laju lé Gideon nyan
Judges6:23 Teuma Tuhan geupeugah ubak gobnyan
Judges6:24 Lé Gideon laju jipeuget saboh miseubah disinan
Judges6:25 Bak malam nyan Tuhan geubri peurintah lagée nyoe ubak Gideon
Judges6:26 Di ateueh sinumpok miseubah nyang ka reuloh nyan tapeudong kheueh laju saboh miseubah nyang ka teureuncana deungon gét lom teuatoe. Óh lheuehnyan ban saboh leumô agam nyan
Judges6:27 Teuma Gideon geupiléh laju siploh droe namiet dan geujak laju geupeubuet peue nyang ka geupeurintah lé Tuhan nyan ubak gobnyan. Teuma lé sabab geuhnyan teumakot that-that ubak keuluwarga gobnyan dan keu ureuëng-ureuëng nyang na di gampông nyan
Judges6:28 Óh beungoh singoh peunduduek banda nyan ka jibeudôh nibak teumpat éh
Judges6:29 Teuma awaknyanpi teuhireuen-hireuen dan jiteumanyong teuma sabe keudroe-droe jih
Judges6:30 Laju jipeugah lé awaknyan ubak Yoas
Judges6:31 Yoas geujaweueb laju ubak banmandum nyang lawan geuh nyan
Judges6:32 Sabab Yoas geupeugah
Judges6:33 Bak watée nyan banmandum ureuëng Midian
Judges6:34 Teuma Gideon ka geukuasa lé Roh Tuhan
Judges6:35 Gobnyan geukirém cit utosan ubak sukée Asyer
Judges6:36 Laju Gideon geupeugah ubak Po teu Allah
Judges6:37 Meunyoe biet lagéenyan
Judges6:38 Dan jeuet kheueh lagée nyan: Watée Gideon geubeudôh oh singoh beungoh nyan dan laju geuceupat bulée bubiri nyan
Judges6:39 Laju gobnyan geupeugah ubak Po teu Allah
Judges6:40 Malam nyan Po teu Allah geupeupeunoh peue nyang jilakée lé Gideon nyan
Judges7:1 Bak siuroe Gideon deungon banmandum aneuëk buah gobnyan geubeudôh nibak teumpat éh ban beungoh that. Awaknyan jijak laju peudong khimah nibak mata ié Harod. Teumpat khimah-khimah ureuëng Midian nyang na disiblaih utara nibak awaknyan
Judges7:2 Tuhan meufeureuman ubak Gideon
Judges7:3 Lé sababnyan
Judges7:4 Laju Tuhan meufeureuman lom ubak Gideon
Judges7:5 Teuma Gideon laju geuba ureuëng-ureuëng nyan u binéh krueng
Judges7:6 Teuma na 300 droe ureuëng nyang jilieh ié dalam paleut jaroe jih; teuma banmandum nyang laén jimeu teuôt watée jijéb ié.
Judges7:7 Óh lheueh nyan Tuhan geupeugah lom ubak Gideon
Judges7:8 Sabab nyan Gideon geuyue woe laju ureuëng Israel nyang laén nyan mangat jijak woe keucuali nyang lhée reutôh droe nyan nyang tinggai. Banmandum beukai dan beureuguih jijok bak ureuëng nyang geuyue woe nyan. Ureuëng Midian na di Pantôn di miyueb teumpat ureuëng Israel jipeudong khimah.
Judges7:9 Malam nyan Tuhan meufeureuman lom ubak Gideon
Judges7:10 Teuma meunyoe gata teumakot
Judges7:11 Nibak teumpat nyan eunteuk gata deungoe peue nyang teungoh jipeugah lé musoh nyan
Judges7:12 Ureuëng Midian
Judges7:13 Bak watée Gideon ka trok keunan
Judges7:14 Rakan ureuëng nyan jijaweueb
Judges7:15 Bak watée Gideon geudeungoe keuhai lumpo ureuëng nyan dan makna jih
Judges7:16 Lé Gideon geubagi ban lhée reutôh droe aneuëk buah geuhnyan jeuet keu lhée boh reugu. Tieb-tieb sidroe ureuëng geubri saboh beureuguih dan saboh kendi nyang meu aso culot.
Judges7:17 Kheun Gideon ubak awaknyan
Judges7:18 Meunyoe ulôn dan reugu ulôn kamoe yueb beureuguih
Judges7:19 Karab trok teungoh malam
Judges7:20 Ban dua boh reugu nyang laén pih jipeubuet cit nyang lagée nyang ka geupeubuet lé Gideon ngon reugu gobnyan nyan. Laju awaknyan banmandum jibeuôt culot-culot awaknyan deungon jaroe wie
Judges7:21 Awaknyan maséng-maséng teutab jidong nibak teumpat ban sikeulileng khimah nyan. Teuma banmandum angkatan prang musoh nyan ngon hana jisangka-sangka laju jiplueng ban saleuem lé sira jiklik ngon jiteumawök.
Judges7:22 Bak watée Gideon dan ureuëng-ureuëng gobnyan teungoh geupeumusu beureuguih
Judges7:23 Teuma di sukée Naftali
Judges7:24 Meunan cit u banmandum daerah Efraim
Judges7:25 Dua droe tukoh bansa Midian
Judges8:1 Ureuëng Efraim jipeugah ubak Gideon
Judges8:2 Teuma Gideon geujaweueb
Judges8:3 Gata kheueh nyang ka meuteumé kuasa nibak Po teu Allah sampoe meuhase teupoh maté Oreb dan Zeeb
Judges8:4 Bak watée nyan Gideon deungon ban lhée reutôh aneuëk buah gobnyan trok laju u meurandeh Krueng Yordan. Awaknyan ka hék that-that teuma mantong cit jitiyeub musoh.
Judges8:5 Óh lheueh nyan awaknyan trok laju u Sukot. Di sinan Gideon geupeugah ubak peunduduek banda
Judges8:6 Teuma peumimpén-peumimpén di Sukot nyan jijaweueb
Judges8:7 Teuma geupeugah lé Gideon
Judges8:8 Óh lheuehnyan Gideon geujak lom meuneujak geuhnyan dan trok laju u Pnuel. Meunan cit disinan gobnyan geulakée peunajoh keu aneuëk buah geuh. Teuma geujaweueb lé ureuëng Pnuel saban cit lagée nyang ka jijaweueb lé ureuëng di Sukot.
Judges8:9 Lé sababnyan Gideon geupeugah ubak awaknyan
Judges8:10 Bak watéenyan Zebah dan Salmuna deungon banmandum pasokan awaknyan teungoh na di Karkor. Nibak banmandum pasokan ureuëng-ureuëng padang pasi
Judges8:11 Gideon geujak laju sitot rot bak bataih padang pasi di siblaih u timu Nobah dan Yogbeha laju geuseurang musoh ngon cara meudadak.
Judges8:12 Zebah dan Salmuna
Judges8:13 Óh lheueh nyan nibak rot ueh teungoh geuwoe bak geujak meuprang nyan
Judges8:14 Di sinan jidrob teuma sidroe aneuëk muda nibak Sukot
Judges8:15 Óh ka lheueh nyan Gideon laju geujak meurumpok deungon ureuëng patot-patot di banda nyan sira geupeugah
Judges8:16 Óh lheueh geupeugah lagéenyan Gideon laju geujakcok duro di padang pasi
Judges8:17 Di Pnuel pi geureuloh dan geupeuhanco teuma meunara bandanyan meunan cit geupoh maté bubena ureuëng agam didalam banda nyan.
Judges8:18 Óh lheuehnyan Gideon laju geutanyong ubak Zebah dan Salmuna
Judges8:19 “Nyan syedara-syedara ulôn – aneuëk-aneuëk mak ulôn
Judges8:20 Laju geupeugah lé Gideon ubak Yeter
Judges8:21 Jipeugah lé Zebah dan Salmuna bak Gideon
Judges8:22 Óh lheueh nyan jipeugah kheueh lé umat Israel ubak Gideon
Judges8:23 Geuseuôt lé Gideon
Judges8:24 Teuma óh lheueh nyan Gideon geupeugah lom
Judges8:25 “Get
Judges8:26 Banmandum anteng-anteng méuh nyang jijok ubak Gideon bak watée nyan brat jih rab dua ploh kilogram
Judges8:27 Nibak méuh nyan Gideon laju geupeuget saboh patong beurala
Judges8:28 Ureuëng Midian hana hase le jipeugah sapeue; awaknyan ka jipeutaloe lé ureuëng Israel. Deungon nyan aman kheueh nanggroe nyan peuet ploh thon treb jih simantong Gideon mantong udeb.
Judges8:29 Óh ka lheueh meuprang nyang meukeubôk nyan
Judges8:30 Gobnyan na meu aneuëk tujoh ploh droe aneuëk agam
Judges8:31 Na cit teuma gundek gobnyan di Sikhem; nibak gundek geuh nyan na teuma geumeu aneuëk sidroe aneuëk agam nyang geuboh nan Abimelekh.
Judges8:32 Watée umu gobnyan ka tuha that barô kheueh Gideon aneuëk Yoas nyan meuninggai donya. Gobnyan teupeukubu nibak lampôh jrat Yoas
Judges8:33 Óh ka lheueh Gideon meuninggai donya
Judges8:34 Awaknyan hana meuiébadat le ubak Po teu Allah
Judges8:35 Awaknyan pi hana jibalaih budo ateueh keuluwarga Gideon ateueh banmandum jasa Gideon keu umat Israel.
Judges9:1 Bak si uroe Abimelekh aneuëk Gideon nyan jijak-jak u banda Sikhem di teumpat kawöm keuluwarga mak jih. Di sinan jihnyan jipeugah haba deungon awaknyan
Judges9:2 “Ci gata tanyong ubak banmandum peunduduek nyang na di Sikhem
Judges9:3 Teuma jijak kheueh laju kawöm keuluwarga nibak mak Abimelekh nyan ubak ureuëng-ureuëng Sikhem dan jipeusampoe laju peusan Abimelekh ubak awaknyan dan di peunduduek Sikhem nyan jicok keuputosan mangat jijak seutôt Abimelekh
Judges9:4 Óh lheueh nyan awaknyan laju jibri keu gobnyan tujoh ploh péng pirak nyang jicok nibak rumoh teumpat seumah Baal-Berit. Deungon péng nyan Abimelekh laju jipeu upah saboh kawan ureuëng kureueng aja mangat jijak meugabong deungon gobnyan
Judges9:5 dan óh lheueh nyan jijak u gampông bapak jihnyan di Ofra. Óh trok keudeh laju jijak poh maté ban tujoh ploh droe syedara gobnyan di ateueh saboh batée. Teuma si Yotam
Judges9:6 Teuma meusapat kheueh banmandum peunduduek Sikhem dan Bet-Milo
Judges9:7 Óh ka lheueh Yotam jideungoe hai nyan
Judges9:8 Bak siwatée na peuristiwa jimeusapat kheueh bak-bak kayée keuneuk jipiléh raja keu bak-bak kayée nyan. Teuma jipeugah kheueh lé jihnyan keu bak kayée zaiton
Judges9:9 Ji jaweueb lé bak zaiton
Judges9:10 Laju jipeugah teuma lé bak-bak kayée keu bak kayée ara
Judges9:11 Teuma di bak aranyan jijaweueb teuma lagée nyoe
Judges9:12 Óh lheueh nyan
Judges9:13 Teuma dibak anggô nyan pi jijaweueb
Judges9:14 Sababnyan jipeugah kheueh teuma banmandum bak kayée ubak tamah nyang meuduro
Judges9:15 Teuma di tamah nyang meuduro nyanpi jijaweueb
Judges9:16 “Nyan
Judges9:17 nyang ka geumeujuang keu gatanyoe? Ingat
Judges9:18 Teuma jinoenyoe gata ka takianat ubak keuluwarga bapak ulôn. Aneuëk-aneuëk gobnyan ka gata poh maté banmandum – tujoh ploh droe sigoguih di ateueh saboh batée. Abimelekh nyan na kheueh aneuëk bapak ulôn nibak gundek gobnyan. Teuma gatanyoe ka ta angkat geuhnyan jeuet keuraja Sikhem
Judges9:19 Meunyoe buet gatanyan nibak uroenyoe ateueh bapak ulôn dan keuluwarga gobnyan ngon tuloih até gata dan ikhlaih
Judges9:20 Teuma meunyoe kon lagée nyan hai jih
Judges9:21 Óh lheuehnyan Yotam laju jipeuplueng droe dan jiduek laju di Beer
Judges9:22 Lhée thon treb jih Abimelekh geumat peurintah u ateueh ureuëng Israel nyan.
Judges9:23 Laju teuka meureuka Tuhan sampoe Tuhan ka geupeumusoh Abimelekh deungon peunduduek Sikhem sampoe ureuëng-ureuëng Sikhem nyan jijak lawan Abimelekh.
Judges9:24 Hainyoe teujadi mangat teubalaih buet nyang jeuhet nyang ka jipeubuet lé Abimelekh dan ureuëng-ureuëng Sikhem nyang peusuna jihnyan keu jipoh maté bantujoh ploh droe aneuëk-aneuëk Gideon.
Judges9:25 Ureuëng-ureuëng Sikhem nyan laju jipeugét pageue peuhalang di ateueh pucak-pucak gunong mangat hase teudrob Abimelekh. Soemantong ureuëng nyang liwat rotnyan laju jireupah ngon jirampok lé ureuëng nyang preh nyan. Teuma hainyoe laju jibri tée ubak Abimelekh.
Judges9:26 Bak watée nyan Gaal aneuëk Ebed ka teuka meusigoe-sigoe deungon syedara-syedara jih keujikeuneuk tinggai di Sikhem; dan di ureuëng-ureuëng pi jipatéh keu jihnyan.
Judges9:27 Awaknyan laju jijakpot boh anggô nyang na di lampôh-lampôh anggô
Judges9:28 “Soe geutanyoe nyang sibeuna jih nyoe
Judges9:29 “Meunyoe ulôn nyang pimpén ureuëng-ureuëng Sikhem nyoe
Judges9:30 Zebul
Judges9:31 Lé jihnyan laju jikirém utosan ubak Abimelekh di Aruma mangat jijak peusampoe peusan nyoe
Judges9:32 Lé sababnyan
Judges9:33 Singoh beungoh meunyoe mata uroe ka jiteubiet
Judges9:34 Teuma Abimelekh ngon aneuëk buah gobnyan laju meugeurak óh watée malam. Awaknyan meutabu laju jeuet keu peuet boh pasokan dan jijak musöm laju ban silingka banda Sikhem.
Judges9:35 Meunan jikalon lé Abimelekh dan ureuëng-ureuëng gobnyan Gaal jiteubiet dan ka jidong di babah pintoe geureubang banda
Judges9:36 Gaal leumah laju jikalon awaknyan
Judges9:37 Laju jipeugah lom lé Gaal
Judges9:38 Jipeugah kheueh lé Zebul ubak Gaal
Judges9:39 Dan Gaal nyan jipeuteubiet laju uluwa bubena ureuëng Sikhem dan jijak lawan laju Abimelekh.
Judges9:40 Teuma Abimelekh geuseureubu laju awaknyan sampoe awaknyan habéh jipeuplueng droe. Ureuëng maté ka meulampa sampoe trok ubak babah pintoe geureubang banda.
Judges9:41 Akhé jih Abimelekh geuwoe laju u Aruma
Judges9:42 Óh singoh beungoh di ureuëng-ureuëng Sikhem laju jitinggai banda
Judges9:43 Di Abimelekh pi laju geupeusapat dumna ureuëng-ureuëng gobnyan
Judges9:44 Teungoh Abimelekh ngon pasokan gobnyan geucang ngon geuseureubu pintoe geureubang banda
Judges9:45 Di Abimelekh geumeucang laju si uroe suntok dan laju geuteumé duek nibak banda nyan; peunduduek bandanyan geupoh maté
Judges9:46 Bak watée ureuëng-ureuëng nyang mantong na di dalam kuta Sikhem geudeungoe habanyan
Judges9:47 Teuma na ureuëng jijak peugah ubak Abimelekh bahwa bubena ureuëng di kuta Sikhem nyan ka jimeusapat disinan.
Judges9:48 Lé sabab nyan
Judges9:49 Teuma awaknyanpi maséng-maséng laju jijak koh cabeueng kayée
Judges9:50 Óh lheuehnyan Abimelekh geujak teuma u Tebes. Bandanyan geukeupông teuma dan bandanyan pi taklok dan laju geuduek disinan.
Judges9:51 Nibak teungoh-teungoh bandanyan na saboh meunara nyang lumpah kukôh dan không. Dan banmandum peunduduek bandanyan laju jiplueng keunan
Judges9:52 Óh lheuehnyan teuka kheueh Abimelekh deungon meukeusut jijak seurang meunara nyan. Bak watée Abimelekh nyan ka trok nibak babah pintoe meunara nyan dan geukeuneuk tot meunara nyan
Judges9:53 na sidroe ureuëng inong laju jipeurhot sineuk batée u ateueh ulée Abimelekh sampoe bruek ulée Abimelekh nyan reutak.
Judges9:54 Bagaih-bagaih Abimelekh geutawök sidroe aneuëk bujang nyang teungoh jigulam seunjata dan geupeugah
Judges9:55 Bak watée ureuëng-ureuëng Israel jikalon bahwa Abimelekh ka maté
Judges9:56 Meunan kheueh cara jih Po teu Allah geubalaih u ateueh Abimelekh keuhai buet nyang jeuhet nyang ka jipeubuet ateueh bapak jih keudroe
Judges9:57 Dan meunan cit Tuhan geuhuköm teuma u ateueh ureuëng Sikhem sabab keujeuhetan awaknyan. Hainyan paih that lagée nyang ka geupeugah lé Yotam aneuëk Gideon keuhai awaknyan bak watée gobnyan geupeusumpah awaknyan.
Judges10:1 Óh ka lheueh Abimelekh nyan meuninggai donya
Judges10:2 Dua ploh lhée thon treb jih gobnyan jipimpén bansa Israel
Judges10:3 Óh ka lheueh Tola
Judges10:4 Aneuëk gobnyan nyang agam na lhée ploh droe. Bak awaknyan na teuma lhée ploih boh keuleudée nyang ka jeuet teupasang ngon teupeudieng barang di ateueh rhueng jih
Judges10:5 Yair pi meuninggai donya
Judges10:6 Umat Israel meudesya lom ubak Tuhan. Awaknyan hana jipeuduli le keu Tuhan dan hana teuma jiseumah le Gobnyan. Awaknyan ka jiseumah dewa-dewa Baal dan Asytoret
Judges10:7 Sabab buet nyang lagée nyan Tuhan lumpah that beungéh keu bansa Israel
Judges10:8 Lapan blah thon treb jih bandua bansa nyan jiteugon banmandum ureuëng Israel nyang na tinggai di Gilead
Judges10:9 Ureuëng Amon laju jijeumeurang Krueng Jordan keu jijak meuprang ngon sukée Yehuda
Judges10:10 Sabab ka hana ekle jiteuen ázéb seungsara nyang lagéenyan
Judges10:11 Tuhan laju geujaweueb
Judges10:12 
Judges10:13 Bahpi lagéenyan
Judges10:14 Tajak kheueh mantong ubak dewa-dewa nyang gata piléh nyan. Gata meulakée kheueh ubak dewa-dewanyan! Bah kheueh awaknyan nyang tulông bak watée gata meuteumé susah nyang lagée teungoh gata rasa bak saátnyoe.”
Judges10:15 Teuma umat Israel jipeugah ubak Tuhan
Judges10:16 Óh lheuehnyan awaknyan laju jitiek bubena patong beurala
Judges10:17 Bak watéenyan tantra Amon ka siab-siab keuneuk jijak meuprang. Awaknyan jipeudong khimah di Gilead. Meunan cit deungon umat Israel ka jimeusapat dan jipeudong khimah di Gilead.
Judges10:18 Disinan rakyat dan bubena peumimpén nibak sukée-sukée Israel nyan jiteumanyong sabe keudroe-keudroe peu kheueh na lamkawan awaknyan nyang jijeuet beuôt sinjata jijak lawan bansa Amon. Ureuëng nyan teuma jiangkat jeuet keupeumimpén u ateueh banmandum peunduduek Gilead.
Judges11:1 Yefta na kheueh sidroe sipa-i nyang ceubeueh lom beuhe. Jihnyan tinggai di Gilead. Bapak jihnyan nan jih Gilead teuma mak jihnyan na kheueh sidroe inong jeuhet nyang buet jih meumukah.
Judges11:2 Bapak jihnyan na cit aneuëk agam nyang laén nibak peurumoh jih nyang sah. Watée aneuëknyan ka rayeuk-rayeuk
Judges11:3 Lé sababnyan Yefta laju meuseuliseh ngon syedara-syedara jihnyan dan laju jijak dan tinggai di daerah Tob. Di teumpatnyan na saboh kawan ureuëng jeuhet nyang buet jih peurusak ureuëng laén jimeugabong laju deungon ureuëng nyan dan laju awaknyan jijak meurampok atra ureuëng laén.
Judges11:4 Hana padub na treb óh lheueh nyan ureuëng Israel jiseurang lé ureuëng Amon.
Judges11:5 Bak watée hainyan teujadi
Judges11:6 Awaknyan jipeugah
Judges11:7 Teuma Yefta jijaweueb
Judges11:8 Awaknyan jijaweueb
Judges11:9 Jiseuôt lé Yefta
Judges11:10 Awaknyan jijaweueb
Judges11:11 Lé sababnyan jibeurangkat kheueh Yefta meusigoe deungon peumimpén Gilead. Óh lheuehnyan peunduduek Gilead laju jiangkat gobnyan jeuet keu peunguasa dan peumimpén. Dan dikeue Tuhan di Mizpa
Judges11:12 Óh lheuehnyan Yefta laju jikirém ureuëng jihnyan ubak raja Amon mangat jipeugah lagée nyoe
Judges11:13 Lé Raja bansa Amon nyan laju geujaweueb ubak ureuëng nyang teuka sibagoe utosan nyan
Judges11:14 Laju Yefta jikirém lom teuma ureuëng-ureuëng gobnyan keu raja Amon
Judges11:15 mangat jijaweueb lagéenyoe
Judges11:16 Bak watée ureuëng Israel jitinggai nanggroe Meusé
Judges11:17 Óh lheuehnyan awaknyan jikirém teuma ureuëng laén ubak raja Edom mangat jilakée idhin jijak rot nanggroe ureuëng nyan. Teuma awaknyan hana jibri idhin keuhai nyan. Óh lheuehnyan jilakée teuma hai nyang lagéenyan ubak Moab
Judges11:18 Óh lheuehnyan awaknyan jijak laju lom jisitot langkah awaknyan nyan rot padang pasi
Judges11:19 Óh lheuehnyan umat Israel jikirém teuma ureuëng laén ubak Sihon
Judges11:20 Teuma Sihon hana jipeuidhin ubak awaknyan sabab jihnyan hana jipatéh bahwa awaknyan keuneuk jak mantong. Teuma jihnyan laju jikrah bubena angkatan prang jih dan laju jipeudong markas di Yahas óh lheuehnyan jijak prang laju ureuëng Israel.
Judges11:21 Teuma Tuhan
Judges11:22 Wilayah Amori nyan teuduek phon nibak daerah Arnon di siblaih u seulatan
Judges11:23 Jadi Tuhan Po teu Allah Israel
Judges11:24 Dan jinoenyoe atranyan peu kheueh keuneuk gata cok lom teuma? Tanoh nyang jibri lé Kamos
Judges11:25 Gata pike gata leubeh gét nibak Balak aneuëk Zipor
Judges11:26 Lhée reutôh thon treb jih Israel jiduek nibak Hesybon dan Aroër meunan cit deungon gampông-gampông ban sikeulileng nyan
Judges11:27 Hana
Judges11:28 Teuma di raja Amon hana jipakoe meubacutpi peusan nyang ka geupeusampoe lé Yefta nyan.
Judges11:29 Óh lheuehnyan Roh Tuhan geutreun laju geukuasa u ateueh Yefta. Dan geujak kheueh laju Yefta nyan geujak saweue daerah Gilead dan Manasye óh lheueh geuwoe lom u Mizpa di Gilead. Nibak teumpatnyan gobnyan geupeujak lom meuneujak geuh u wilayah bansa Amon.
Judges11:30 Yefta geupeugét janjinyoe ubak Tuhan
Judges11:31 dan ulôn woe ngon seulamat
Judges11:32 Laju Yefta geujeumeurang Krueng Yordan mangat geujak prang ureuëng Amon
Judges11:33 Yefta geu heungkoe awaknyan meuhabéh-habéh phon di Aroër trok u daerah silingka Minit – banmandumnyan na dua ploh boh banda – dan trok sampoe sijiôh Abel-Keramim. Jai that-that ureuëng Amon nyang maté dalam prang nyan
Judges11:34 Bak watée Yefta geuriwang u Mizpa
Judges11:35 Meunan geukalon lé Yefta aneuëk gobnyan teuka jijak sambot gobnyan
Judges11:36 Laju jipeugah lé aneuëk daranyan ubak ureuëng syiek jih
Judges11:37 “Teuma
Judges11:38 Bapak aneuëk daranyan laju geupeu idhin peue nyang ka jilakée lé aneuëk dara jihnyan
Judges11:39 Óh ka liwat dua buleuen
Judges11:40 aneuëk-aneuëk dara jijak peu aséng droe nyang treb jih peuet uroe tieb-tieb thon keu jijak meuseudeh até sabab ji-ingat aneuëk Yefta di Gilead.
Judges12:1 Bak watéenyan sukée Efraim ka meusiab-siab keuneuk jijak meuprang
Judges12:2 Geupeugah lé Yefta
Judges12:3 Jadi
Judges12:4 Óh lheuehnyan Yefta geupeusapat banmandum ureuëng Gilead
Judges12:5 Ureuëng-ureuëng Gilead nyang teungoh jimuprang nyan
Judges12:6 awaknyan jiyue laju ureuëng nyan deungon tutoe haba lagéenyoe “Syibolet”. Ureuëng teuma jipeugah cit “Sibolet” sabab hana hase jikheun nyan deungon paséeh. Lé awaknyan teuma laju jidrob ureuëng nyan dan laju jipoh maté nibak saboh teumpat di teumpat teujeumeurang nyan. Teuma teupoh maté kheueh 42.000 droe ureuëng Efraim bak watéenyan.
Judges12:7 Nam thon treb jih Yefta jipimpén ureuëng Israel nyan. Óh lheuehnyan gobnyanpi meuninggai donya laju jipeukubu di gampông droe jih na kheueh di banda Mizpa di Gilead.
Judges12:8 Óh lheueh Yefta
Judges12:9 Ebzan nyan jimeu aneuëk lhée ploh droe aneuëk agam dan lhée ploh droe teuma aneuëk inong. Aneuëk-aneuëk geuhnyan nyang inong jipeukawen deungon sukée laén
Judges12:10 óh lheuehnyan gobnyan meuninggai dan teupeukubu laju di Betlehem.
Judges12:11 Óh ka lheueh Ebzan
Judges12:12 Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan pih meuninggai donya laju teupeukubu di Ayalon di wilayah Zebulon.
Judges12:13 Óh ka lheueh Elon
Judges12:14 Aneuëk gobnyan nyang agam na peuet ploh droe
Judges12:15 Óh lheuehnyan gobnyanpi meuninggai donya laju teupeukubu di Piraton dalam wilayah Efraim di daerah meugunong ureuëng Amalek.
Judges13:1 Ureuëng Israel meudesya lom ubak Tuhan
Judges13:2 Bak watéenyan na sidroe ureuëng agam di banda Zora. Nan jih Manoah
Judges13:3 Teuma nibak siuroe malaikat Tuhan geupeuleumah droe ubak ureuëng nyan dan geupeugah
Judges13:4 Le sababnyan jaga kheueh droe gata beujroh-jroh. Bék gata jieb ié anggô atawa ié kreueh
Judges13:5 Óh ka lheueh aneuëk gatanyan lahé teuma
Judges13:6 Óh lheuehnyan peurumoh Manoah geujak ubak teungku lakoe geuh dan laju geupeugah
Judges13:7 Teuma gobnyan geupeugah bahwa ulôn keuneuk mume dan lôn peulahé sidroe aneuëk agam. Gobnyan geupeugah lom bahwa ulôn hana jeuet lôn jieb ié anggô dan ié kreueh
Judges13:8 Watée geudeungoe nyan
Judges13:9 Po teu Allah geudeungoe doá Manoah. Malaikat Tuhan nyan geujak lom ubak peurumoh Manoah
Judges13:10 Lé sabab nyan
Judges13:11 Manoah reujang-reujang geuseutôt peurunoh geuh. Gobnyan geu peurab ubak ureuëng nyan dan laju geutanyong
Judges13:12 Lé sababnyan Manoah laju geutanyong
Judges13:13 Geujaweueb le malaikat nyan
Judges13:14 
Judges13:15 Laju geupeugah le Manoah ubak gobnyan
Judges13:16 Teuma malaikat Tuhan nyan geupeugah
Judges13:17 
Judges13:18 Malaikat Tuhan nyan geutanyong
Judges13:19 Teuma Manoah laju jicok saboh kaméng muda deungon bacut gandom
Judges13:20 Watéenyan teuka apui teungoh hu u ateueh nibak miseubah nyan Manoah dan peurumoh geuh geukalon malaikat Tuhan nyan geu ek u ateueh lam apui hu nyan
Judges13:21 
Judges13:22 Laju geupeugah le Manoah ubak peurumoh geuh
Judges13:23 Peurumoh geuh geujaweueb
Judges13:24 Na padub buleuen teuma óh lheuehnyan peurunoh Manoah nyan geupeulahé sidroe aneuëk agam laju geuboh nan Simson keu aneuëk nyan. Aneuëk nyan meutamah rayeuk dan geubri beureukat le Tuhan;
Judges13:25 dan watée jihnyan na nibak khimah-khimah sukée Dan
Judges14:1 Nibak siuroe Simson geujak u Timna
Judges14:2 Laju geuwoe dan geupeugah ubak ureuëng syiek geuh
Judges14:3 Teuma ureuëng syiek geuh geupeugah
Judges14:4 Ureuëng syiek Simson hana geuteupeue bahwa Tuhan kheueh nyang peujeuet banmandum nyan sampoe Simson geupeubuet nyan. Sabab Tuhan teungoh geumita watée nyang paih keu teuprang ureuëng Filistin. Yoh watée nyan ureuëng Filistin jikuasa ureuëng Israel.
Judges14:5 Dan geujak kheueh Simson u Timna meusajan-sajan ngon ureuëng syiek gobnyan
Judges14:6 dan hana teusangka-sangka Simson jiteuka teuga le kuasa Tuhan. Laju geupriek-priek singa nyan ngon jaroe gobnyan
Judges14:7 Óh lheuehnyan Simson geujak saweue aneuëk dara nyan dan geumarit-marit ngon sidara nyan
Judges14:8 Óh ka lheueh na padub watée teuma óh dudoe
Judges14:9 Gobnyan laju geucok sira geukrok mulisan unö nyan lam paleuet paroe gobnyan
Judges14:10 Óh ka lheueh ayah Simson geujak u rumoh aneuëk dara nyan
Judges14:11 Watée ureuëng Filistin jikalon gobnyan
Judges14:12 Laju Simson geupeugah bak awaknyan
Judges14:13 Teuma meunyoe gata hana hase gata jaweueb hieuém nyoe
Judges14:14 Teuma Simson geupeugah
Judges14:15 Lé sababnyan
Judges14:16 Lé sababnyan
Judges14:17 Tujoh uroe treb jih khanuri nyan peurumoh Simson jimo sabe. Dan lé sabab inong nyan hana piôh jimeurengek sabe
Judges14:18 Dan bak uroe nyang keutujoh sigohlom mata uroe jilhob
Judges14:19 Deungon hana teusangka-sangka Simson jiteuka teuga le kuasa Tuhan
Judges14:20 Laju le ayah tuan Simson geujôk peurumoh Simson nyan ubak nyang iréng Simson yoh watée awaknyan meukawen.
Judges15:1 Na padubna treb teuma óh lheueh nyan
Judges15:2 Geupeugah le yah tuan nyan ubak Simson
Judges15:3 Geupeugah kheueh lé Simson
Judges15:4 Laju geujak drob lhée reutôh boh asée srigala. Iku tieb-tieb asée srigala nyan geuikat dua-dua. Nibak sinambat talo ikatnyan
Judges15:5 Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan laju geutot suwa-suwa nyan ngon apui dan laju geupeuleueh asée-asée srigala nyan lam blang gandom ureuëng Filistin
Judges15:6 Ureuëng-ureuëng Filistin laju jijak seulidek soe poe buet nyan. Laju na ureuëng nyang peugah bak awaknyan bahwa Simson kheueh nyang peubuet mandum nyan
Judges15:7 Laju geupeugah lé Simson ubak ureuëng Filistin nyan
Judges15:8 Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan laju geuprang awaknyan ngon biet-biet keujam that dan geupoh maté awaknyan keubiet jai that-that. Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan geujak dan geumusöm lam saboh guha nibak saboh bukét batée di Etam.
Judges15:9 Le sababnyan ureuëng Filistin jijak ubak daerah ureuëng Yehuda laju jipeusong khimah disinan
Judges15:10 Ureuëng Yehuda geutanyong ubak ureuëng Filistin
Judges15:11 Watée jideungoe hainyan
Judges15:12 Kheun awaknyan
Judges15:13 “Get
Judges15:14 Watée Simson jiba trok u Lehi
Judges15:15 Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan laju geuteumé sikrak tuleueng geuheuém keuleudée nyang mantong barô. Laju geucok tuleueng nyan
Judges15:16 Lé sababnyan geupeugah kheueh lé Simson sira meunyanyoe
Judges15:17 Óh lheuehnyan
Judges15:18 Óh lheuehnyan Simson jiteuka grah that
Judges15:19 Lé sababnyan Po teu Allah laju geupeuhah ruhuéng nyang na lam bukét batée di Lehi nyan
Judges15:20 Dua ploh thon treb jih Simson geupimpén umat Israel watée awaknyan jikuasa lé ureuëng Filistin.
Judges16:1 Bak si uroe
Judges16:2 Bak watée teujok dan teupeugah hai nyan ubak ureuëng-ureuëng Gaza
Judges16:3 Teuma Simson teutab geuéh sampoe teungeut disinan trok án teungoh malam. Bak watée teungoh malamnyan teujaga dan geubeudôh kheueh gobnyan nibak teumpat éh
Judges16:4 Óh lheuehnyan Simson ka rhot cinta ubak sidroe inong dara nibak Pantôn Sorek nyang nan jih Delila.
Judges16:5 Teuka kheueh laju raja-raja ureuëng Filistin ubak inong nyan sira jipeugah
Judges16:6 Lé Delila jipeugah ubak Simson
Judges16:7 Geujaweueb lé Simson ubak binoe geuhnyan
Judges16:8 Lé peunguasa Filistin jijok laju ubak Delila tujoh krek talo busur nyang barô nyang gohlom tho that. Óh lheuehnyan
Judges16:9 
Judges16:10 Geupeugah lom lé Delila ubak Simson
Judges16:11 Geupeugah lom lé Simson
Judges16:12 Teungoh ureuëng Filistin mantong jipreh-preh di dalam ruweueng kama nyang laén
Judges16:13 Laju geupeugah lom lé Delila ubak lakoe geuhnyan
Judges16:14 Lé Delila pi laju geujak peuteungeuet Simson
Judges16:15 Óh lheuehnyan geupeugah lom lé Delila ubak gobnyan
Judges16:16 Tieb-tieb uroe Delila teutab mantong jimeurengek-rengek lagée aneuëk manyak ubak lakoe geuh nyan sira geupa sabe
Judges16:17 Akhé jih sabab hán ék le geudeungoe ureuëng binoe geuhnyan jimeu réengeuek sabe
Judges16:18 Delila ka teurasa bahwa Simson biet-biet ka geubuka rahsia até gobnyan. Sabab nyan geukirém laju habanyan ubak peunguasa-peunguasa ureuëng Filistin
Judges16:19 Óh lheueh geupeugah nyan
Judges16:20 Laju geumeuhôi sira geudumpék ngon su nyang teuga
Judges16:21 Deungon nyan di ureuëng-ureuëng Filistin jijak drob laju gobnyan dan jicungkée bandua neuek mata geuh. Awaknyan laju jiba gobnyan u Gaza dan ji ikat gobnyan deungon dua krek ranté teumaga
Judges16:22 Teuma sidubnyan treb ôk di ateueh ulée gobnyan ka jipeuphon timoh lom teuma.
Judges16:23 Bak si uroe ureuëng nyang mat kuasa di Filistin nyan jimeusapat keuneuk jipeuna khanuri raya sira jipeuseumah keureubeuen keu dewa awaknyan nyang nan jih Dagon. Awaknyan laju jimeunyanyoe
Judges16:24 Teungoh awaknyan jimeusuka ria
Judges16:25 
Judges16:26 Geupeugah lé Simson ubak aneuëk agam nyang peujak gobnyan
Judges16:27 Geudongnyan peunoh meusak-sak ngon ureuëng ramé. Dan banlimong droe nyang mat kuasa ateueh Filistin nyan pi na didalam geudong nyan. Dan nibak tingkat ateueh nibak geudong nyan na ureuëng kira-kira 3.000 droe. Awaknyan banmandum jijak meunonton sira ji peuhina ateueh Simson.
Judges16:28 Bak watée nyan kheueh Simson geumeu doá ubak Tuhan Po teu Allah; doá geuhnyan na kheueh lagéenyoe
Judges16:29 Óh lheueh geupeugah lé Simson nyang lagéenyan geumat laju dua boh taméh teungoh nyang na teutumpang geudong nyan. Dan sira geumeu tumpang deungon jaroe wie nibak taméh nyang saboh dan jaroe uneuen gobnyan ubak taméh nyang saboh teuk
Judges16:30 gobnyan geumeuhôi lom
Judges16:31 Óh lheuehnyan teuka kheueh laju bubena kawöm syedara gobnyan keu jijakcok manyét gobnyan. Manyétnyan laju jipeuwoe urumoh
Judges17:1 Na sidroe ureuëng agam nyang nan jih Mikha. Gobnyan tinggai di daerah meugunong-gunong jitamong u dalam wilayah Efraim.
Judges17:2 Bak siuroe geupeugah lé gobnyan ubak mak geuhnyan
Judges17:3 Mikha laju geupulang péng nyan ubak mak geuh
Judges17:4 Teuma óh kalheueh Mikha jijok pulang lom péng nyan ubak mak jihnyan
Judges17:5 Di Mikha keudroe ka na nibak gobnyan saboh teumpat teumpat iébadat. Lé gobnyan geupeuget na meupadub boh patong beurala dan siôn efod laju geuangkat sidroe lamkawan aneuëk gobnyan nyang agam jeuet keu teungku imeum.
Judges17:6 Nibak watéenyan bansa Israel gohlom na raja; tieb-tieb ureuëng beubaih jipeubuet peue nyang jianggab nyan beutôi.
Judges17:7 Bak watéenyan cit teuma na sidroe ureuëng muda nibak sukée Lewi. Dilée gobnyan tinggai di Betlehem di dalam wilayah ureuëng Yehuda.
Judges17:8 Teuma jinoenyoe ureuëng nyan ka jitinggai di bandanyan dan teungoh jijak mita teumpat tinggai nyang laén. Nibak meuneujak
Judges17:9 Mikha geutanyong ubak ureuëngnyan
Judges17:10 Geupeugah lé Mikha
Judges17:11 Di aneuëk muda ureuëng Lewi nyan laju situju
Judges17:12 
Judges17:13 Teuma geupeugah lé Mikha
Judges18:1 Bak watéenyan di nanggroe Israel hana meuraja. Sukée Dan mantong jimita-mita daerah mangat jeuet keu teumpat wilayah geuh
Judges18:2 Lé sababnyan awaknyan laju jipiléh limong droe ureuëng nyang gagah ngon beuhe lamkawan banmandum kawöm didalam sukée awaknyan nyang na tinggai di Zora dan Esytaol
Judges18:3 Bak watée jikeuneuk tamong u dalam rumoh nyan teudeungoe laju lé awaknyan peumuda Lewi nyan teungoh jipeugah haba. Dan awaknyan pi ka jituri nibak loghat ureuëng Lewinyan. Lé sababnyan
Judges18:4 Geujaweueb lé ureuëng mudanyan
Judges18:5 Jipeugah lé awaknyan ubak gobnyan
Judges18:6 Geujaweueb lé teungku imeum nyan
Judges18:7 Óh lheuehnyan jijak kheueh laju ban limong droe ureuëng nyan u Lais. Disinan awaknyan jingieng laju peunduduek nyang na disinan. Nyata kheuehnyan nibak awaknyan
Judges18:8 Bak watée ban limong droe ureuëng nyan jiriwang ubak mandum sukée gobnyan di Zora dan Esytaol
Judges18:9 Jipeugah lé awaknyan
Judges18:10 
Judges18:11 Lé sabab nyan
Judges18:12 awaknyan jijak u bagian barat Kiryat-Yearim di wilayah Yehuda laju jipeudong khimah disinan. Nyang kheueh sabab jih teumpat nyan sampoe án saátnyoe mantong teuboh nan Teumpat Meukhimah Dan.
Judges18:13 Phon nibak teumpatnyan awaknyan geujak laju u daerah meugunong-gunong Efraim sampoe trok u rumoh Mikha.
Judges18:14 Ban limong droe ureuëng tukang meuluem nyan jipeugah ubak rakan-rakan jihnyan
Judges18:15 Óh lheueh nibak nyan awaknyan jijak laju u rumoh Mikha
Judges18:16 Bak watéenyan ban 600 droe tantra sukée Dan
Judges18:17 Ban limong droe mata-matanyan jitamong laju u dalam rumoh
Judges18:18 Bak watée banlimong droe ureuëng nyan jitamong u dalam rumoh Mikha dan jicok Efod meunan cit deungon banmandum patong-patong beuralanyan
Judges18:19 Awaknyan jijaweueb
Judges18:20 Peumuda Lewi nyan galak that geudeungoe saran nyang lagée nyan. Lé sababnyan
Judges18:21 Óh lheuehnyan rombongan nyan laju jijak lom
Judges18:22 Bak watée awaknyan ka jiôh
Judges18:23 Mikha dan ureuëng-ureuëng geuhnyan laju jiklik-klik geumeuhôi ngon su nyang riôh keu awaknyan. Di ureuëng-ureuëng sukée Dan nyan jipaleng laju u likot sira jitanyong ubak Mikha
Judges18:24 Geujaweueb lé Mikha
Judges18:25 Jipeugah lé ureuëng-ureuëng sukée Dan nyan
Judges18:26 Óh lheueh jipeugah nyang lagéenyan di ureuëng sukée Dan nyan laju jijak lom teuma. Mikha jikalon bahwa awaknyan jiôh leubeh teuga nibak jihnyan
Judges18:27 Óh ka lheueh jipeuplueng teungku imeum nyan lé ureuëng sukée Dan meunan cit deungon barang-barang ngon peubuet iébadat peuneugét Mikha
Judges18:28 
Judges18:29 Nan bandanyan laju jigantoe deungon nan banda Dan
Judges18:30 Patong beurala nyang awaknyan ba nyan
Judges18:31 Patong beurala nyang jipeugét lé Mikha nyan teutab na di Lais simantong Khimah Tuhan na mantong di Silo.
Judges19:1 Bak watée Israel gohlom na raja
Judges19:2 Teuma óh dudoe ureuëng inong nyan beungéh ubak gobnyan
Judges19:3 lé ureuëng Lewi nyan jijak seutôt inong nyan sira geubujuk mangat jitem gisa lom ubak gobnyan. Gobnyan jijak sira jiba sidroe namiet meunan cit dua boh keuleudée. Óh ka trok keudeh
Judges19:4 dan jipaksa mangat gobnyan bék geuwoe. Lé sababnyan
Judges19:5 Bak uroe nyan keupeuet
Judges19:6 Lé sababnyan jiduek kheueh ureuëng Lewi nyan dan jimakheun laju meusajan-sajan ngon ayah inong nyan. Teuma watée gobnyan jidong keuneuk jijak
Judges19:7 
Judges19:8 Bak uroe nyang keulimong
Judges19:9 Lheuehnyan
Judges19:10 Teuma lé ureuëng Lewi nyan hana jitem mudom le. Gobnyan ngon gundek jih laju jijak
Judges19:11 Teuma lé teungku po jih nyan jiseuôt
Judges19:12 
Judges19:13 
Judges19:14 Lé sababnyan awaknyan jijak laju hana jipiôh di Yebus. Mata Uroe ka jilhob watée awaknyan trok u Gibea nibak wilayah sukée Benyamin.
Judges19:15 Awaknyan jipiôh disinan keu jimudom
Judges19:16 Teungoh awaknyan jiduek nibak padang banda
Judges19:17 Watée jingieng lé ureuëng tuha nyan ureuëng Lewi nyan na di padang
Judges19:18 Ureuëng Lewi nyan geujaweueb
Judges19:19 Kamoe hana peureulée sapeue nyang laén
Judges19:20 Laju geupeugah lé ureuëng tuha nyan
Judges19:21 Óh lheuehnyan lé ureuëng tuha nyan laju jiba awaknyan u rumoh jih dan jijok laju eumpeuen keu keuleudée-keuleudée jih. Dan óh ka lheueh jamé-jamé nyan jirhah gaki
Judges19:22 Teungoh awaknyan meuseunang-seunang
Judges19:23 Ureuëng tuha nyan geuteubiet dan laju geupeugah bak awaknyan
Judges19:24 Eunteuk ulôn jok gundek jihnyan ngon aneuëk dara lôn keu gata. Jeuet gata pupuih droe ngon awaknyan. Teuma bék kheueh gata peubuet nyang jeuhet ateueh jamé ulôn nyan!”
Judges19:25 Teuma lé sabab ureuëng jeuhet nyan jimeukreueh cit
Judges19:26 Óh watée suboh ureuëng inong nyan jigisa
Judges19:27 Beungoh nyan
Judges19:28 “Beudôh kheueh laju
Judges19:29 Óh trok u rumoh
Judges19:30 Banmandum ureuëng nyang kalon nyan jipeugah laju
Judges20:1 Dan teuka kheueh banmandum umat Israel nibak daerah Dan di utara sampoe u Bersyeba di seulatan
Judges20:2 Banmandum nyan na 400.000 droe tantra nibak pasokan nyang jak ngon gaki. Peumimpén-peumipén nibak tieb-tieb sukée bansa Israel teuka cit keunan.
Judges20:3 Óh lheueh nibaknyan di ureuëng-ureuëng nibak sukée Benyamin ka jideungoe bahwa banmandum ureuëng Israel nyang laén ka geumeugumpôi di Mizpa. Dan jiteumanyong kheueh lé ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyan ubak ureuëng Lewi nyang selir jih ka jipoh maté nyan
Judges20:4 
Judges20:5 Óh lheuehnyan teuka kheueh ureuëng-ureuëng Gibea ubak kamoe bak watée malam uroe jijak mita ulôn. Awaknyan laju jikeupông rumoh teumpat kamoe mudom nyan deungon meukeusut awaknyan jikeuneuk poh maté ulôn
Judges20:6 Lé ulôn laju ulôn cok manyét nyang ka maté nyan dan ulôn koh-koh laju óh lheueh nyan ulôn kirém ubak ban dua blaih boh sukée bansa geutanyoe maséng-maséng sikrak. Ulôn peubuet hai nyang lagéenyan sabab ureuëng Gibea nyan ka jipeubuet nyang jeuhet dan lumpah malée bala nyan keunong u ateueh bansa Israel.
Judges20:7 Gatanyoe banmandum nyang na disinoe na kheueh bansa Israel. Jadi jinoenyoe hainyan ulôn lakée peudapat nibak gata banmandum!”
Judges20:8 Deungon sireuntak ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyang na meugumpôi di teumpat nyan laju jidong dan jipeugah
Judges20:9 Nyoe kheueh nyang geutanyoe peubuet: Geutanyoe tatiek undi mangat teupeuteuntée ureuëng-ureuëng nyang harôh jijak prang Gibea.
Judges20:10 Siper siploh nibak banmandum ureuëng agam bansa Israel harôh jipeuna peunajoh keu awaknyan nyang jak meuprang. Nyang laén laju jijak prang Gibea mangat teuhuköm awaknyan sabab buet nyang jeuhet nyang ka awaknyan peubuet lamkawan umat Israel.”
Judges20:11 Meunan kheueh cara jih umat Israel ka jimeusaboh keu jijak prang Gibea.
Judges20:12 Óh lheueh nyan lé ureuëng Israel laju jikirém bubena ureuëng gobnyan u dalam wilayah sukée Benyamin keu jijak peusampoe haba nyoe: “Keujeuhetan peue nyang ka teujadi u ateueh gatanyoe?
Judges20:13 Gata seurah kheueh banmandum ureuëng-ureuëng jeuhet nyang beujat di Gibea nyan ubak kamoe mangat awaknyan kamoe poh maté dan deungon na nyang lagéenyan kamoe ka kamoe sampôh buet nyang jeuhet nyan lamkawan bansa Israel.” Teuma ureuëng Benyamin hana jipako peue nyang ka jipeu ingat lé ureuëng Israel nyang laén nyan.
Judges20:14 Malah banmandum banda nyang na di dalam wilayah Benyamin nyan dan ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin jijak u Gibea keu jijak meuprang ngon ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyang laén nyan.
Judges20:15 Bak uroenyan awaknyan laju meusapat nibak banda-banda jihnyan na 26.000 droe tantra. Dan disampéng nyan teuma na cit peunduduek Gibea ka teuma meusapat 700 droe ureuëng nyang teupiléh dan teulatéh. Banmandum ureuëng jawie nyang gét that campen jiseumeurhom ngon batée ngon cara jipeuguna lagée ali-ali. Meunyoe awaknyan jigeulawa ngon ali-ali nyan
Judges20:16 
Judges20:17 Blaih ureuëng Israel nyang laén pi ka teuma meusapat 400.000 droe tantra nyang ka teulatéh.
Judges20:18 Tantra umat Israel nyan jijak laju ubak teumpat iébadat di Betel
Judges20:19 Óh singoh beungoh nyan beurangkat kheueh laju awaknyan dan laju jipeudong khimah to ngon banda Gibea.
Judges20:20 Awaknyan laju jipeudong baresan angkatan prang jih meuhadab keue ngon banda nyan
Judges20:21 Dan bubena angkatan prang Benyamin nyan laju jiteubiet ngon jijak prang awaknyan óh lheueh nyan tantra Israel maté na 22.000 droe nibak uroenyan.
Judges20:22 Sabab ka taloe nyan
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 Keu nyang keudua jih awaknyan jijak prang angkatan prang Benyamin nyan.
Judges20:25 Dan keu nyang keu dua teuma ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin nyan jiteubiet jijak seurang awaknyan. Goenyan awaknyan jipoh maté teuma na l8.000 droe tantra nyang teulatéh nibak angkatan prang Israel.
Judges20:26 Dan jijak kheueh lom ureuëng Israel nyan u Betel laju jijakmoe ba-e ubak Tuhan. Disinan awaknyan jipuasa sampoe án malam uroe dan jipeuseumah keureubeuen peudamé dan keureubeuen nyang teutot keu Tuhan.
Judges20:27 Bak watéenyan Peuto Peujanjian Po teu Allah na di Betel
Judges20:28 
Judges20:29 Watée jideungoe jaweueb Tuhan nyan
Judges20:30 Dan nibak uroe nyang keulhée awaknyan jijak maju ngon jijak eungkoe angkatan prang Benyamin
Judges20:31 Meunan cit ngon ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin jijak seureubu cit u ateueh pasokan Israel
Judges20:32 Lé sababnyan lé ureuëng Benyamin jisangka awaknyan ka geupeutaloe ureuëng Israel lagée nyang ka-ka. Teuma tantra Israel ka na reuncana awaknyan jikeuneuk surot mangat teupanceng lom tantra Benyamin nyan u jalan-jalan raya
Judges20:33 Bak watée pasokan inti Israel nyan jisurot
Judges20:34 Awaknyan na kheueh ureuëng-ureuëng peuniléh nibak ban saboh nanggroe Israel; jeumeulah jih na 10.000 droe. Dan teujadi kheueh prang nyang lumpah hibat bak watée tantra nyang 10.000 droe nyan jijak keupông Gibea. Ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin meubacut pi hana jisangka bahwa droe jihnyan hana treb le teuma taloe.
Judges20:35 Tuhan geubri keu ureuëng Israel meunang ateueh ureuëng Benyamin
Judges20:36 Barô kheueh lé ureuëng Benyamin jisada bahwa jihnyan ka taloe. Pasokan inti Israel nyan deungon jisaja ka jipeuplueng droe nibak ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin sabab awaknyan jipeubangga aneuëk buah jihnyan di teumpat-teumpat nyang teusöm ban keulileng Gibea.
Judges20:37 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang teungoh jimusöm nyan bagaih-bagaih jitamong jijak seureubu Gibea; awaknyan laju meutabu hoho mantong bansaboh bandanyan dan jipoh maté banmandum ureuëng nyang na disinan.
Judges20:38 Teuma awaknyan ka sipakat leubeh ilée meunyoe na asab teubai nyang teungoh meukeubok u ateueh bak teungoh-teungoh banda
Judges20:39 pasokan inti nyang teungoh jisurot harôh jibalek jijak prang musoh. Bak watée nyan ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin ka jipoh maté kira-kira na lhée ploh droe tantra Israel dan jisangka lé awaknyan jihnyan ka jipeutaloe ureuëng-ureuëng Israelnyan lagée nyang ka jipeubuet yoh awaiphon.
Judges20:40 Teuma na siatnyan mantong asab ka meukeubok u ateueh di teungoh-teungoh banda Gibea nyan. Ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin gét that teukeujot watée awaknyan jipaleng ulikot dan jikalon laju banmandum banda awaknyan ka habéh tutong.
Judges20:41 Dan bak watée nyan cit teuma pasokan inti Israel jigisa laju jijak seurang
Judges20:42 Lé sababnyan
Judges20:43 Ureuëng-ureuëng Israel laju jipong dan jitiyeub awaknyan hana piôh-piôh sampoe trok ubak saboh teumpat disiblaih utimu Gibea. Sira jitiyeub
Judges20:44 18.000 droe tantra nyang teulatéh nibak angkatan prang Benyamin.
Judges20:45 Tantra Benyamin nyang laén nyan laju jigisa dan jiplueng bansalamle meulalu daerah padang pasi jituju ubak gunong-gunong batée di Rimon. Na 5.000 droe lamkawan awaknyan keunong poh maté diteungoh rot ueh raya. Seudangkan nyang laén nyan jipeucrok laju sampoe u Gideom. Nibak ureuëng nyan na teuma 2.000 droe nyang teupoh maté.
Judges20:46 Deungon nyan
Judges20:47 Teuma lamkawan awaknyan nyang jiplueng liwat rot padang-padang pasi jituju ubak gunong-gunong batée di Rimon na teuma 600 droe nyang lheueh. Awaknyan tinggai di Rimon na peuet beuleuen treb jih.
Judges20:48 Óh lheuehnyan ureuëng Israel jigisa lom laju jijak prang dan jipoh maté mandum ureuëng Benyamin nyang na tinggai sidroe sapat – agam
Judges21:1 Bak watée ureuëng Israel jimeusapat di Mizpa
Judges21:2 Jinoenyoe awaknyan jijak u Betel dan jiduek ngon até nyang seudeh trok án malam dikeue Tuhan. Awaknyan jimo dan jimeusapat
Judges21:3 “Ya Tuhan
Judges21:4 Óh singoh beungoh nyan
Judges21:5 Óh lheuehnyan awaknyan laju jiseulidek peu kheueh na lamkawan sukée-sukée bansa Israel nyang hana jijak u Mizpa bak watée meusapat disinan yoh masa ilée keujak meuhadab Tuhan. (Bak watéenyan awaknyan ka jimeusumpah bahwa ureuëng nyang hana jitemjak bak watée teupakat u Mizpa ureuëng nyan harôh teuhuköm maté.)
Judges21:6 Umat Israel that-that jigaséh ubak mandum syedara-syedara gobnyan sukée Benyamin; awaknyan jipeugah
Judges21:7 Peue nyang harôh tapeubuet lé geutanyoe mangat ureuëng Benyamin nyang na mantong tinggai bacut teuk nyoe hase jimeukawen dan na peurumoh
Judges21:8 Teuma lé awaknyan jiseulidek peu kheueh na saboh golongan nibak sukée bansa Israel nyang hana jijak meusapat di Mizpa. Dan awaknyan na meurumpok bahwa nibak ureuëng-ureuëng Yabes di Gilead
Judges21:9 Sabab
Judges21:10 Lé sabab nyan
Judges21:11 Awaknyan jibri peurintah keu jiyue poh bubena ureuëng agam
Judges21:12 Teuma lamkawan ureuëng nyang na tinggai di Yabes nyan
Judges21:13 Óh lheuehnyan banmandum umat Israel jikirém utosan ubak ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin nyang na tinggai di gunong-gunong batée di Rimon keu pakat meudamé.
Judges21:14 Lé sababnyan di ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin nyan laju geugisa
Judges21:15 Umat Israel gét that weueh keu ureuëng Benyamin
Judges21:16 Sabab nyan
Judges21:17 Teuma peue takeuneuk peugah; geutanyoe hana jeuet tabri idhin keu aneuëk-aneuëk dara geutanyoe jimeukawen deungon awaknyan
Judges21:18 Bék sampoe Israel gadôh saboh lamkawan sukée jih nibak dua blaih sukée bansa Israel. Geutanyoe harôh tamita jalan mangat sukée Benyamin nyan jeuet jipeutreun keuturonan jih simantong na jih nyan dan jeuet teuma jipo hak milék tanoh jihnyan jeuet keu atra jih siumu masa.”
Judges21:19 “Meunoe
Judges21:20 Teuma di ureuëng patot-patot nyang jipeuna meusapat di Betel nyan jipeugah ubak ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin nyang na tinggai sidroe dua nyan
Judges21:21 dan gata meujaga-jaga kheueh disinan. Eunteuk meunyoe aneuëk-aneuëk dara Silo jiteubiet keu jijak meunari bak watée peurayaan siseun sithon keu Tuhan
Judges21:22 Meunyoe na bapak atawa syedara inong nyan nyang agam jijak tuntot gata
Judges21:23 Teuma ureuëng-ureuëng Benyamin nyan laju jipeubuet peue nyang ka jipeugah ubak jihnyan. Awaknyan maséng-maséng laju jibaplueng sidroe aneuëk dara Silo. Óh lheuehnyan awaknyan jiwoe u wilayah jih keudroe dan laju jipeudong lom banda-banda gobnyan dan laju jitinggai teutab disinan.
Judges21:24 Meunan cit deungon ureuëng-ureuëng Israel nyang laén pi jibeurangkat cit teuma. Awaknyan jiwoe ubak tanoh milék jih keudroe di dalam wilayah droe jihnyan maséng-maséng
Judges21:25 Bak watée jamén nyan gohlom na raja di nanggroe Israel. Tieb-tieb ureuëng jipeubuet peue nyang jianggab beutôi.
Ruth1:1 Bak watée jamén ilée sigohlom ureuëng Israel na raja nanggroe
Ruth1:2 
Ruth1:3 Elimelekh meuninggai donya. Deungon nyan tinggai kheueh Naomi meusajan ngon ban dua droe aneuëk geuh.
Ruth1:4 Ban dua aneuëk jihnyan jimeukawen ngon aneuëk dara Moab
Ruth1:5 ban dua aneuëk agam Naomi nyan
Ruth1:6 Na meupadubna treb teuma óh lheuehnyan Naomi jideungoe bahwa Tuhan ka geubri beureukat ateueh umat Israel deungon hase panén nyang gét. Lé sabab nyan Naomi deungon ban dua droe meulintée gobnyan jimeukeumah laju keu jitinggai Moab.
Ruth1:7 Awaknyan jibeurangkat meusigoe-sigoe jiwoe u Yehuda. Bak teungoh rot ueh
Ruth1:8 Naomi jipeugah ubak ban dua droe meulintée jihnyan
Ruth1:9 Seumoga Tuhan ngon murah até geubri lakoe lom keu gata mangat gata tameurumoh tangga lom teuma.” Óh ka lheueh jipeugah nyang lagée nyan bagoe
Ruth1:10 sira jikheun ubak Naomi
Ruth1:11 “Bék
Ruth1:12 Gatajak woe kheueh
Ruth1:13 peu kheueh gatanyoe tatem preh sampoe aneuëk nyan rayeuk? ék kheueh mungken lé sababnyoe gata hana tatem meukawen deungon ureuëng laén? Han jeuet
Ruth1:14 Rut dan Orpa geumo lom ngon su nyang teuga óh lheuehnyan Orpa laju jilakée droe sira jicöm mak tuwan droe jih dan gobnyan pih geuwoe. Teuma Rut hana geutem reungggang deungon mak tuwan geuh nyan.
Ruth1:15 Jipeugah kheueh lé Naomi ubak Rut nyan
Ruth1:16 Teuma geujaweueb lé Rut
Ruth1:17 Dipat mantong Mak meuninggai
Ruth1:18 Naomi geukalon bahwa Rut nyan that-that jimeukreueh keuneuk jiseutôt
Ruth1:19 Deungon nyan teuma awaknyan laju geujak lom sampoe ka trok u Betlehem. Meunan awaknyan trok keunan
Ruth1:20 “Bék tahôi ulôn Naomi
Ruth1:21 Bak watée ulôn tuan jak nibak teumpat nyoe peunoh deungon peue nyang tapeureulée
Ruth1:22 Meunan kheueh kisah jih pakriban Naomi geuwoe nibak Moab meusajan deungon Rut meulintée gobnyan nyang ureuëng Moab nyan. Awaknyan trok u Betlehem paih bak musém keumeukoh boh gandom.
Ruth2:1 Naomi na sidroe anggota keuluwarga nibak pihak lakoe jih
Ruth2:2 Bak si uroe geupeugah lé Rut ubak Naomi
Ruth2:3 Deungon nyan geujak kheueh laju Rut u blang geujak piléh gandom nyang rhot nibak jaroe ureuëng mupot. Keubeutulan gobnyan geujak ublang atra Boas.
Ruth2:4 Hana treb óh lheuehnyan Boas teuka nibak Betlehem dan geubri saleuem ubak ureuëng nyang teungoh meupot
Ruth2:5 Laju Boas geuteumanyong ubak mando gobnyan
Ruth2:6 Jijaweueb lé mando nyan
Ruth2:7 Gobnyan geulakée idhin ubak ulôn mangat jiseutôt rot likot ureuëng nyang teungoh mupot keu jipiléh boh gandom nyang rhot-rhot. Phon beungoh geuhnyan hana geupiôh meukeureuja
Ruth2:8 Lé Boas geupeugah ubak Rut
Ruth2:9 
Ruth2:10 Geudeungoe nyang lagée nyan Rut laju geusujut dikeue Boas sira geupeugah
Ruth2:11 Boas geujaweueb
Ruth2:12 Seumoga Tuhan geubalaih buet gata nyang jroh. Seumoga gata tateurimong peue-peue mantong nyang geubri lé Tuhan
Ruth2:13 Geujaweueb lé Rut
Ruth2:14 Watée katrok keu teujak pajoh bu
Ruth2:15 Óh lheuehnyan Rut geujak lom geujak piléh boh gandom. Óh ka leupah gobnyan geujak
Ruth2:16 
Ruth2:17 Rut hana geupiôh laju geupiléh gandom di blang sampoe án uroe seupôt. Óh ka lheueh gobnyan geuseunuet-seunuet bak gandom nyan keu geupeu leukang aneuk gandom nyang meukeumat nibak mu jih
Ruth2:18 Óh lheuehnyan gobnyan geuwoe laju u banda deungon geupeuwoe sajan hase nyang ka geupiléh nyan ubak mak tuwan sira geutunyok na meupadub na le hase nyang geupiléh nyan. Dan gobnyan geubri ubak mak tuwan geuh peunajoh nyang hana ek geupeu habéh bak watée makheun.
Ruth2:19 Teuma geupeugah kheueh lé Naomi ubak Rut nyan
Ruth2:20 “Aneuëk meutuah
Ruth2:21 Óh lheueh nyan Rut geupeugah lom
Ruth2:22 “Nyoe
Ruth2:23 Lé sabab nyan
Ruth3:1 Na meupadub na treb teuma óh lheuehnyan
Ruth3:2 Gata takeureuja meusajan deungon ureuëng inong diblang Boas
Ruth3:3 Tajak manoe kheueh laju
Ruth3:4 Gata ngieng kheueh dipat teumpat gobnyan éh. Meunyoe gobnyan ka geuteungéuet
Ruth3:5 “Gét
Ruth3:6 Dan geujak kheueh laju Rut u teumpat ureuëng meukeureuja nyang teungoh jilo gandom mangat leukang nibak mu jih. Disinan gobnyan geupeubuet banmandum nyang geupeugah lé mak tuwan geuh.
Ruth3:7 Óh ka seuleusoe Boas geupajoh bu
Ruth3:8 Watée teungoh malam hana teusangka-sangka Boas teujaga nibak teungeut dan geukeuneuk balék badan geuh. Gobnyan keubit that teukeujot bak watée geungieng na sidroe ureuëng inong ka teu-éh nibak gaki geuh.
Ruth3:9 “Soe ureuëng nyoe?” geutanyong lé Boas. “Ulôn Rut
Ruth3:10 “Seumoga Tuhan geubri beureukat ateueh gata
Ruth3:11 Lé sabab nyan
Ruth3:12 Keubiet beutôi that
Ruth3:13 Malam nyoe gata tinggai mantong disinoe. Singoh beungoh ulôn tanyong peu kheueh jihnyan jitem meutanggong jaweueb ateueh gata atawa hana. Meunyoe jihnyan jitem
Ruth3:14 Dan geuéh kheueh Rut disinan to ngon gaki Boas. Óh singoh beungoh suboh mantong reuneue-reuneue
Ruth3:15 Geupeugah kheueh lé Boas ubak Rut
Ruth3:16 Óh watée katrok geuwoe Rut u rumoh
Ruth3:17 “Dan
Ruth3:18 Laju geupeugah lé Naomi
Ruth4:1 Lé Boas laju geujak ubak teumpat meurumpok nibak babah pintoe geureubang banda. Óh ka lheueh geuduek na sikeujab disinan deuh kheueh laju geungieng sidroe ureuëng agam jijak rab ngon gobnyan
Ruth4:2 Óh lheueh nyan Boas laju teuma geuhôi siploh droe teuk ureuëng-ureuëng patot dalam banda mangat jiduek meusajan ngon gobnyan disinan. Óh lheueh awaknyan geuduek
Ruth4:3 geupeugah kheueh laju lé Boas ubak syedara geuh nyan
Ruth4:4 Dan ulôn kira gata harôh tateupeue keuhai nyan. Meunyoe gata tatem bloe tanoh nyan
Ruth4:5 Laju geupeugah lom lé Boas
Ruth4:6 Jijaweueb lé ureuëng nyan
Ruth4:7 Bak masanyan meunyoe na ureuëng jipeubloe tanoh atawa jituka hak milék jih
Ruth4:8 Lé sabab nyan
Ruth4:9 Dan geupeugah lé Boas ubak ureuëng-ureuëng tuha nyang patot-patot meunan cit ubak mandum ureuëng laén nyang na disinan
Ruth4:10 Meunan cit disampéng nyan ulôn kucok Rut
Ruth4:11 Ureuëng-ureuëng tuha nyang patot-patot dan ureuëng nyang laén nyang na disinan jipeugah
Ruth4:12 Seumoga aneuëk-aneuëk nyang lahé nyang geubri lé Tuhan ubak droeneueh meulalu ureuëng inong muda nyoe teuma jeuet keu keuluwarga droeneueh lagée si Peres
Ruth4:13 Teuma Boas pih laju geucok Rut jeuet keu peurumoh gobnyan. Tuhan geubri beureukat keu Rut sampoe gobnyan mume laju geupeulahé sidroe aneuëk agam.
Ruth4:14 Dumna ureuëng inong jipeugah ubak Naomi
Ruth4:15 Meulintée droeneueh nyan gét that jigaséh keu droeneueh. Gobnyan ka geubri keu droeneueh leubeh nibak peue nyang hase geubri ubak tujoh droe aneuëk agam. Jinoenyoe gobnyan ka teuma geubri sidroe cucoe nyang agam ubak droeneueh
Ruth4:16 Naomi laju geucok aneuëknyan geupeulara laju ngon peunoh gaséh dan sayang.
Ruth4:17 Lé ureuëng inong teutangga gobnyan jiboh nan aneuëk nyan Obed. Ubak soe mantong awaknyan jipeugah
1Samuel1:1 Na sidroe ureuëng agam
1Samuel1:2 Elkana na teuma dua droe purumoh
1Samuel1:3 Tieb-tieb thon Elkana jijak nibak Rama keu geujak meuiébadat di Silo dan geupeuseumah keureubeuen keu Tuhan Nyang Mahakuasa. Nyang jeuet keu teungku imeum Tuhan di Silo na kheueh Hofni dan Pinehas
1Samuel1:4 Tieb-tieb watée meunyoe Elkana geupeuseumah keureubeuen
1Samuel1:5 Teuma Hana geubri bacut mantong sabab Tuhan hana geubri aneuëk keu jih nyan. Bahpi meunan Elkana keubit that-that geucinta keu Hana.
1Samuel1:6 Hana sabe jipeusakét até geuh dan jipeuhina lé Penina
1Samuel1:7 Hainyan teujadi ka meu thon-thon; meunyoe awaknyan geujak u Baét Tuhan
1Samuel1:8 Meunan kheueh tieb-tieb watée teuma Elkana
1Samuel1:9 Bak siuroe óh ka lheueh awaknyan geumakheuen di Baét Tuhan di Silo
1Samuel1:10 
1Samuel1:11 Óh lheuehnyan Hana geupeugah janji
1Samuel1:12 Lumpah treb Hana geumeu doá
1Samuel1:13 Hana geumeu doá didalam até
1Samuel1:14 Dan Eli pi laju geupeugah ubak ureuëng inong nyan
1Samuel1:15 Teuma Hana geujaweueb
1Samuel1:16 Bék kheueh ulôn teuanggab ureuëng inong nyang jeuhet atawa inong jalang. Ulôn meudoá nyang lagée nyoe bagoe sabab ulôn lumpah that seudeh.”
1Samuel1:17 Geupeugah lom lé Eli
1Samuel1:18 Geujaweueb lé Hana
1Samuel1:19 Óh singoh beungoh nyan Elkana dan keuluwarga gobnyan geubeudôh nibak teumpat éh ban bungoh that-that
1Samuel1:20 Inong nyan laju mumé dan geupeulahé sidroe aneuëk agam. Aneuëk nyan geuboh nan Samuel
1Samuel1:21 Trok kheueh watée jih Elkana dan keuluwarga gobnyan geujak u Silo keu geujak peuseumah keureubeuen sithon sigoe keu Tuhan. Seulaén nibak nyan Elkana ka geumeujanji keu geupeuseumah keureubeuen nyang khusos.
1Samuel1:22 Teuma goenyoe Hana hán geuseutôt. Geupeugah ubak lakoe geuh
1Samuel1:23 Geujaweueb lé Elkana
1Samuel1:24 Óh ka lheueh Samuel teupeu cre mik
1Samuel1:25 Leumô nyan laju geusie
1Samuel1:26 Hana geupeugah ubak Eli
1Samuel1:27 Nyoe kheueh aneuëk nyang ulôn lakée ubak Tuhan uroe jéh. Doa ulôn ka geupeutrok lé Gobnyan
1Samuel1:28 dan lé sabab nyan aneuëk nyoe ulôn seurah jeuet keuhak milék Tuhan siumu udeb jih.” Óh lheuehnyan awaknyan laju geuseumayang ubak Tuhan.
1Samuel2:1 Laju Hana geumeudoá
1Samuel2:2 Tanna lé nyang suci nyang lagée Tuhan! Teuma Gobnyan mantong nyang hase geubri peulindongan.
1Samuel2:3 Gata peu-im kheueh haba gata nyang sulet! Bék kheueh tapeugah haba nyang meuhina! Sabab Tuhan nyan na kheueh Po teu Allah nyang keubit áréh; nyang geupeuhakém mandum buet manusia.
1Samuel2:4 Peudeueng panglima ka geupeupatah
1Samuel2:5 Ureuëng nyang dilée troe sabab makmu ngon padé
1Samuel2:6 Tuhan geupeumaté
1Samuel2:7 Na ureuëng nyang geupeu gasien ngon papa
1Samuel2:8 Nibak deurita
1Samuel2:9 Ureuëng nyang seutia bak Gobnyan sabe lam aman dalam lindongan Tuhan. Teuma nyang jeuhet pasti hanco binasa dalam seupôt nyang glab gulita. Teunaga keudroe hana hase teunguile
1Samuel2:10 Dumna musoh Tuhan ka habéh hanco
1Samuel2:11 Laju jijak kheueh Elkana dan keuluwarga jihnyan u Rama
1Samuel2:12 Aneuëk-aneuëk Eli jeuhet-jeuhet that. Awaknyan hana jipako ubak Tuhan
1Samuel2:13 sibagoe teungku imeum awaknyan jimeubuet ban galak droe ateueh bansa Israel. Miseujih na ureuëng jikeuneuk peuseumah keureubeuen
1Samuel2:14 gareupu nyan laju jitôb u dalam panci teumpat uengkot sie nyang teureuboh
1Samuel2:15 Dan kadang-kadang teungku sida nyan teuka keunan sigohlom leumak uengkot sie nyan teupeungkréuh keu teutot
1Samuel2:16 Meunyoe ureuëng nyan jijaweueb
1Samuel2:17 Meunan kheueh cara jih
1Samuel2:18 Óh lheueh nyan
1Samuel2:19 Tieb-tieb sithon ma laju jicob bajée jubah nyang ubiet dan atra nyan jijakjôk laju ubak Samuel meunyoe na gobnyan sajan deungon lakoe ji jiteuka jiujak peuseumah keureubeuen sithon sigoe.
1Samuel2:20 Lé sabab nyan Eli laju geubri beureukat ubak Elkana dan peurumoh gobnyan
1Samuel2:21 Hana laju geujok beureukat lé Po teu Allah
1Samuel2:22 Eli ka tuha that. Gobnyan hana putôh-putôh geudeungoe ureuëng jimeugadu ubak gobnyan keuhai pi-e ngon peurangoe aneuëk-aneuëk gobnyan ateueh ureuëng Israel. Meunan cit Eli geuteupeu bahwa aneuëk-aneuëk geuhnyan ji-éh deungon ureuëng inong nyang jaga pintoe Khimah Tuhan Teuka.
1Samuel2:23 Lé sabab nyan geupeugah kheueh lé Eli ubak aneuëk-aneuëk geuh
1Samuel2:24 Bék gata peubuet nyang meunan le
1Samuel2:25 Meunyoe na ureuëng meusalah teuhadab manusia
1Samuel2:26 Laén hai deungon Samuel
1Samuel2:27 Bak si uroe teuka kheueh sidroe nabi ubak Eli dan geujak peusampoe peusan nibak Tuhan keu gobnyan
1Samuel2:28 Nibak meubagoe sukée Israel ka Ulôn piléh keuluwarga jih nyan jeuet keu teungku imeum Ulôn
1Samuel2:29 Nyang kheueh jeuet
1Samuel2:30 Ulôn
1Samuel2:31 Gata deungoe kheueh nyoe
1Samuel2:32 Gata teuma seudéh dan meurasa cumuru ngon bingiek até watée gata kalon beureukat nyang teuma Ulôn bri keu ureuëng laén di Israel
1Samuel2:33 Teuma
1Samuel2:34 Sibagoe bukeuti bahwa banmandum nyang Ulôn peugah nyan biet-biet teuma teujadi
1Samuel2:35 Óh lheuehnyan Ulôn teuma Lôn piléh teungku imeum nyang seutia keu Ulôn dan jipeubuet peue nyang Ulôn peurintah ubak jih nyan. Keu jihnyan Ulôn bri keuturonan nyang sabe buet jih jimeutugaih sibagoe teungku imeum dikeue raja-raja nyang Ulôn piléh.
1Samuel2:36 Tieb-tieb keuturonan gata nyang mantong udeb
1Samuel3:1 Nibak watée nyan
1Samuel3:2 Bak simalam

1Samuel3:5 Óh lheueh nyan geubeudôh dan laju geuplueng geujak meurumpok ngon Eli dan geupeugah
1Samuel3:6 Óh lheuehnyan Samuel geuhôi lom lé Tuhan
1Samuel3:7 
1Samuel3:8 Keu nyang keu lhée goe Tuhan geuhôi Samuel; lagée biasa geubeudôh laju Samuel geujak meurumpok deungon Eli sira geupeugah
1Samuel3:9 Sabab nyan gobnyan geupeugah ubak Samuel
1Samuel3:10 Óh lheueh nyan teuka kheueh lom Tuhan dan geudong laju diteumpat nyan óh lheuehnyan geuhôi kheueh teuma Samuel
1Samuel3:11 Laju geupeugah lé Tuhan ubak gobnyan
1Samuel3:12 Bak uroenyan Ulôn teuma Lôn peubuet banmandum nyang ka lheueh Ulôn ancam ateueh keuluwarga Eli nibak awai sampoe án akhé.
1Samuel3:13 Ka lheueh Ulôn peugah ubak gobnyan bahwa keuluwarga jihnyan Ulôn huköm siumu masa sabab aneuëk-aneuëk jihnyan ka jihina Ulôn. Eli jiteupeue mandum desya awaknyan
1Samuel3:14 Lé sabab nyan Ulôn meusumpah keuhai keuluwarga Eli nyan
1Samuel3:15 Óh lheuehnyan Samuel geuéh lom
1Samuel3:16 teuma Eli laju geuhôi Samuel dan geupeugah
1Samuel3:17 Eli geutanyong
1Samuel3:18 Dan Samuel geupeugah banmandum nyan ubak Eli. Hana meubacut pi nyang na teusöm. Óh lheueh nyan geupeugah kheueh lé Eli
1Samuel3:19 Samuel ho siuroe meutamah rayeuk. Tuhan sabe na ngon gobnyan dan peue nyang geupeugah lé Samuel keubiet teujadi.
1Samuel3:20 Nyang kheueh sabab jih bubena ureuëng Israel bansaboh nanggroe nyan jimeungaku bahwa Samuel nyan na kheueh nabi Tuhan. Tieb-tieb Samuel geupeugah haba
