Job11:1 Óh lheuehnyan Zofar jipeugah
Job11:2 
Job11:3 Nabi Ayub
Job11:4 Meunurot anggapan gata tutoe haba gata nyan hana salah; meunurot anggapan gata gleh dikeue Po teu Allah.
Job11:5 Teuma
Job11:6 Dan seumoga gata geubri tée lé Gobnyan
Job11:7 Ék kheueh beutôi hakikat Allah hase gata seunom? Ék kheueh beutôi kuasa Gobnyan hase gata peuphom?
Job11:8 Kuasa Gobnyan leubeh manyang nibak angkasa; hana hase gata leugôt atawa gata kareue. Kuasa Gobnyan leubeh lhok nibak donya ureuëng maté
Job11:9 Kuasa Po teu Allah leubeh luwah nibak donya nyoe
Job11:10 Meunyoe Gobnyan geudrob dan geuba gata ubak kantô mahkamah
Job11:11 Po teu Allah geuturi ubak ureuëng nyang galak meusulet; buet jeuhet awaknyan hana leukang nibak mata Gobnyan.
Job11:12 Meunyoe nang keuleudée kleut jipeulahé aneuëk keuleudée seu iet
Job11:13 Nabi Ayub
Job11:14 Peugleh kheueh desya nyang na bak até gata dan peujiôh kheueh buet jeuhet nibak rumoh gata!
Job11:15 Teuma gata jeuet tahadab ubak udeb deungon tabah dan hebat; gata teuma teudong cot dan hana peureulée tarasa apoh apah
Job11:16 meunan cit deurita gata hanale gata ingat; lagée ié raya nyang ka surot
Job11:17 Udeb gata teuma jeuet keu leubeh trang nibak watée uroe
Job11:18 Gata teuma teugoh dan peunoh harapan; Po teu Allah teuma geulindong gata sampoe gata aman.
Job11:19 Gata hana teuma teumakot ubak musoh; jai that ureuëng teuma jilakée tulông ubak gata.
Job11:20 Teuma ureuëng jeuhet jipandang ubak bingöng
Job12:1 Nabi Ayub geujaweueb
Job12:2 
Job12:3 Ulôn pih manusia nyang meubudo basa; banmandum nyang droeneueh peugah nyan ka kamoe muphom. Lom teuma
Job12:4 Ulôn jipeukém lé rakan ngon sahabat
Job12:5 Droeneueh neuhina ureuëng ceulaka
Job12:6 Teuma udeb meurampok hana teuancam; ureuëng nyang jijeuet lawan Po teu Allah
Job12:7 Tanyong kheueh ubak cicém dan beulatang laén teuma droeneueh jibri peungajaran lé jihnyan.
Job12:8 Lakée kheueh keuteurangan ubak makhlok bumoe dan di laôt
Job12:9 Soe nibak mandum nyan nyang hana sada
Job12:10 Gobnyan nyang atoe udeb mandum makhlok nyang na; dan meukuasa ateueh tieb-tieb nyawöng manusia.
Job12:11 Lagée lidah lôn galak lôn rasa peunajoh nyang mangat
Job12:12 Meunurot haba
Job12:13 
Job12:14 Peue nyang geureuloh hana hasele teupeudong lom teuma soe nyang ka teudrob hana hasele teupeuleuh teuma.
Job12:15 Soe nyang lhob ié
Job12:16 Po teu Allah nyan teuga
Job12:17 Geutarek hikeumat ubak peunguasa peumeurintahan
Job12:18 Geuguleng raja dan geuteun awaknyan;
Job12:19 geuhina imeum-imeum dan ureuëng-ureuëng patôt.
Job12:20 Geutôb babah ureuëng faséh bak peugah haba
Job12:21 Geupeumalée ureuëng-ureuëng patôt dan meugah; geucok keudaulatan awaknyan nyang meukuasa.
Job12:22 Geupeutrang teumpat-teumpat nyang suram; geupeukeunong cahya ubak bubayang-bubayang hitam seupôt.
Job12:23 Bansa-bansa geupeujeuet meukeumang dan makmu
Job12:24 Geupeujeuet bubena peumimpén rhot keu bingöng
Job12:25 Awaknyan meugeue-meugeue lam seupôt glab
Job13:1 Banmandum nyan ka lheueh lôn kalon dan lôn deungoe keudroe
Job13:2 Peue nyang droeneueh teupeue
Job13:3 Teuma ulôn keuneuk peugah haba ngon Nyang Mahakuasa; ulôn keuneuk bila peukara ulôn dikeue Po teu Allah.
Job13:4 Sabab droeneueh tatôb-tôb bangai droeneueh nyan deungon tipée muslihat
Job13:5 Seukira jih droeneueh hana tapeugah haba
Job13:6 Lé sababnyan deungoe kheueh bantah ulôn nyoe; kalon kheueh peumbelaan ulôn.
Job13:7 Peu kheueh deumi Allah droeneueh meusulet? Peu kheueh jeuet droeneueh meusulet keu keupeuntengan Gobnyan?
Job13:8 Peu kheueh jeuet droeneueh dong blah Po teu Allah
Job13:9 Meunyoe Po teu Allah geupareksa droeneueh
Job13:10 Meunyoe droeneueh dong siblah
Job13:11 Peu kheueh keuagongan Po teu Allah hana teukeujôt jiwa droeneueh? Peu kheueh deungon dahsyat Geuhnyan hana yo até droeneueh?
Job13:12 Banmandum naseuhat droeneueh lagée abée nyang hana meuguna; peumbelaan droeneueh lagée tanoh lumpôk nyang bagaih beukah.
Job13:13 Lé sababnyan seungab kheueh
Job13:14 Ulôn ka siab lôn peusabông nyawöng!
Job13:15 Ulôn neukad sabab ka putôh asa! Meunyoe Po teu Allah keuneuk poh maté lôn
Job13:16 Mungken lé sabab beurani ulôn nyan ulôn seulamat
Job13:17 Jinoenyoe deungoe kheueh beuget-get tutoe haba lôn; simak kheueh nyang ulôn peutrang.
Job13:18 Peukara ka siab ulôn peutrok ubak kantô peungadelan; ulôn yakén
Job13:19 Tuhan
Job13:20 Teuma teurimong kheueh dua boh nyang ulôn lakée nyoe
Job13:21 piôh kheueh Neuseksa ulôn
Job13:22 Mariet kheueh
Job13:23 Padub na salah dan desya nyang ulôn peubuet? Banmandum nyang ulôn langgeh bah kheueh Droeneueh peugah!
Job13:24 Pakon Droeneueh peusie dan Neupeujiôh droe nibak ulôn? Peue sabab jih Droeneueh anggab ulôn nyoe sibagoe musoh Droeneueh?
Job13:25 Ulôn na kheueh ôn nyang lurôh lé sabab angén teuka
Job13:26 Droeneueh peuteuntée naseb nyang phet keu ulôn; Droeneueh balaih salah ulôn watée ulôn mantong muda.
Job13:27 Gaki ulôn Droeneueh ikat ngon ranté beuso; banmandum grak grik ulôn Droeneueh kawai. Meunan cit tapak gaki lôn
Job13:28 Lé sababnyan ulôn jeuet keurapôh lagée kayée nyang brôk; lagée ija jipajoh lé keuraleub
Job14:1 Yoh phon lahé manusia nyan leumoh hana meudaya; udeb jih paneuk dan peunoh ngon deurita.
Job14:2 Jihnyan meukeumang dan layée lagée bungöng; gadôh lagée bubayang
Job14:3 Ya Allah
Job14:4 Peu kheueh meuteumé manusia nyang meudesya jipeuteuka hai nyang sampoereuna?
Job14:5 Jeumeulah umu manusia ka Droeneueh peuteuntée; jeumeulah buleuen jih ka Droeneueh peupasti. Droeneueh peuteutab teuma bataih-bataih udeb jih; hana mungken jiliengkeue lé jihnyan.
Job14:6 Peubiyeu mantong kheueh jihnyan meureuhat
Job14:7 Mantong na harapan keu bak kayée nyang teuteubang; bak kayée nyan meutarôk lom
Job14:8 Bahpi lam tanoh ukeue jih jeuet keuleupôk
Job14:9 teuma meunyoe keunong ié
Job14:10 Teuma meunyoe manusia maté
Job14:11 Lagée ié meuasab didalam mon
Job14:12 meunan cit teuma manusia nyang ka meuninggai donya: jihnyan hana hase jibeudôh lom teuma. Jihnyan hana jaga meunyoe langet mantong na
Job14:13 Som kheueh lôn nibak donya ureuëng maté; lindong kheueh ulôn sampoe Droeneueh hana beungéh le. Teuma peuteuntée kheueh watée keu teuingat droe ulôn.
Job14:14 Sabab
Job14:15 Teuma Droeneueh Neutawök ulôn
Job14:16 Laju Neukawai tieb-tieb langkah lôn
Job14:17 Desya ulôn teuma Droeneueh peuamphon dan Droeneueh böih; salah ulôn yoh watée ilée teuma Droeneueh sampôh.
Job14:18 Teuma
Job14:19 Batée-batée teuma jikreh habéh lé ié nyang ile tajam; tanoh teuma jipeuhanyot lé ujeuen nyang teuga. Meunan kheueh Droeneueh peuhanco harapan manusia.
Job14:20 Droeneueh peutaloe jihnyan keu siumu masa; Droeneueh yue jihnyan beujijak dan Droeneueh ubah ruman jih.
Job14:21 Aneuëk-aneuëk jihnyan jeuet keu ureuëng mulia
Job14:22 Teuma linu-linu tuboh geuhnyan nyang geurasa; teuma seudeh até geuh nyang geudeurita.”
Job15:1 Teuma Elifas geujaweueb
Job15:2 Hana ureuëng bijaksana nyang jaweueb lagée gata nyoe
Job15:3 
Job15:4 Seukira jih haba gata nyan teuseutôt
Job15:5 Tutoe haba gata jeuet keu bukeuti bahwa gata meusalah
Job15:6 Hana peureulée gata lôn tudôh atawa lôn peusalah
Job15:7 Gata pike gata manusia nyang phon teupeulahé? Peu kheueh na teuka watée gunong-gunong teucebta?
Job15:8 Peu kheueh gata deungoe Po teu Allah geupeuget reuncana Gobnyan? Peu kheueh teuma gata nyang na hikeumat manusia?
Job15:9 Peue-peue nyang gata teupeue
Job15:10 Hikeumat nyoe kamoe teurimong nibak ureuëng nyang ka putéh ôk; awaknyan ka na sigohlom ayah gata teupeulahé!
Job15:11 Pakon hiboran Po teu Allah hana gata teurimong? Kamoe meututoe deungon saba dan leumoh leumbot ateueh nan Gobnyan.
Job15:12 Teuma gata ka jiék peuneng
Job15:13 gata beungéh ubak Po teu Allah dan gata bantah Gobnyan.
Job15:14 Peu kheueh mungken manusia sagai-sagai hana meusalah? Peu kheueh jihnyan jeuet teupeubeutôi dikeue Po teu Allah?
Job15:15 Meunan cit ubak malaikat pih Po teu Allah hana peucaya; awaknyan hana suci nibak keumalon Gobnyan.
Job15:16 Meunyoe manusia nyang jeuhet dan teunoda
Job15:17 Deungon Nabi Ayub
Job15:18 nyang jipeurunoe lé ureuëng bijaksana ubak ulôn. Ajaran nyang jiteurimong nibak indatu jih
Job15:19 Watée nyan hana ureuëng jamé di nanggroe awaknyan; hana nyang peusisat awaknyan nibak Po teu Allah.
Job15:20 Ureuëng jeuhet nyang jitindéeh seusabe droe jih
Job15:21 Su-su nyang geureudam geureudum keubiet teupeutuloe punyueng awaknyan; watée saát nyang aman peurampok teuka jijak heuntam awaknyan.
Job15:22 Hana harapan nibak awaknyan jipeusie nibak seupôt
Job15:23 Cicém-cicém nasar jipreh-preh watée awaknyan maté
Job15:24 Beuncana lagée raja nyang peukasa
Job15:25 Meunan kheueh naseb ureuëng nyang lawan Po teu Allah
Job15:26 Deungon sombong jihnyan jiseureubu dan jilawan Po teu Allah; laju jibeuôt peurisée jih
Job15:27 
Job15:28 Jihnyan tinggai di banda-banda nyang ka hanco keng keueng
Job15:29 Keukayaan ureuëng nyan teuma gadôh hana meubeukaih; hareuta beunda jih teuma habéh gleh sapan sapa.
Job15:30 Jihnyan hana teuhinda nibak seupôt nyang gulita; apui laju jipeuhangoh tarôk-tarôk jih. Jihnyan teuma hanco watée geuplôh ngon babah Po teu Allah.
Job15:31 Meunyoe jihnyan peucaya ubak nyang hana meuguna
Job15:32 Sigohlom trok watée jih
Job15:33 Jihnyan lagée bak anggô nyang lurôh boh jih
Job15:34 Ureuëng nyang jeuhet hana keuturonan; dan habéh tutông kheueh rumoh nyang jipeudong nibak hase péng sugok.
Job15:35 Nyan kheueh awaknyan nyang jireuncana buet jeuhet dan jipeubuet teuma; tipée muslihat sabe na teukandong lam até jih.”
Job16:1 Teuma Nabi Ayub geujaweueb
Job16:2 
Job16:3 Pajan kheueh haba sulet nyan droeneueh piôh? Peue nyang jeuet keurangsangan droeneueh nyang jeuet teujaweueb?
Job16:4 Seukira jih droeneueh nyan ulôn
Job16:5 Até gata teuma lôn peukong deungon meubagoe anjuran; tutoe haba ulôn teuma teubri hiboran.
Job16:6 Meunyoe ulôn peugah haba
Job16:7 Po teu Allah
Job16:8 Gobnyan geuteuntang dan geudrob ulôn. Jinoenyoe
Job16:9 Deungon beungéh Po teu Allah geupriek-priek tuboh lôn; deungon biet-biet banci Gobnyan geupandang ulôn.
Job16:10 Ureuëng-ureuëng jihina ulôn deungon babah teuhah raya-raya; ulôn jiparan dan mieng ulôn jitampa.
Job16:11 Po teu Allah geujôk ulôn ubak ureuëng doraka; ulôn geupeurhot lam jaroe ureuëng doraka.
Job16:12 Yoh awai ilée udeb lôn teuntram dan bahgia
Job16:13 Deungon hana weueh Gobnyan hana piôh geutimbak ulôn ngon panah
Job16:14 Gobnyan geuseureubu lagée sidroe peujuang
Job16:15 Ulôn sok ija kröng sibagoe tanda seudeh
Job16:16 Ruman lôn mirah sabab lôn mo; peuleupuk mata lôn keumong dan ijo.
Job16:17 Teuma ulôn hana lôn peubuet nyang kreueh; deungon nyan trang kheueh doá lôn jujoe ubak Tuhan.
Job16:18 Hei bumoe
Job16:19 Ulôn kuteupeue bahwa Nyang Bila ulôn na lam syeuruga; Gobnyan geubri keusaksian bahwa ulôn hana meudesya.
Job16:20 Ulôn jihina lé rakan-rakan lôn dan jipeukém; sira ulôn mo lôn meuhadab ubak Po teu Allah lôn lakée tulông.
Job16:21 Akh
Job16:22 Thon-thon nyang na tinggai hanale; sikeujab treuk ulôn jak dan hana lôn woe le.
Job17:1 Ajai lôn katoe that
Job17:2 Ureuëng laén jipeujeuet ulôn nyoe barang keu jipeukém; ulôn kalon padubna awaknyan jigeulawa ateueh ulôn haba meupansi.
Job17:3 Ulôn nyoe jujoe
Job17:4 Droeneueh tôb até awaknyan sampoe hana jeuet jimeuphom; bék sampoe awaknyan jipeutaklok ulôn jinoenyoe.
Job17:5 Meunurot peupatah
Job17:6 Jinoenyoe ulôn jipansi ngon peupatah nyan; awaknyan teuka keujijak ludah muka ulôn.
Job17:7 Mata ulôn sapu sabab meudukacita; bansaboh tuboh lôn pijuet meurana.
Job17:8 Ureuëng nyang saleh teukeujôt dan hireuen; ureuëng nyang hana meusalah jianggab ulôn hana meutuhan.
Job17:9 Ureuëng nyang jroh dan nyang hana meusalah
Job17:10 Teuma seukira jih gata mandum teuka keunoe
Job17:11 Uroe-uroe lôn ka jijak laju
Job17:12 Teuma rakan-rakan lôn jipeugah
Job17:13 Teuma donya mawöt kheueh nyang ulôn harab
Job17:14 Kubu ulôn lôn boh nan “Ayah lôn”
Job17:15 Dipat kheueh harapan keu lôn; soe nyang kalon na bahgia keu ulôn?
Job17:16 Meunyoe ulôn kutreun lam donya ureuëng maté
Job18:1 Teuma geujaweueb lé Bildad
Job18:2 
Job18:3 Pakon gata anggab kamoe bangai
Job18:4 Beungéh gata teupeusakét droeneueh keudroe. Peu kheueh harôh deumi keupeuntengan gata nyan bumoe gadôh peunduduek jih
Job18:5 Panyöt ureuëng jeuhet pasti teupeulon; apui jih hántom nale teupeuhu.
Job18:6 Trang lam khimah jihnyan ka jeuet keu layoh; panyöt ngon peutrang nyan hanale hu meuble.
Job18:7 Langkah jihnyan nyang teugab jeuet teuhuyong-huyong; rancangan jihnyan keudroe jeuet keu sabab jihnyan meugantoh.
Job18:8 Jihnyan jijak lam taron
Job18:9 Tumet jih meucarueh ngon jeunieb
Job18:10 Bak tanoh
Job18:11 Ureuëng jjeuhet teupeukeujot lé gli nyang teuka jeueb-jeueb sagoe; teumakot jiseutôt jih langkah deumi langkah.
Job18:12 Yoh ilée jihnyan teuga
Job18:13 Kulét jih ka jipajoh lé peunyakét nyang paleng parah; jaroe ngon gaki jih kabrok meunanoh.
Job18:14 Jihnyan teucok lam khimah jih
Job18:15 Jinoe soe mantong jeuet tinggai lam khimah jih
Job18:16 Ukeue-ukeue jih tho kreng dan krôt-krôt; ranteng-ranteng jih tho dan keunyuét.
Job18:17 Jihnyan hanale gob uturi bah didalam meunan cit diluwa banda; hana meusidroe pih nyang mantong ingat nan jih.
Job18:18 Lam trang jihnyan teu-use lam seupôt; lam donya ureuëng udeb jihnyan teukireuh teuma.
Job18:19 Aneuëk meunan cit keuturonan nibak jihnyan hana; di gampông leuen jih hana meusidroe pih nyang tinggai.
Job18:20 Watée teudeungoe naseb jih
Job18:21 Meunan kheueh naseb ureuëng doraka
Job19:1 Teuma Nabi Ayub geujaweueb
Job19:2 
Job19:3 Neu-ulang-ulang gata tahina ulôn
Job19:4 Meunyoe bit salah buet ulôn
Job19:5 Gata pike droe gata leubeh get nibak ulôn; sosah ulônnyoe gata anggab nyan bukeuti ulôn salah.
Job19:6 Neuteupeue kheueh bahwa ulôn nyoe teungoh geuseksa lé Po teu Allah dan geudrob lam jeunieb Gobnyan.
Job19:7 Ulôn meulawan-lawan sabab keujam nyan
Job19:8 Po teu Allah geutôb rot ulôn
Job19:9 Gobnyan geureupah mandum atra ulôn
Job19:10 Gobnyan geuheuntam ulôn rot meubagoe jurosan
Job19:11 Meureuka Po teu Allah ateueh ulôn hu meuhuéb-huéb; ulôn geuanggab lagée musoh Gobnyan.
Job19:12 Pasokan Gobnyan jiseureubu hana hase teuampeueng; rot ulôn jak geuhalang-halang
Job19:13 Kawöm syedara lôn geupeujiôh nibak ulôn; ulôn jeuet keu ureuëng aséng nibak mandum rakan lôn.
Job19:14 Kawöm dan rakan lôn mandum jipeujiôh droe; rakan-rakan lôn hana jiingat le ubak ulôn.
Job19:15 Namiet ulôn nyang inong ka tuwoe
Job19:16 Ulôn tawök namiet lôn
Job19:17 Peurumoh lôn luwat jicöm nafáh nyan
Job19:18 Ulôn jihina lé aneuëk miet bak rot ueh raya; meunyoe ulôn dong
Job19:19 Jingieng ulôn
Job19:20 Tuboh lôn tinggai kulét ngon balot tuleueng; rab mantong ulôn maté dan nyawöng lôn meulayang.
Job19:21 Hei rakan-rakan lôn
Job19:22 Po teu Allah hana putôh geuteugon ulôn; pakon gata taseutôt Gobnyan? Peu kheueh gohlom puih gata taseksa?
Job19:23 Ah
Job19:24 kirajih deungon beuso teupheut ateueh batée
Job19:25 Ulôn kuteupeue bahwa lam syeuruga na nyang bila lôn; akhé jih Gobnyan teuka geujak tulông lôn.
Job19:26 Bahpi kulét lôn luka-luka dan bicah
Job19:27 Deungon mata lôn keudroe Gobnyan teuma lôn kalon
Job19:28 ‘Pakriban cara jih tanyoe peudakwa jihnyan?’ Gata neumita alasan keu gata mita peukara.
Job19:29 Teuma
Job20:1 Laju geujaweueb lé Zofar
Job20:2 
Job20:3 Tutoe haba gata nyan biet-biet meuhina that
Job20:4 Peu kheueh hana gata teupeue bahwa phon bak jamén purbakala
Job20:5 mangat até ureuëng jeuhet teuma sikeujab mantong
Job20:6 Bahpi keubeusaran jih trok u langet ijo
Job20:7 teuma jihnyan teutab gadôh siumu masa
Job20:8 Jihnyan teuma gadôh lagée bubayang lumpo
Job20:9 Jihnyan hana deuhle bak mata; jihnyan hanale tinggai bak teumpat jih.
Job20:10 Nyang yoh ilée jicue nibak ureuëng nyang hana sapeue na harôh jigantoe lé aneuëk-aneuëk jih.
Job20:11 Bahpi jihnyan muda dan peukasa
Job20:12 Keubiet that maméh jeuhet nyang na lam babah jih! Rasa jih sayang that keu teu uét deungon sigra; sababnyan jikeubah mantong yueb lidah jih
Job20:13 
Job20:14 Teuma peunajoh nyan meu-ubah lam pruet
Job20:15 Atra jih cue nyang jiuét nyan
Job20:16 Ureuëng jeuhet teuma jijieb racon nyang ba beuncana
Job20:17 Hana jiteumé rasa minyéuk zaiton nyang meunanle meulimpah
Job20:18 Banmandum laba jih harôh jijôk pulang; hase useuha jih hana teuma jirasa.
Job20:19 Sabab jihnyan jitindéeh dan hana jikalon ban ureuëng nyang gasien; dan jireupah rumoh-rumoh nyang kon jipeudong.
Job20:20 Sabab waba jih hana meubataih le
Job20:21 Meunyoe jihnyan jimakheun banmandum jipeuhabéh
Job20:22 Watée ka trok bak punca makmu lam udeb jih
Job20:23 Watée jihnyan gabuek jipasoe pruet jih
Job20:24 Meunyoe jihnyan jiplueng jipeusie nibak peudeueng baja
Job20:25 Jihnyan keunong aneuk panah
Job20:26 Hanco kheueh bubena hareuta nyang ka jikeubah; jihnyan meusajan mandum keuluwarga jih jipajoh lé apui nyang hana jipeuhu lé manusia.
Job20:27 Langét laju jisengkab buet jih nyang jeuhet; bumoe jibeudôh jilawan jihnyan.
Job20:28 Banmandum atra keukayaan jih habéh meuseunah
Job20:29 Nyan kheueh naseb ureuëng nyang durjana
Job21:1 Nabi Ayub geujaweueb
Job21:2 
Job21:3 Idhin kheueh ulôn keugantoe peugah haba
Job21:4 Kon ngon manusia ulôn meudakwa
Job21:5 Pandang kheueh ulôn
Job21:6 Meunyoe lôn pike keuadaan ulôn nyoe
Job21:7 Pakon ureuëng jeuhet geubri umu jih panyang le Po teu Allah
Job21:8 Awaknyan udeb keubiet that treb seuhingga jikalon aneuëk cucoe awaknyan ka jeuet keu rayeuk.
Job21:9 Rumoh tangga awaknyan aman seuntosa; Po teu Allah hana geupeutreun beuncana ateueh awaknyan.
Job21:10 Beulatang peulara awaknyan meukeumang le
Job21:11 Aneuëk-aneuëk ureuëng jeuhet jilumpat-lumpat deungon geumbira
Job21:12 Jiseutôt lé su rapa-i
Job21:13 Uroe-uroe jih jipeuhabéh lam keubahgiaan
Job21:14 Padahai awaknyan jipeugah ubak Po teu Allah
Job21:15 Jipike lé awaknyan
Job21:16 Bukon lé sabab teunaga tanyoe mantong
Job21:17 Peu kheueh ka lheueh panyöt ureuëng jeuhet teupeulon
Job21:18 Peu kheueh ka lheueh awaknyan lagée jeumpung dan abée nyang jiyueb lé angén badée dan angén jak?
Job21:19 Droeneueh neupeugah
Job21:20 Bah kheueh ureuëng meudesya jitanggong desya jih keudroe
Job21:21 Meunyoe manusia ka habéh watée jih udeb ateueh rhueng donya
Job21:22 Peu kheueh hase manusia jipeurunoe Po teu Allah
Job21:23 Na ureuëng nyang seuhat sipanyang udeb jih; jihnyan meuninggai deungon rasa puih dan leuga. Maté jih teunang deungon rasa bahgia
Job21:24 
Job21:25 Teuma na cit nyang maté peunoh ngon phet
Job21:26 Teuma lam jrat
Job21:27 Beutôi ulôn kuteupeue peue nyang droeneueh pike dan mandum buet jeuhet nyang droeneueh reuncana.
Job21:28 Droeneueh tanyong
Job21:29 Gohlom droeneueh tanyong bak ureuëng nyang kayém jijak-jak? Peu kheueh hana droeneueh pateh haba nyang awaknyan peugah?
Job21:30 Kheun awaknyan
Job21:31 Hana nyang peumasa-alah pi-e jihnyan; hana nyang balaih buet jih nyang jeuhet nyan.
Job21:32 Jihnyan teuba ubak jrat
Job21:33 Meuribée ureuëng ji-iréng manyét jihnyan ubak kubu; deungon meulet-meulet tanoh pih teuseubée jihnyan.
Job21:34 Lé sababnyan
Job22:1 Laju geupeugah kheueh lé Elifas
Job22:2 
Job22:3 Peu kheueh na guna jih nibak Po teu Allah
Job22:4 Kon lé sabab teumakot gata ubak Po teu Allah
Job22:5 teuma lé sabab jai that-that desya gata
Job22:6 Meunyoe syedara gata hana hase jibayeue utang jih
Job22:7 Ureuëng nyang hék hana gata bri ié jieb
Job22:8 Gata peuguna jabatan dan kuasa keu gata seta banmandum tanoh jih.
Job22:9 Bukon mantong gata hana tatulông inong-inong balée
Job22:10 Lé sababnyan bansikeulileng gata
Job22:11 Uroe seumaken seupôt
Job22:12 Bukon kheueh Po teu Allah geutinggai bak langét nyang paleng manyang
Job22:13 Teuma digata tatanyong
Job22:14 Gata tapike bahwa pandangan Gobnyan teutôb ngon awan dan bahwa teuma nibak bataih lamkawan langét ngon bumoe Gobnyan geujak?
Job22:15 Peu kheueh gata teutab keuneuk jak rot ueh nyang ka jipiléh lé ureuëng-ureuëng jeuhet?
Job22:16 Awaknyan teucok sigohlom trok watée jih maté
Job22:17 Awaknyan kheueh nyang jijeuet tulak Po teu Allah Nyang Mahakuasa
Job22:18 Padahai Po teu Allah nyang ka peujeuet awaknyan kaya! Keubiet ulôn hana muphom pikeran ureuëng doraka!
Job22:19 Ureuëng nyang jroh
Job22:20 Banmandum atra ureuëng jeuhet ka hanco sapan sapa
Job22:21 Nyan
Job22:22 Teurimong kheueh peue nyang geupeurunoe lé Tuhan ubak gata; keubah kheueh mandum nyan lam até gata.
Job22:23 Woe kheueh ubak Tuhan deungon miyueb até nyang jeuhet nyang na lam rumoh gata bah kheueh gata sampôh.
Job22:24 Böih kheueh méuh gata nyang paleng aseuli; rhom kheueh lam tuwie krueng nyang hana lé meu ié.
Job22:25 Bah kheueh Nyang Mahakuasa jeuet keu méuh gata
Job22:26 Lé sababnyan gata jeuet peucaya ubak Po teu Allah
Job22:27 Meunyoe gata meudoá
Job22:28 Useuha gata teuma sabe meuhase
Job22:29 Ureuëng nyang sombong geupeumiyueb lé Tuhan
Job22:30 Po teu Allah teuma geutulông gata meunyoe gata hana meusalah
Job23:1 Teuma Nabi Ayub geujaweueb
Job23:2 
Job23:3 Ah
Job23:4 Dan ubak Gobnyan peukara lôn nyoe ulôn peuhadab
Job23:5 Ulôn keuneuk lôn teupeue peue nyang geupeugah
Job23:6 Peu kheueh Gobnyan geupeudeuh kuasa Gobnyan ateueh ulôn? Hana! Gobnyan pasti geudeungoe tutoe haba lôn.
Job23:7 Ulôn hana meusalah dan hase lôn bila droe dikeue Gobnyan
Job23:8 Ulôn mita Po teu Allah
Job23:9 
Job23:10 Teuma Gobnyan geuteupeue banmandum rot ulôn meunan cit tieb-tieb langkah lôn. Meunyoe lagée méuh ulôn geu-ujoe
Job23:11 Ulôn taát ubak Gobnyan deungon seutia; hántomna ulôn meusimpang nibak rot nyang ka geupeuteuntée.
Job23:12 Peurintah-peurintah Po teu Allah sabe ulôn taát
Job23:13 Po teu Allah nyan hana meu-ubah; hana nyang hase jilawan Gobnyan. Gobnyan geupeubuet peue nyang geumeuhéut.
Job23:14 Gobnyan teuma geupeujak reuncana Gobnyan keu ulôn
Job23:15 Sabab teumakot ubak Gobnyan
Job23:16 Nyang Mahakuasa geupeuhanco banmandum keubeuranian ulôn. Ulôn teumakot lé sabab Po teu Allah
Job23:17 
Job24:1 Pakon Po teu Allah hana geupeuteutab uroe peusidangan
Job24:2 Na ureuëng nyang jigéesée tanda bataih
Job24:3 Keuleudée atra aneuëk yatem ngon meuntui awaknyan baplueng; leumô sidroe inong balée
Job24:4 Awaknyan jipagab ureuëng gasien mangat jiteumé jeumba
Job24:5 Nyang
Job24:6 Blang ureuëng laén teupaksa awaknyan peubuet; boh anggô ureuëng jeuhet teupaksa awaknyan peusapat.
Job24:7 Jihnyan hana ija seulimbot dan peukayan ngon peuseu-uem tuboh óh watée malam.
Job24:8 Jihnyan basah lé ujeuen raya sideh di gunong
Job24:9 Ureuëng jeuhet jicok keu namiet aneuëk nyang hana ma ngon yah
Job24:10 Ureuëng gasien jijak ngon hana sapeue na; jihnyan deuek teungoh jipot boh gandom lam blang.
Job24:11 Nibak zaiton jihnyan jipeugot minyéuk
Job24:12 Di banda-banda teudeungoe su ureuëng aloh alah nyang ka payah that
Job24:13 Na ureuëng nyang jitulak trang dan jicok keu musoh
Job24:14 Óh watée seuboh tukang poh maté gob jibeudôh nibak teumpat éh jih
Job24:15 Ureuëng peubuet mukah jipreh-preh teuka watée seunja; laju jingui tutôb muka mangat gob hana jituri jihnyan.
Job24:16 Pancuri jibongka rumoh óh watée malam; óh watée uroe jipeusie nibak peungéueh dan jijak musöm.
Job24:17 Nibak jih
Job24:18 Laju geupeugah lé Zofar
Job24:19 Lagée salju teusampôh lé keunong musém khueng dan mata uroe
Job24:20 Ma jih keudroe geutuwoe ubak jih
Job24:21 Banmandum nyan jeuet na sabab jih nyan jitindéeh inong-inong balée
Job24:22 Teuma Po teu Allah
Job24:23 Po teu Allah geubri jih udeb aman seuntosa
Job24:24 Teuma sikeujab jihnyan udeb bahgia
Job24:25 Soe kheueh nyang hase jibantah keunyataan nyan
Job25:1 Laju Bildad jijaweueb
Job25:2 
Job25:3 Peu kheueh hase teuitong malaikat nyang peutimang Gobnyan? Peu kheueh na teumpat nyang hana keunong ngon cahya Gobnyan?
Job25:4 Peu kheueh mungken manusia suci dikeue Po teu Allah? Mungken kheueh jihnyan aseuli nibak pandangan Gobnyan?
Job25:5 Nibak Po teu Allah
Job25:6 Peue lom manusia
Job26:1 Teuma Nabi Ayub geupeugah
Job26:2 
Job26:3 Keubiet diet that naseuhat dan ajarannyan nyang ka droeneueh bri ubak ulôn
Job26:4 Ubak soe kheueh haba droeneueh nyan teutuju? Soe nyang bri ilham droeneueh keu neumeututoe meunan bagoe?”
Job26:5 Jaweueb Bildad
Job26:6 Dikeue Po teu Allah
Job26:7 Po teu Allah geuleueng langét
Job26:8 Geupasoe lam awan ngon ié nyang meulimpah-limpah
Job26:9 Geusöm ruman buleuen pernama di meurandeh awan nyang ka geuleueng nyan.
Job26:10 Geugamba gareh meulingka ateueh muka laôt keu teupeu aséng trang nibak seupôt.
Job26:11 Meunyoe Gobnyan geudumpek ngon su nyang meutaga
Job26:12 Laôt raya geupeutaklok lé kuasa Gobnyan dan Rahab pih jipeurunoe lé carông Gobnyan.
Job26:13 Nafáh Gobnyan teusampôh langét sampoe gleh lagoena; jaroe Gobnyan geupoh naga nyang rab jiplueng.
Job26:14 Teuma mandum nyan sibagoe tanda kuasa Gobnyan; teuma haba meusáh-sáh nyang trok bak geulinyueng tanyoe Padubna nit peungeurtian tanyoe keuhai Po teu Allah dan hebat jih kuasa Gobnyan!”
Job27:1 Nabi Ayub geupeugah lom haba geuh
Job27:2 
Job27:3 ulôn meusumpah: Simantong Po teu Allah geubri nafáh keu ulôn
Job27:4 bibi ulôn hana lôn peugah haba nyang sulet
Job27:5 Lé sababnyan
Job27:6 Ulôn teutab lôn mumat ubak patuh ulôn
Job27:7 Seumoga musoh ulôn geuhuköm sibagoe nyang doraka
Job27:8 Peu kheueh na harapan keu ureuëng dursila bak watée Po teu Allah geutuntot jiwa jih?
Job27:9 Peu kheueh Po teu Allah geudeungoe su mo jih watée keusosahan rhot ateueh jih?
Job27:10 Nyang sikeubiet jih jihnyan jimeucen that ubak keuseunangan nibak Po teu Allah
Job27:11 Gata teuma lôn peurunoe keuhai padubna rayeuk jih kuasa Allah
Job27:12 Teuma
Job27:13 Dan geupeugah kheueh lé Zofar
Job27:14 Meunyoe aneuëk jih le
Job27:15 Syedara jih nyang mantong na
Job27:16 Jeuet mantong pirak jih meutamon-tamon dan peukayan jih meususon-suson
Job27:17 teuma pirak dan peukayan nyan banmandum teuma jeuet keu hak milék ureuëng nyang jujoe até jih.
Job27:18 Rumoh ureuëng jeuhet leumpôk lagée eumpueng rambideuen
Job27:19 Jihnyan jipeureubah droe lagée ureuëng kaya
Job27:20 Keudahsyatan rhot lagée ié raya nyang teuka hana teusangka-sangka. Angén badée óh malam teuka laju jiyueb dan jitarek jihnyan mangat jijak.
Job27:21 Angén timu jibeuôt jihnyan
Job27:22 Jihnyan jipeuron ngon hana rasa gaséh
Job27:23 Reubah jih laju jisambot lé gob sira jipéh-péh jaroe; dipat mantong jihnyan meuteumé peuhinaan.”
Job28:1 Na teumpat tambang pirak nibak teumpat nyan pirak jiteumé; na teumpat méuh teupeugleh sampoe aseuli.
Job28:2 Beuso teukueh nibak lam tanoh; nibak batée teupeuliléeh teumaga.
Job28:3 Seupôt buta nyan meuhase jijak
Job28:4 Jiôh nibak teumpat nyang hana ureuëng duek
Job28:5 Tanoh jipeuhase peunajoh keu manusia
Job28:6 Batée lam tanoh na meungandong nilakandi
Job28:7 Cicém kleung hana jituri rot jak keudeh
Job28:8 Gohlom na singa atawa beulatang laén jijak rot seungue nyang teutuju keudeh.
Job28:9 Ureuëng jikueh lam batée nyang padubna pih kreueh jih
Job28:10 Watée jihnyan jipeuget rot peureulong lam gunong batée
Job28:11 Trok ubak asai mata ié jihnyan jikueh
Job28:12 Teuma dipat kheueh hikeumat nyang hase jimita? Dipat kheueh tanyoe jeuet tameurunoe mangat tanyoe muphom?
Job28:13 Hikeumat hana nibak teungoh-teungoh manusia; hana nyang teupeuyuem jih nyang sikeubiet jih.
Job28:14 Tuwie-tuwie laôt dan samudra jipeugah bahwa hikeumat hana bak jihnyan.
Job28:15 Hikeumat hana hase teutuka bahpi deungon méuh aseuli
Job28:16 Méuh dan peumata nyang paleng meuyuém hana hase jeuet keusaban yuem jih.
Job28:17 Méuh atawa ceureumén hana hase jeuet keubandengan jih
Job28:18 Hikeumat jiôh leubeh manyang yuem jih nibak merjan
Job28:19 Batée topas nyang aseuli atawa méuh nyang aseuli
Job28:20 Dipat kheueh uboejih keubijaksanaan? Dipat kheueh geutanyoe hase tateumé peungeurtian?
Job28:21 Hana makhlok udeb nyang ka lheueh jikalon atra nyan
Job28:22 Mawöt dan binasa pih jipeugah
Job28:23 Teuma Po teu Allah nyang teupeue dipat hikeumat nyan na
Job28:24 sabab Gobnyan geukalon ujong-ujong bumoe; peue-peue mantong dimiyueb langét Gobnyan peurati.
Job28:25 Watée ubak angén geujôk teunaga
Job28:26 watée geupeuteuntée teumpat ujeuen jitreun
Job28:27 bak watéenyan kheueh hikeumat geukalon
Job28:28 Po teu Allah meufeureuman ubak manusia
Job29:1 Nabi Ayub geupeugah keuhai droe gobnyan
Job29:2 “Kira jih udeb lôn jeuet lom lagée yoh awai ilée
Job29:3 Ulôn sabe geubri sinulông
Job29:4 Nyan kheueh uroe-uroe keujayaan ulôn
Job29:5 Watée nyan Nyang Mahakuasa mantong geudampeng ulôn
Job29:6 Beulatang peulara lôn jai that jipeuhase susu. Jai that minyéuk jipeuhase lé bak-bak zaiton
Job29:7 Meunyoe ureuëng-ureuëng patot lam banda geuduek meusajan
Job29:8 jisurot kheueh ureuëng-ureuëng muda
Job29:9 Meunan cit ureuëng-ureuëng rayeuk geupiôh geupeugah haba
Job29:10 dan ureuëng peunteng pi hana geupeugah haba.
Job29:11 Soe mantong hireuen that meunyoe jideungoe keuhai ulôn; soe nyang kalon ulôn
Job29:12 Sabab
Job29:13 Ulôn jipujoe lé ureuëng nyang keubit that sosah
Job29:14 Nyang ulôn peubuet nyan jujoe hana meucupa; ulôn peudong keuadelan dipat mantong na.
Job29:15 Keu ureuëng buta
Job29:16 Keu ureuëng gasien
Job29:17 Teuma kuasa ureuëng keujam
Job29:18 Harapan ulôn na kheueh meuteumé umu nyang panyang
Job29:19 Ulôn lagée bak kayée nyang udeb jih suboe dan timoh get
Job29:20 Ulôn sabe jipujoe lé mandum ureuëng
Job29:21 Ureuëng-ureuëng mandum seungab
Job29:22 Óh ka lheueh ulôn peugah haba
Job29:23 Banmandum ureuëng jisambot tutoe haba lôn deungon peunoh geumbira
Job29:24 Ulôn teuseunyum ubak awaknyan watée awaknyan putôh asa; ié muka lôn nyang bahgia teutamah seumangat awaknyan.
Job29:25 Ulôn kheueh nyang mat pimpénan
Job30:1 Teuma jinoe ulôn jihina lé ureuëng nyang leubeh muda. Yoh watée ilée ureuëng syiek awaknyan ulôn ngieng hina keu jirabe bubiri lôn meusajan asée meurabe.
Job30:2 Nibak ulôn awaknyan hana meuguna sabab ka habéh teunaga.
Job30:3 Awaknyan duek dan meudeurita lagoena
Job30:4 Awaknyan jilôt tamah meuduro lam padang kasak kasek laju jimakheun bah kheueh ôn meunan cit ukeue jih.
Job30:5 Awaknyan jiuse deungon tengking lagée ureuëng jiuse pancuri.
Job30:6 Awaknyan tinggai lam guha-guha; ruhuéng-ruhuéng bak bintéh gunong jeuet keu rumoh awaknyan.
Job30:7 Lam uteun raya awaknyan jiklik-klik lagée beulatang
Job30:8 Awaknyan hana nan meunan cit hana meuyuém
Job30:9 Jinoe awaknyan teuka dan ulôn jipeukém teuma; nibak awaknyan
Job30:10 Ulôn jingieng lé awaknyan hina ngon kutoe
Job30:11 Lé sabab Po teu Allah geupeujeuet ulôn leumoh hana meudaya
Job30:12 Kawan awaknyan jiheuntam ulôn rot keue
Job30:13 Awaknyan jikoh rot ulôn keu jipeutaloe ulôn; hana meusidroe pih nyang halang watée awaknyan jiseureubu.
Job30:14 Lagée ié beuna awaknyan heuntam beuton kuta lôn; meusajan-sajan awaknyan teuka jijak tindéeh tuboh lôn.
Job30:15 Nyang paleng dahsyat ka peunoh bansaboh tuboh lôn; lagée jiyueb lé angén
Job30:16 Jinoenyoe rab maté ulôn; hana nyang phui keu deurita ulôn.
Job30:17 Óh watée malam mandum tuleueng lôn linu-linu; rasa sakét nyang jitôb-tôb hana jipiôh-piôh.
Job30:18 Po teu Allah geuteugom ulôn bak takue bajée lôn sampoe peukayan ulôn krôt-krôt bak tuboh lôn.
Job30:19 U dalam leuhôb ulôn geuseumpom
Job30:20 Ulôn meudoá ubak Droeneueh ya Allah
Job30:21 Droeneueh Neupeusaneut ulôn deungon keujam
Job30:22 Droeneueh Neupeubiyeu angén jipupo ulôn sampoe meulayang; lam angén badée Droeneueh pôt keudeh keunoe droe ulôn.
Job30:23 Ulôn kuteupeue
Job30:24 Keupeue Droeneueh seurang ureuëng nyang keunong bala
Job30:25 Bukon kheueh ulôn kumoe meusajan ngon ureuëng nyang sosah
Job30:26 Ulôn meuharab bahgia dan trang
Job30:27 Ulôn teupriek-priek lé seudeh dan weuh lumpah na; uroe meugantoe uroe seumaken lé nyang lôn deurita.
Job30:28 Lam seupôt
Job30:29 Su ulôn seudeh peunoh ngon weuh lagée jimo asée srigala dan cicém unta.
Job30:30 Kulét ka jeuet keu itam; tuboh lôn tutông lé sabab deumam.
Job30:31 Yoh watée ilée ulôn deungoe su musik geumbira
Job31:1 Deungon sumpah ulôn ka meujanji aneuëk dara muda hana lôn kalon deungon beurahi.
Job31:2 Peu kheueh nyang geupeubuet Po teu Allah ateueh geutanyoe? Pakriban kheueh geubalaih buet manusia?
Job31:3 Bala dan malang pasti teuka ubak ureuëng nyang peubuet jeuhet!
Job31:4 Po teu Allah teupeue banmandum buet ulôn; geukalon mandum langkah-langkah lôn.
Job31:5 Ulôn meusumpah bahwa gohlom na ulôn peubuet jeuhet; meunan cit gohlom na ulôn peunget gob.
Job31:6 Bah kheueh Po teu Allah geutimang ulôn ateueh céng nyang sah
Job31:7 Meunyoe seukira jih ulôn ka meusimpang nibak rot nyang beutôi
Job31:8 deungon nyan bah kheueh ureuëng laén jipajoh peue nyang ulôn tabu
Job31:9 Meunyoe seukira jih ulôn teutarek ubak peurumoh teutangga lôn
Job31:10 deungon nyan bah kheueh peurumoh lôn jitaguen bu keu ureuëng laén; bah kheueh ateueh peuratah agam laén jihnyan éh.
Job31:11 Meunyoe desya nyang jeuhet nyan biet na lôn peubuet
Job31:12 Desya nyan jeuet keubinasa lagée apui neuraka
Job31:13 Watée namiet ulôn aloh alah sabab hak jih ulôn peusalah
Job31:14 Meunyoe hana
Job31:15 Bukon kheueh Po teu Allah nyang cebta ulôn
Job31:16 Gohlom na hana lôntem tulông ureuëng nyang gasien meuseukien. Atawa lôn peubiyeu inong-inong balée udeb lam keuadaan putôh asa.
Job31:17 Gohlom na ulôn peubiyeu aneuëk yatem ngon meuntui udeb jih duek
Job31:18 Yoh ubit awaknyan lôn peulara; siumu udeb lôn awaknyan ulôn bimbeng.
Job31:19 Meunyoe ulôn ngieng ureuëng nyang udeb jih lam kureueng
Job31:20 Ulôn peuliembôt jihnyan mangat seu-uem ngon ija wol nibak bubiri lôn keudroe
Job31:21 Meunyoe ulôn ka lheueh lôn tindéeh yatem ngon meuntui
Job31:22 deungon nyan bah kheueh bandua blaih jaroe lôn patah sampoe jiminah nibak bahô ulôn.
Job31:23 Hana ulôn peubuet lagée nyan
Job31:24 Hántom na ulôn peubangga ngon hareuta lôn
Job31:25 atawa ulôn peubangga atra keukayaan lôn.
Job31:26 Hántom na ulôn seumah mata uroe nyang meunan trang atawa buleuen nyang hu beuble-ble ceudah.
Job31:27 Hántom na ulôn teugoda lé atra nyan
Job31:28 Desya nyang lagéenyan bagoe patôt meuteumé huköman maté
Job31:29 Gohlom na ulôn meumangat-mangat até sabab musoh lôn meudeurita
Job31:30 Ulôn hana meudoá keu beumaté musoh lôn; hántom na ulôn peubuet desya nyang lagéenyan bagoe.
Job31:31 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang meubuet bak ulôn jiteupeue
Job31:32 Rumoh lôn teuhah sabe keu ureuëng teungoh jak; hántom na ulôn peubiyeu awaknyan jiéh ateueh rot uh.
Job31:33 Ureuëng laén jisöm-söm desya jih
Job31:34 Peue jikheun lé gob hana lôn takot
Job31:35 Peu kheueh hana ureuëng nyang jitem deungoe tutoe haba lôn? Ulôn meusumpah bahwa peue nyang lôn peugah beutôi mandum. Kira jih Nyang Mahakuasa geujaweueb mandum ulôn. Meunyoe peue nyang jitudoh lé musoh ateueh ulôn teutuléh mandum deungon nyan geukalon lé lôn
Job31:36 teuma deungon bangga ulôn lat bak bahô
Job31:37 Teuma ulôn britée ubak Po teu Allah banmandum nyang ulôn peubuet; teuma ulôn hadab Geuhnyan deungon bangga dan ulée teudong cot.
Job31:38 Meunyoe seukira jih tanoh nyang ulôn meu-úe ka ulôn cue
Job31:39 seukira jih hase jih habéh ulôn pajoh
Job31:40 bah kheueh kon jeulai atawa gandom nyang timoh lam ladang
Job32:1 Sabab Nabi Ayub yakén that-that ateueh keubeunaran droe gobnyan
Job32:2 Teuma disinan na sidroe ureuëng nyang nan geuh Elihu bin Barakheel
Job32:3 Meunan cit gobnyan beungéh ubak ban lhée droe sahabat Nabi Ayub sabab awaknyan hana hase jibantah tutoe haba Nabi Ayub
Job32:4 Elihu ureuëng nyang paleng muda lamkawan awaknyan
Job32:5 Óh ka lheueh geukalon bahwa ban lhée droe awaknyan hana hase geujaweueb
Job32:6 dan laju geupeugah lagée nyoe
Job32:7 Ulôn pike
Job32:8 Teuma nyang jôk hikeumat ubak manusia
Job32:9 Ureuëng jeuet keubijaksana
Job32:10 Lé sababnyan
Job32:11 Deungon saba ulôn deungoe watée droeneueh peugah haba
Job32:12 Ulôn simak deungon biet-biet that; ulôn deungoe droeneueh meuteumé keugagalan. Nyang salah nibak tutoe haba Nabi Ayub hana hase droeneueh jôk bukeuti.
Job32:13 Pakriban jeuet droeneueh peugah bahwa hikeumat ka droeneueh teumé? Sabab droeneueh teupaksa meunyeurah. Nyang hase jaweueb Nabi Ayub na kheueh Po teu Allah.
Job32:14 Ubak droeneueh kheueh Nabi Ayub peugah haba
Job32:15 Nabi Ayub
Job32:16 Awaknyan jidong mantong
Job32:17 Hana
Job32:18 Hana saba le ulôn preh
Job32:19 Meunyoe ulôn seungab mantong
Job32:20 Ulôn harôh peugah haba
Job32:21 Hana ulôn bila soe mantong nibak meudakwa nyoe dan hana meusidroe pih nyang ulôn pujoe-pujoe.
Job32:22 Cara teubeuôt-beuôt pi
Job33:1 Jinoe
Job33:2 Ulôn ka siab seudia keuneuk meututoe lôn peugah haba.
Job33:3 Deungon ikhlaih até ulôn peugah haba; nyang ulôn peugah na kheueh nyang sibeuna jih.
Job33:4 Roh Po teu Allah ka geucebta ulôn dan geubri udeb ubak ulôn.
Job33:5 Lé sababnyan
Job33:6 Nibak Po teu Allah
Job33:7 Lé sababnyan
Job33:8 Nyang kheueh
Job33:9 Droeneueh neupeugah
Job33:10 Teuma Po teu Allah geumita-mita alasan geulawan ulôn
Job33:11 Gobnyan geuboh ranté bak gaki lôn; dan geukawai mandum grak grik lôn.’
Job33:12 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job33:13 Pakon droeneueh tatudôh Allah bahwa Gobnyan hana geupakoe aloh alah manusia?
Job33:14 Po teu Allah geumeututoe deungon meubagoe cara
Job33:15 Di ureuëng éh meusinyeunya óh watée malam
Job33:16 Po teu Allah geuyue awaknyan beujideungoe; geupeukeujôt awaknyan deungon geuseugah sabe.
Job33:17 Meukeusut jih mangat awaknyan jipiôh meudesya dan jitinggai buet jih nyang sombong.
Job33:18 Hana geupeubiyeu awaknyan rhot ubak hanco; geulindong awaknyan nibak maté.
Job33:19 Po teu Allah geuseugah ureuëng deungon geupeutreun peunyakét deungon nyan tuboh jih peunoh rasa sakét.
Job33:20 Nyang sakét nyan ka gadôh nafeusu pajoh bu
Job33:21 Tuboh jih jeuet keu pijuet dan meurana
Job33:22 Gobnyan karab jiwoe u álam baka donya ureuëng maté karab that ubak jihnyan.
Job33:23 Mungken sidroe lamkawan siribée malaikat Allah nyang peuingat manusia nibak tugaih jih
Job33:24 Deungon meuwéuh-wéuh malaikat nyan teuma geupeugah
Job33:25 Tuboh jih teuma jeuet keu teuga dan peukasa seugar lagée ureuëng muda.
Job33:26 Meunyoe jihnyan meudoá
Job33:27 Teuma
Job33:28 Po teu Allah geutam ulôn bék ulôn jak lam donya ureuëng maté
Job33:29 Deungon meuulang-ulang
Job33:30 Mangat Gobnyan hase geupeuseulamat manusia dan geubri keubahgiaan lam udeb jih.
Job33:31 Lé sababnyan deungoe kheueh hei Nabi Ayub
Job33:32 Teuma meunyoe na nyang keuneuk droeneueh peugah
Job33:33 Teuma meunyoe hana
Job34:1 Bukon kheueh droeneueh carông dan na ákai budo? Deungoe kheueh banmandum nyang ulôn peugah nyoe.
Job34:2 
Job34:3 Ureuëng jiteupeue peunajoh mangat meunyoe ka jirasa
Job34:4 Soai nyoe harôh tapeureksa laju tapeubicah meusajan teuma.
Job34:5 Kheun Nabi Ayub
Job34:6 Ulôn geuanggab meusulet
Job34:7 Peu kheueh ka lheueh takalon ureuëng lagée Nabi Ayub nyoe? Jihnyan jihina Po teu Allah meuulang-ulang.
Job34:8 Jihnyan galak jimeurakan ngon ureuëng-ureuëng doraka meunan cit jimeungon deungon ureuëng-ureuëng durjana.
Job34:9 Gobnyan jipeugah
Job34:10 Hei ureuëng-ureuëng bijaksana
Job34:11 Gobnyan geuganja manusia nyang sisuai deungon buet jih
Job34:12 Po teu Allah Nyang Mahakuasa hana geupeubuet nyang jeuhet; banmandum ureuëng geubri keuadelan.
Job34:13 Nibak soe kheueh Po teu Allah geuteurimong kuasa Geuh? Soe kheueh nyang peucaya bumoe nyoe ubak Gobnyan?
Job34:14 Miseujih Po teu Allah geutarek nyawöng manusia
Job34:15 deungon nyan maté makhlok mandum nyang na nyawöng
Job34:16 Nyan
Job34:17 Peu kheueh Po teu Allah nyang ade dan peukasa nyan gata peusalah? Peue nibak neupike lé droeneueh Po teu Allah geubanci keuadelan?
Job34:18 Po teu Allah geuhuköm raja dan nyang mat kuasa meunyoe awaknyan jeuhet dan doraka.
Job34:19 Gobnyan hana geudong blah raja-raja
Job34:20 Watée teungoh malam
Job34:21 Gobnyan geukawai udeb manusia
Job34:22 Hana seupôt
Job34:23 Hana peureulée Po teu Allah geupeuteuntée watée jih
Job34:24 Deungon hana geuseulidék dan geupeureksa Gobnyan geupeucat nyang mat kuasa dan geubaiát geunantoe jih.
Job34:25 Sabab
Job34:26 Awaknyan geutampa sabab lé desya awaknyan
Job34:27 Sabab
Job34:28 Lé sabab awaknyan jeuet ureuëng gasien aloh alah mo ba-e awaknyan geudeungoe lé Po teu Allah.
Job34:29 Meunyoe Po teu Allah geucok keuputôsan keu geuseungab mantong
Job34:30 Teuma bansa-bansa hana meudaya keu jiceugah teumindéeh jeuhet nyan meukuasa.
Job34:31 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job34:32 Peu kheueh ka droeneueh lakée mangat geutunyok salah droeneueh? Peu kheueh ka neumeusumpah bahwa droeneueh neupiôh nibak buet nyan?
Job34:33 Ék kheueh mungken Po teu Allah geupeutrok peue nyang gata lakée
Job34:34 Banmandum ureuëng áreh ka pasti situju; ureuëng bijaksana nyang jideungoe ulôn teuma jipeugah
Job34:35 bahwa Nabi Ayub geumeututoe hana geumeuphom
Job34:36 Meunyoe tutoe haba Nabi Ayub teutilek deungon get-get
Job34:37 Salah geuhnyan teutamah lom deungon saboh desya; gobnyan beurontak ubak Po teu Allah
Job35:1 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job35:2 
Job35:3 Droeneueh silab meunyoe neutanyong
Job35:4 Ulôn kheueh nyang jaweueb droeneueh meunan cit ubak rakan-rakan droeneueh nyan.
Job35:5 Kalon kheueh u langét dan éue kheueh padubna manyang jih awan-awan.
Job35:6 Meunyoe droeneueh meudesya
Job35:7 Deungoe teupeubuet nyang get
Job35:8 Teuma seusabe droeneueh nyang jipeurugoe lé desya-desya droeneueh. Gobnyan cit teuma nyang meu-untông lé jroh droeneueh nyan.
Job35:9 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang jitindéeh teuma meurang-rang; awaknyan jiklik jilakée tulông.
Job35:10 Teuma bukon ubak Po teu Allah
Job35:11 dan nyang jôk keu manusia ákai budo leubeh nibak cicém dan beulatang laén di ateueh bumoe.
Job35:12 Ureuëng-ureuëng teutindéeh nyan jitawök
Job35:13 Sia-sia kheueh awaknyan jiklik habéh teunaga; Nyang Mahakuasa hana geukalon atawa geudeungoe awaknyan.
Job35:14 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job35:15 Neupike Po teu Allah hana geubri huköman dan hana geukalon nyang droeneueh langgeh.
Job35:16 Sia-sia mantong kheueh tutoe haba droeneueh neupeugah laju; nyata kheueh
Job36:1 Deungoe kheueh sikeujab teuk dan saba kheueh
Job36:2 
Job36:3 Peungeutahuan lôn luwah; ulôn peuguna nyan keu ulôn bri bukeuti bahwa ade that nyang cebta ulôn.
Job36:4 Tutoe haba lôn hana nyang peuleusu; ureuëng nyang biet-biet áreh na dikeue droeneueh.
Job36:5 Po teu Allah nyan peukasa! Peue-peue mantong geumeuphom. Hana meusidroe pih nyang geupandang hina.
Job36:6 Ureuëng nyang meudesya hana geupeubiyeu udeb jih treb that
Job36:7 Ureuëng nyang jujoe geupeurati sabe
Job36:8 Teuma meunyoe ureuëng teuranté ngon ranté beuso
Job36:9 teuma desya dan keuhai sombong awaknyan teuma geubuka lé Po teu Allah.
Job36:10 Geuyue awaknyan mangat jideungoe peuingat Gobnyan dan jitinggai buet nyang jeuhet nyang jipeubuet lé awaknyan.
Job36:11 Meunyoe awaknyan jiturot peue kheun Po teu Allah dan meubakti ubak Gobnyan
Job36:12 Teuma meunyoe awaknyan hana jideungoe
Job36:13 Ureuëng nyang hana meutuhan nibak jih jikeubah beungéh; bahle geuhuköm lé Tuhan
Job36:14 Awaknyan maté lam keuadaan payah lam umu mantong that muda
Job36:15 Po teu Allah geupeurunoe manusia rot deurita
Job36:16 Po teu Allah ka geupeubeubaih droeneueh nibak nyang sulet that
Job36:17 Teuma jinoe sisuai deungon buet droeneueh nyang jeuhet
Job36:18 Waspada kheueh
Job36:19 Sia-sia mantong droeneueh meulakée beugeutem tulông
Job36:20 Bék droeneueh hawa ubak malam nyang seupôt
Job36:21 Waspada kheueh
Job36:22 Ingat kheueh
Job36:23 Soe kheueh nyang hase jipeuteuntée rot keu Gobnyan atawa jijeuet tudôh Gobnyan geupeubuet salah?
Job36:24 Sabe Gobnyan jipujoe sabab lé karya Geuh
Job36:25 Banmandum ureuëng jikalon buet Gobnyan; teuma hana meusidroe pih nyang biet-biet muphom Gobnyan.
Job36:26 Po teu Allah keubiet mulia
Job36:27 Po teu Allah nyang tarék ié ateueh bumoe jeuet keu awan laju geuubah teuma jeuet keu ié ujeuen.
Job36:28 Gobnyan geupeutron ujeuen rot langét manyang; laju geusibu ateueh umat manusia.
Job36:29 Hana meusidroe pih jimeuphom grak awan-awan dan su gogo di langét bak teumpat Po teu Allah tinggai.
Job36:30 Gobnyan geupeutrang banmandum langét deungon kilat
Job36:31 Nyan kheueh cara jih Gobnyan geupeu udeb bansa-bansa dan geujôk peunajoh nyang jai meulimpah.
Job36:32 Gobnyan geudrob kilat ngon jaroe Gobnyan dan geuyue kilat nyan jisama hoho nyang geupeurintah.
Job36:33 Su gogo sibagoe tanda bahwa angén badée reujang jiteuka
Job37:1 Angén badée teupeujeuet até lôn yo meugeunta dan jantông lôn meugub-gub tajam.
Job37:2 Deungoe kheueh su Po teu Allah
Job37:3 Bansaboh langét
Job37:4 Óh lheueh nyan
Job37:5 Sabab peurintah Po teu allah
Job37:6 Salju rhot ateueh bumoe ateueh peurintah Gobnyan; ujeuen keuncang jitron ateueh yue Gobnyan cit teuma.
Job37:7 Geupeupiôh buet manusia
Job37:8 Meunan cit beulatang kleut jitamong lam ruhuéng dan guha
Job37:9 Nibak seulatan jiteubiet angén badée dan rot utara hawa leupie nyang sijeuk lumpah na.
Job37:10 Nafáh Po teu Allah jeuet keu beuku muka ié nyang luwah
Job37:11 Awan dimanyang geupeupeunoh ngon ié
Job37:12 Awan-awan jipo meulayang bansigom donya
Job37:13 Po teu Allah geupeutron ujeuen keungon peubasah tanoh
Job37:14 Seungab kheueh sikeujab
Job37:15 Peu kheueh neuteupeue pakriban Po teu Allah geubri aba-aba
Job37:16 Peu kheueh neuteupeue pakriban awan-awan nyan meulayang-layang hase keuahlian Po teu Allah nyang hana ngon peusa?
Job37:17 Hana
Job37:18 Peu kheueh hase gata lagée Po teu Allah nyang geubeunteueng cakrawala dan geupeukreueh lagée beuso tuangan atawa ceureumén?
Job37:19 Peurunoe kheueh kamoe peue nyang harôh kamoe peugah ubak Allah; hana nyang hase kamoe peutrang
Job37:20 Hana lôntem lôn lakée meututoe ngon Po teu Allah
Job37:21 Jinoe cahya langét keubiet that trang sampoe seulala mata; angén jipeugleh cuaca deungon jiyueb nyan.
Job37:22 Cahya lagée méuh teuka di utara
Job37:23 Keubiet rayeuk that kuasa Po teu Allah geutanyoe; hana hase tanyoe tapeurab bak Gobnyan
Job37:24 Nyang kheueh sabab jih Gobnyan patot teuhoreumat lé soe mantong
Job38:1 Óh lheueh nyan rot lam angén badée Tuhan meututoe ubak Nabi Ayub
Job38:2 “Soe gata nyan
Job38:3 Jinoe
Job38:4 Peu kheueh gata ka lahé watée bumoe Ulôn peujeuet? Dan meunyoe gata biet-biet lhok peungeutahuan gata peugah laju!
Job38:5 Soe kheueh nyang peuteuntée luwah donya nyoe? Soe kheueh nyang ulue talo sineupat ubak gobnyan? Peu kheueh gata teupeue jaweueb jih?
Job38:6 Pakriban kheueh taméh-taméh ngon tumpang bumoe teudong cot? Soe nyang peuduek batée peunjuru donya deungon kukôh
Job38:7 bak watée bintang-bintang beungoh meunyanyoe meusajan dan makhlok-makhlok syeuruga meusurak-surak geumbira.
Job38:8 Soe kheueh nyang tôb babah pintoe keu teuhampeueng laôt raya watée lam pruet bumoe jiteubiet meubok-bok ié jih?
Job38:9 Ulôn kheueh nyang peupayông laôt ngon awan dan nyang bungkôh nyan deungon seupôt buta.
Job38:10 Ulôn nyang peuteuntée bataih keue laôt raya dan deungon pintoe teupalang Ulôn hampeueng nyan.
Job38:11 Kheun Ulôn ubak jihnyan
Job38:12 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job38:13 Peu kheueh na gata yue mata uroe beungoh jimat bumoe dan gata kipaih ureuëng jeuhet nibak teumpat jih musöm?
Job38:14 Trang uroe teupeuleumah gunong dan pantôn lagée cab nibak tanoh kliet dan lipat nibak saboh jubah.
Job38:15 Trang uroe lumpah that peungeuh nibak ureuëng hana meutuhan
Job38:16 Peu kheueh ka lheueh gata tron ubak asai ié laôt
Job38:17 Peu kheueh ka lheueh lé gob jitunyok ubak gata pintoe geureubang dikeue álam mawöt nyang seupôt buta?
Job38:18 Peu kheueh hase gata duga padubna luwaih donya nyoe? Jaweueb kheueh meunyoe gata tateupeue.
Job38:19 Peu kheueh gata teupeue rot pat teuka trang
Job38:20 Peu kheueh hase gata peuteuntée bataih seupôt ngon trang? Atawa teuyue awaknyan jiwoe óh ka lheueh jiteuka?
Job38:21 Teuntée gata hase
Job38:22 Peu kheueh ka lheueh gata saweue gudang-gudang Lôn teumpat salju dan ujeuen batée
Job38:23 nyang Ulôn keubah keu watée teuka sosah
Job38:24 Peu kheueh gata teupeue dipat teumpat mata uroe tinggai? Atawa rot pat asai angén timu na?
Job38:25 Soe kheueh nyang kueh luéng keu teumpat ié ujeuen raya dan nyang bri rot ueh keu gogo dan kilat?
Job38:26 Soe kheueh nyang peutron ujeuen lam padang beulantara
Job38:27 Soe kheueh nyang sibu ngon ié ateueh bumoe nyang tho kreng dan meurana sampoe naleueng meutuneh mandum?
Job38:28 Peu kheueh ujeuen na ayah droe? Soe ayah nibak titek-titek iémbon?
Job38:29 Peu kheueh ié éeh na ma jih? Soe nyang peulahé iémbon beuku?
Job38:30 Soe nyang ubah ié jeuet keu batée
Job38:31 Peu kheueh hase ikat bintang Kartika gata beureukah? Atawa ranté bintang Belantik gata peuglah?
Job38:32 Peu kheueh hase gata bimbeng bintang-bintang tieb-tieb musém jih
Job38:33 Peu kheueh gata teupeue huköm-huköm di cakrawala? Dan peu kheueh hase gata teurab nyan lam donya?
Job38:34 Peu kheueh hase gata klik sira gata peurintah ubak awan
Job38:35 Dan meunyoe gata yue geulanteue-geulanteue seumama keudeh keunoe
Job38:36 Bak soe jiteupeue lé cicém ibis pajan Krueng Nil meugeunang? Soe nyang britée manok agam bahwa ujeuen teuma jiteuka?
Job38:37 Soe kheueh nyang seb áreh keu ji-itong awan dan jibalek sampoe jitron ujeuen
Job38:38 ujeuen nyang peukreueh abée sampoe jeuet meugeucai dan tanoh jeuet meuleukek-leukek teuma?
Job38:39 Peu kheueh hase gata peucrok beulatang laén keu uempeun singa-singa dan teupeutroe pruet aneuëk-aneuëk jih
Job38:40 meunyoe awaknyan jimusöm lam guha atawa jibatom lam uempeueng jih?
Job38:41 Soe nyang tulông cicém gagak nyang deuk dan jijak keudeh keunoe jimita peunajoh soe kheueh teuma nyang tulông meunyoe aneuëk-aneuëk jih jirawôk Ulôn jilakée uempeuen.
Job39:1 Peu kheueh gata teupeue pajan kaméng uteun jipeulahé lé ma jih? Peu kheueh na gata kalon rusa kleut jipeulahé aneuëk jih?
Job39:2 Peu kheueh gata teupeue padubna treb jihnyan raya pruet? Peu kheueh watée jitôh aneuëk hase gata itong?
Job39:3 Peu kheueh gata teupeue pajan beulatang nyan jipeukewieng tuboh jih
Job39:4 Aneuëk-aneuëk jih meutamah rayeuk dan teuga lam padang beulantara; awaknyan jijak dan hana jiwoe le ubak nang-nang jih.
Job39:5 Soe nyang peuleuh keuleudée kluet lam gle? Soe nyang ploih taloe jih dan nyang peubiyeu jijak hoho nyang hawa?
Job39:6 Keu jihnyan Ulôn bri padang pasi sibagoe rumoh dan padang-padang sira keu teumpat tinggai jih.
Job39:7 Jihnyan jipeujiôh banda-banda dan teumpat-teumpat ramé
Job39:8 Padang naleueng di gunong teumpat jih meurot
Job39:9 Peu kheueh leumô kleut jitem meubuet keu gata? Peu kheueh jitem meudom lam weue gata?
Job39:10 Peu kheueh hase gata ikat jih dan jimeu-ue di blang gata? Peu kheueh hase gata yue jih jimeucreuen lam blang gata?
Job39:11 Peu kheueh hase gata peubangga teunaga jih nyang teuga
Job39:12 Peu kheueh gata peucaya jihnyan jipeusapat hase keumeukoh gata
Job39:13 Padubna bagaih jih jikipah sayeueb cicém unta! Teuma jipo cicém cangiriek hana hase jilawan.
Job39:14 Cicém unta jitoh boh ateueh tanoh
Job39:15 Jihnyan hana sada mungken ureuëng laén jigilo jih dan beulatang-beulatang kleut pih jigilo jihnyan.
Job39:16 Jihnyan meusikeub sang-sang aneuëk jih kon atra jih; jihnyan hana jipakoe meunyoe useuha jih sia-sia mantong.
Job39:17 Ulôn kheueh nyang jeuet jihnyan bangai dan bebal
Job39:18 Teuma meunyoe jihnyan jipeuphon plueng tajam
Job39:19 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job39:20 Peue gata nyang yue jih jilumpat lagée daruet
Job39:21 Jihnyan jikrok tanoh nibak pantôn deungon geumbira
Job39:22 Jihnyan hana muphom yo ngon teumakot; hana peudeueng nyang peujeuet jih jisurot.
Job39:23 Peudeueng nyang jimat lé nyang pasang
Job39:24 Deungon seumangat nyang ju guda nyan laju jiplueng; meunyoe beureuguih ka jimeusu hana ék le jipeuteun droe.
Job39:25 Guda nyan meu ou-ou watée jideungoe su beureuguih teuyueb rot jiôh teucom bak jih bhée meuprang nyang meuhubo. Jideungoe su dumpek dumna peuwira watée awaknyan geubri aba-aba.
Job39:26 Peu kheueh cicém kleung gata peurunoe jipo watée jihnyan jipo u seulatan deungon sayeueb meukeumang?
Job39:27 Peu kheueh peurintah gata nyang jiseutôt le cicém rajawali sigohlom jihnyan jipeuget uempueng jih bak gunong-gunong manyang?
Job39:28 Bak punca gunong batée laju jipeudong rumoh jih; ujong batée-batée nyang cincu jeuet keu kuta jih.
Job39:29 Rot disinan jihnyan laju jikawai u bansigom arah mata jih sesoe jiluem mangsa.
Job39:30 Dipat na nyang tiwaih
Job40:1 Hei Nabi Ayub
Job40:2 Teuma geujaweueb lé Nabi Ayub ubak Tuhan
Job40:3 Jeunaweueb peu kheueh nyang jeuet ulôn peugah? Hana sapeue na le nyang harôh lôn peugah.
Job40:4 
Job40:5 Keubiet ka jai that nyang ka lheueh lôn peugah.”
Job40:6 Laju rot lam angén badée Tuhan meufeureuman lom ubak Nabi Ayub.
Job40:7 Laju Tuhan meufeureuman ubak Nabi Ayub
Job40:8 Peu kheueh keuneuk gata iengkeue ubak keuadelan Lôn
Job40:9 Peu kheueh gata teuga lagée Ulôn? Peu kheueh hase su gata lagée su geulanteue saban ngon su Lôn?
Job40:10 Hias kheueh droe gata deungon keumeugahan dan keubeusaran
Job40:11 Pandang kheueh awaknyan nyang cungkak até jih; peuju meudok-dok kheueh beungéh gata dan peumiyueb kheueh awaknyan.
Job40:12 Nyoe
Job40:13 Kubu kheueh awaknyan banmandum lam abée; kurông kheueh awaknyan lam donya ureuëng maté.
Job40:14 Deungon nyan gata teuma Lôn pujoe sabab gata meunang deungon teunaga gata keudroe.
Job40:15 Ngieng kheueh Behemot
Job40:16 Teuma kalon kheueh beuget-get teunaga lam tuboh jih dan teunaga nyang na nibak atot-atot jih.
Job40:17 Jipeudong ikue jih lagée bak aras
Job40:18 Tuleueng-tuleueng jih teuga lagée teumaga
Job40:19 Lamkawan banmandum makhlok Ulôn jihnyan kheueh nyang paleng hebat; teuma lé Nyang Cebta jihnyan mantong nyang hase peutaklok!
Job40:20 Nibak bukét-bukét teumpat beulatang kleut jimeu-euen-meuen ngon geumbira
Job40:21 Jihnyan ji-éh dimiyueb tamah meuduro
Job40:22 Paya uyok meuduro jipeupayông jihnyan deungon bubayang-bubayang jih. Bak gandarusa nyang timoh bak binéh krueng habéh teutôb jihnyan.
Job40:23 Jihnyan hana yo bahpi Krueng Yordan tajam that ji ile
Job40:24 Soe kheueh nyang jijeuet peubuta mata jih
Job41:1 Peu kheueh hase gata droeb buya Lewiatan
Job41:2 Peu kheueh gata sôk idông jih ngon talo atawa ceunawiét beuso ubak reuheuéng jih?
Job41:3 Peu kheueh jihnyan jilakée ubak gata mangat teupeubeubaih? Atawa jimeurôk pakat ngon gata
Job41:4 Peu kheueh mungken jipeuget janji situju ngon gata
Job41:5 Peu kheueh mungken gata ikat jihnyan lagée cicém peulara
Job41:6 Peu kheueh mungken jihnyan teupeubloe lé neulayan-neulayan dan jibagi-bagi lamkawan ureuëng-ureuëng meukat?
Job41:7 Peu kheueh hase gata tôb kulét jih ngon kapak nyang mata jih lhée atawa gata geulawa jihnyan ngon mata leumbeng sampoe beusôt ulée jih?
Job41:8 Cukéeh kheueh jihnyan sigoe mantong
Job41:9 Soe-soe mantong ureuëng nyang jikalon Lewiatan
Job41:10 Jihnyan juwah meunyoe teupeugoe nibak jih éh; hana meusidroe pih nyang jiheuet dong dikeue jih.
Job41:11 Soe nyang hase geutam jihnyan deungon hana meuteumé bala? Lam donya nyoe hana nyang hase jipeubuet hai nyan.
Job41:12 Jak kheueh gata deungoe Ulôn peugah keuhai anggota tuboh Lewiatan keuhai teunaga jih dan hi jih nyang gagah.
Job41:13 Hana meusidroe pih nyang hase jipriek bajée jih bagian luwa atawa jipeubeusôt bajée prang nyang jingui nyan.
Job41:14 Soe hase jipeuhah babah jih nyang kong that
Job41:15 Lagée peurisée teususon
Job41:16 Tindéeh meutindéeh
Job41:17 Peurisée nyan meunan kong that meusangkot ngon nyang laén
Job41:18 Watée Lewiatan nyan beureusen
Job41:19 Lidah apui jiteubiet meuhambô-hambô lam babah jih; meuk apui teupeupo-peupo keudeh keunoe.
Job41:20 Asab meukeubok jiteubiet lam idong jih
Job41:21 Nafáh jih jipeuteubiet lagée ngeue apui; apui hu jiteubiet nibak babah jih.
Job41:22 Boh gôh jih meunan that teuga
Job41:23 Hana teumpat nyang leumoh nibak kulét jih; hana mungken beukah sabab kreueh jih lagée kreueh baja.
Job41:24 Até jih kong lagée batée
Job41:25 Meunyoe jihnyan jibeudôh
Job41:26 Hana peudeueng nyang hase jipeuluka tuboh jih; kapak
Job41:27 Beuso jianggab halôh lagée naleueng dan teumaga jianggab lumpok lagée kayée meukulat.
Job41:28 Hana aneuk panah nyang hase jiparoh jihnyan; batée nyang teurhom ateueh jihnyan sang-sang lagée keunong jeumpung.
Job41:29 Gada jianggab siôn naleueng tho; beulatang nyan jikem meunyoe na ureuëng jigeulawa jih ngon leumbeng.
Job41:30 Sisek nibak pruet jih lagée péng-péng kaca nyang tajam ujông jih. Lagée alat peuneubah watée jikurek leuhôb dan jiprah dua.
Job41:31 Laôt jicawoe-cawoe sampoe rab lagée ié ju; lagée panci ngon taguen minyéuk nyang meukeuboh-keuboh.
Job41:32 Jihnyan jitinggai incik tapak gaki nyang meuble cahya
Job41:33 Di ateueh bumoe hana ngon peusa ngon jih; makhlok nyang hana jituri teumakot
Job41:34 Beulatang nyang paleng meusyeuhu pih ji pandang hina; lamkawan beulatang juah
Job42:1 Jaweueb Nabi Ayub ubak Tuhan
Job42:2

Job42:4 Droeneueh neuyue ulôn deungoe watée Droeneueh peugah haba
Job42:5 Yoh watée ilée
Job42:6 Lé sababnyan ulôn malée lôn ingat mandum tutoe haba lôn dan deungon meunyeusai ulôn duek lam abée.”
Job42:7 Óh ka lheueh geumeututoe ubak Nabi Ayub
Job42:8 Jinoe
Job42:9 Elifas

Job42:13 Gobnyan na geumeu aneuëk tujoh droe aneuëk agam dan lhée droe aneuëk inong.
Job42:14 Aneuëk inong nyang phon geuboh nan Yemima
Job42:15 Bansaboh nanggroe nyan hana aneuëk dara nyang lagak lagée ban lhée droe aneuëk dara Nabi Ayub nyan. Awaknyan geujôk jeumba lam atra waresan ureuëng syiek jih
Job42:16 Óh ka lheueh nyan Nabi Ayub mantong udeb sireutoh peuet ploh thon treb jih
Job42:17 Lheuehnyan laju meuninggai kheueh Nabi Ayub nibak umu ka tuha that.

Psalms17:4 Ulôn peubuet peue nyang Droeneueh peurintah ubak ulôn dan hana lôn jak rot kreueh nyang rugoe hana meulaba.

Psalms17:6 Ulôn meulakée ubak Droeneueh
Psalms17:7 Neutunyok kheueh geunaséh Droeneueh nyang luwa biasa nyan sabab Droeneueh peuseulamat ureuëng nyang meulindong nibak Droeneueh
Psalms17:8 Neupeulara kheueh ulôn lagée aneuk mata Droeneueh
Psalms17:9 nibak jiseurang lé ureuëng jeuhet. Ulôn jikeupong lé musoh nyang jikeuneuk peumaté ulôn.
Psalms17:10 Nibak awaknyan hana jituri peue nyan gaséh sayang dan meunyoe jipeugah haba deungon sombong dan cungkak.
Psalms17:11 Awaknyan jimaju jilawan ulôn dan jijak paran ulôn

Psalms18:1 Keu teupimpén kor. Zabur Nabi Daud
Psalms18:2 Ulôn cinta ubak Droneueh
Psalms18:3 Tuhan lagée kuta nyang kukoh teumpat ulôn meulindong. Allah ulôn lagée gunong batée teumpat ulôn meupayong. Lagée peurisai gobnyan geutôb ulôn
Psalms18:4 Ulôn meulakée ubak Tuhan nyang patot teupujoe
Psalms18:5 Ulôn ka jikeulileng lé bahya mawöt dan jipeunom lam ié raya keubinasaan.
Psalms18:6 Ulôn jikeulileng lé bahya mawöt
Psalms18:7 Lam keuadaan ulôn nyang apoh apah ulôn meulakée ubak Tuhan
Psalms18:8 Laju bumoe meuguncang meusu meu krab-krab
Psalms18:9 Jiteubiet asab lam ruhuéng idong Gobnyan
Psalms18:10 Langét geuplah
Psalms18:11 Gobnyan geupoe di ateueh kerub; Gobnyan meulayang di ateueh sayeub angén.
Psalms18:12 Gobnyan geupeusöm droe lam seupôt that-that; awan ngon reudôk nyang teubai jijak keulileng Gobnyan.
Psalms18:13 Kilat dikeue Gobnyan
Psalms18:14 Laju Tuhan lagée geulanteue di angkasa; Nyang Mahamanyang geupeudeungoe su droe Gobnyan.
Psalms18:15 Gobnyan laju geutimbak dumna aneuk-aneuk panah Geuh dan geupeu crebre musoh; geusama kilat meu ulang-ulang
Psalms18:16 Tanoh lam laôt jibeudôh meubura dan gaki bumoe pih teubuka watée Tuhan geudot musoh Gobnyan deungon meureuka.
Psalms18:17 Di ateueh Tuhan geu sunyueng jaroe Geuh; laju geumat ulôn dan geutarek lam tuwie ié nyang lhok.
Psalms18:18 Gobnyan geupeuseulamat ulôn nibak musoh nyang peukasa dan nibak ureuëng-ureuëng nyang jibanci ulôn
Psalms18:19 Awaknyan jiseurang ulôn watée ulôn jitimpa lé beuncana
Psalms18:20 Gobnyan geupeubeubaih ulôn nibak bala bahya dan geupeuseulamat ulôn sabab Gobnyan geugaséh keu ulôn.
Psalms18:21 Tuhan geubalaih buet ulôn nyang beutôi; Gobnyan geubri beureukat keu ulôn sabab ulôn hana salah.
Psalms18:22 Ulôn taát ubak peurintah Tuhandan hana lôn paleng nibak Allah ulôn.
Psalms18:23 Banmandum huköm Gobnyan ulôn deungoe
Psalms18:24 Gobnyan geuteupeue bahwa ulôn nyoe hana cacat ngon teucela dan geupeujiôh droe nibak keusalahan.
Psalms18:25 Teuma Tuhan geubalaih buet ulôn nyang beuna sabab Gobnyan geuteupeue ulôn nyoe hana meusalah.
Psalms18:26 Tuhan
Psalms18:27 Keu ureuëng nyang suci Droeneueh peugah Droeneueh suci
Psalms18:28 Ureuëng nyang miyueb até Tuhan peuseulamat
Psalms18:29 Droeneueh puhu panyôt ulôn; Tuhan Allah ulôn nyang peu peungeuh ulôn nibak seupôt.
Psalms18:30 Droeneueh neupeuteuga ulôn mangat ulôn heuntam musoh; deungon tulông Allah ulôn peuhanco peutahanan awaknyan.
Psalms18:31 Buet Po teu Allah sampoereuna janji Tuhan jeuet teupeucaya. Gobnyan lagée peurisai keu mandum ureuëng nyang meulindong nibak Gobnyan.
Psalms18:32 Sabab Tuhan kheueh Po teu Allah; Allah mantong nyang jeuet keu nyang bila geutanyoe.
Psalms18:33 Gobnyan kheueh Allah nyang ka geupeuteuga ulôn dan nyang peusaneut rot ulôn aman.
Psalms18:34 Gobnyan nyang peuteuga gaki ulôn lagée gaki rusa
Psalms18:35 Gobnyan nyang latih ulôn pakriban cara muprang
Psalms18:36 Tuhan
Psalms18:37 Droeneueh jaga ulôn mangat ulôn bék keunong teun
Psalms18:38 Laju ulôn tiyeub musoh lôn dan lôn peutaloe awaknyan
Psalms18:39 Ulôn seumpom awaknyan sampoe hana hasele jibeudôh
Psalms18:40 Neubri ubak lôn teunaga mangat hase lôn muprang
Psalms18:41 Sampoe musoh lôn neuyue plueng nibak ulôn; dan soemantong ureuëng nyang jibanci ubak ulôn Tuhan neupeubinasa.
Psalms18:42 Awaknyan jikliek ngon jiteumawök
Psalms18:43 Awaknyan ulôn peureumok lagée abée nyang jipot lé angén
Psalms18:44 Droeneueh neupeubeubaih ulôn nibak kawöm nyang doraka
Psalms18:45 Ureuëng-ureuëng aséng tundok ubak ulôn dan jitaát watée jideungoe peue nyang lôn peurintah.
Psalms18:46 Beuhe awaknyan ka gadôh; awaknyan yo dan jiteubiet lam kuta jih.
Psalms18:47 Tuhan udeb! Teupujoe kheueh nyang bila lôn! Peu agong kheueh keubeusaran Allah nyang peuseulamat lôn!
Psalms18:48 Gobnyan geubri keulôn meunang ateueh musoh lôn; bansa-bansa geupeutaklok dikeue ulôn
Psalms18:49 geupeuseulamat ulôn nibak lawan-lawan lôn. Tuhan
Psalms18:50 Lé sababnyan ulôn peuagong Droeneueh lamkawan bansa-bansa
Psalms18:51 Po teu Allah geupeumeunang nyang paleng rayeuk ateueh raja Gobnyan

Psalms19:2 Langét dimanyang jipeugah keuagongan Allah
Psalms19:3 Uroe nyang keu sa jijak peusampoe ubak uroe nyang seulanjut jih; malam nyang sa jijak peukisah ubak malam nyang singoh nyan teuma.
Psalms19:4 Hana nyang mariet atawa jimupoh cakra
Psalms19:5 Teuma seruan Gobnyan meuguncang bansaboh donya
Psalms19:6 bak watée beungoh sang surya nyan jiteubiet lagée teungku linto agam nyang geuteubiet lam kama gobnyan
Psalms19:7 Gobnyan geulisi langét phon nibak ujong u ujong; hana nyang hana keunong nibak seu-uem gobnyan.

Psalms19:9 Peuratoran Tuhan nyan teupat

Psalms22:1 Keu teupimpén kor. Meunurot lagu: Rusa óh watée beungoh. Zabur Nabi Daud.

Psalms22:3 Ya Allah ulôn
Psalms22:4 Teuma Droeneueh na kheueh Raja Nyang Mahasuci
Psalms22:5 Indatu kamoe meuharab that ubak Droeneueh
Psalms22:6 Awaknyan jimeulakée ubak Droeneueh dan peuseuliseh nibak meubagoe bala; awaknyan meuharab dan hana neupeukeucewa.
Psalms22:7 Teuma ulôn nyoe na kheueh glang
Psalms22:8 Banmandum ureuëng nyang kalon ulôn jihina lôn

Psalms22:10 Droeneueh kheueh nyang peuteubiet ulôn lam pruet ma
Psalms22:11 Yoh phon lahé u donya nyoe
Psalms22:12 Bék kheueh jiôh
Psalms22:13 Lagée kawan banteng
Psalms22:14 Awaknyan jipeukeue ulôn deungon babah jih teuhah
Psalms22:15 Teunaga ulôn habéh lagée ié nyang rho
Psalms22:16 Rukuéng ulôn tho kreng lagée pempeng kaca
Psalms22:17 Ulôn jikeupong lé geurombolan ureuëng jeuhet; lagée kawan asée awaknyan jiudom ulôn

Psalms22:19 Awaknyan jibagi-bagi peukayan ulôn
Psalms22:20 Teutapi Droeneueh
Psalms22:21 Neupeusie kheueh nyawöng ulôn nibak mata peudeueng
Psalms22:22 Ulôn hana meudaya

Psalms22:25 Sabab Gobnyan hana geupandang hina keu ureuëng nyang teuseupet
Psalms22:26 Di teungoh ureuëng ramé nyang meusapat teutab ulôn pujoe Droeneueh
Psalms22:27 Ureuëng gasien teuma jimakheun sampoe troe; ureuëng nyang teuka ubak Tuhan teuma jipujoe Geuhnyan. Seumoga gata seujahteura siumu masa!
Psalms22:28 Banmandum bansa teuma ji-ingat ubak Tuhan dan teuma jiriwang ubak Gobnyan
Psalms22:29 Sabab Tuhan kheueh nyang mat kuasa

Psalms22:31 Angkatan-angkatan nyang teuka dudoe meubakti ubak Tuhan
Psalms22:32 Ubak bansa nyang lahé dudoe teuma jipeusampoe bahwa Tuhan ka geupeuseulamat umat Gobnyan.
Psalms23:1 Zabur Nabi Daud. Tuhan lagée sidroe ureuëng meurabe keu ulôn

Psalms23:4 Bahpi ulôn rhot lam barieh nyang seupôt
Psalms23:5 Droeneueh nyang keubah khanuri keu ulôn dikeue mata lawan ulôn. Droeneueh neusambot ulôn lagée jamé nyang mulia. Droeneueh nyang peuhidang keu ulôn ié jieb nyang lazat meulimpah ruah.
Psalms23:6 Ulôn teupeue Droeneueh jroh keu ulôn

Psalms31:1 Keu teupimpén kor. Zabur Nabi Daud.
Psalms31:2 Ubak Droeneueh ulôn meulindong
Psalms31:3 deungoe kheueh ulôn dan peubeubaih kheueh ulôn deungon sigra. Neupeujeuet kheueh keu ulôn lagée gunong batée teumpat ulôn meulindong
Psalms31:4 Nyoe
Psalms31:5 Neupeulheueh kheueh ulôn nibak taron nyang jipasang keu ulôn
Psalms31:6 U dalam jaroe Droeneueh ulôn seurah droe; Droeneueh peubeubaih ulôn
Psalms31:7 Ureuëng nyang seumah beurala Droeneueh banci; teuma ulôn teutab peucaya ubak Tuhan.
Psalms31:8 Ulôn geumbira dan meusukaria sabab Droeneueh teutab neugaséh keu ulôn. Droeneueh neungieng deurita ulôn dan neupakoe that keu apoh apah lôn.
Psalms31:9 Droeneueh hana neupeubiyeu ulôn jiteun lé musoh
Psalms31:10 Neugaséh kheueh ulôn
Psalms31:11 Udeb lôn habéh lam peundeuritaan
Psalms31:12 Ulôn habéh jipeukém lé banmandum musoh lôn
Psalms31:13 Ulôn jipeutuwoe lagée jituwoe keu ureuëng maté
Psalms31:14 Dipat mantong na keusosahan; ulôn deungoe jimeusáh-sáh lé musoh lôn. Awaknyan ka sipakat jilawan ulôn
Psalms31:15 Teuma ulôn meuharab ubak Droeneueh
Psalms31:16 Droeneueh sabe neupeulara ulôn; neupeuseulamat kheueh ulôn nibak musoh-musoh lôn
Psalms31:17 Seumoga Droeneueh jeuet nibak hamba Neuh; neupeuseulamat kheueh ulôn sabab gaséh Droeneueh.
Psalms31:18 Bék neupeubiyeu ulôn meuteumé malée
Psalms31:19 Neusumpai kheueh babah bubena ureuëng nyang sulet nyang deungon sombong jipeuhina ureuëng jujoe.
Psalms31:20 Padubna le meulimpah-limpah keubaiékan Droeneueh nyang Droeneueh keubah keu ureuëng taqwa! Soe mantong ureuëng jingieng keubaiékan nyang Droeneueh peubuet
Psalms31:21 Droeneueh söm awaknyan lam lindongan Droeneueh lé siasat ureuëng jeuhet; neujaga awaknyan lam lindongan Droeneueh ateueh peue nyang jitudoh lé lawan.
Psalms31:22 Teupujoe kheueh Tuhan! Nyang lumpah that hebat geunaséh Gobnyan keu ulôn
Psalms31:23 Teungoh lôn bingong lôn sangka Tuhan geuböih ulôn nibak hadirat Gobnyan. Teuma Gobnyan ka geudeungoe peue nyang ulôn lakée watée ulôn meulakée ubak Gobnyan.
Psalms31:24 Cinta kheueh Tuhan
Psalms31:25 Peuteuga dan peukong kheueh até gata
Psalms32:1 Zabur Nabi Daud. Ca-e peulajaran. Mubahgia kheueh ureuëng nyang desya jih geupeu amphon
Psalms32:2 Mubahgia kheueh ureuëng nyang buet jih jeuhet hana geu itong lé Tuhan
Psalms32:3 Simantong ulôn hana lôn aku desya lôn
Psalms32:4 Uroe malam Droeneueh neuteugon ulôn
Psalms32:5 Laju lôn aku desya ulôn ubak Droeneueh
Psalms32:6 Sababnyan tieb-tieb ureuëng nyang salah nyang sigetjih bék putôh-putôh jimeudoá óh watée jihnyan jirasa ka meukarat
Psalms32:7 Droeneueh kheueh teumpat ulôn musöm
Psalms32:8 Tuhan meufeureuman
Psalms32:9 Bék lagée guda nyang hana meuakai
Psalms32:10 Ureuëng meudesya meutumpôk-tumpôk jitimpok deungon seungsara; teuma ureuëng nyang meuharab ubak Tuhanteutab geupeulindong lé geunaséh Gobnyan.
Psalms32:11 Hai ureuëng-ureuëng saléeh
Psalms33:1 Hai ureuëng-ureuëng saléeh
Psalms33:2 Meusyukoe kheueh ubak Tuhan deungon keucapi
Psalms33:3 Neu ca-e kheueh lagu nyang barô keu Tuhan
Psalms33:4 Banmandum peue nyang geukheun lé Tuhan jeuet teupeucaya; Gobnyan seutia ubak peue mantong nyang geupeubuet.
Psalms33:5 Gobnyan geucinta ubak keujujoran dan keuadelan; bansaboh bumoe peunoh deungon gaséh Gobnyan.
Psalms33:6 Tuhan geubri peurintah
Psalms33:7 Banmandum ié laôt geugumpôi bak saboh teumpat
Psalms33:8 Bah kheueh bansaboh bumoe jitakot keu Tuhandan peunduduek donya jihoreumat Gobnyan.
Psalms33:9 Sabab Gobnyan meusabda
Psalms33:10 Tuhan geupeu bateue peue nyang jireuncana lé bansa-bansa
Psalms33:11 Teuma reuncana Tuhan teutab meuteun
Psalms33:12 Mubahgia kheueh bansa nyang jiaku Tuhan sibagoe Allah jih
Psalms33:13 Didalam syeuruga Tuhan geukalon u miyueb
Psalms33:14 Nibak takhta Gobnyan Tuhan geupeurati banmandum makhluk nyang tinggai di ateueh bumoe.
Psalms33:15 Gobnyan kheueh nyang peusaneut até awaknyan
Psalms33:16 Raja hana hase meunang deungon le tantra
Psalms33:17 Guda hana hase teucok keubangga mangat jeuet keumeunang
Psalms33:18 Tuhan geujaga ureuëng-ureuëng nyang taqwa nyang meuharabkan geunaséh Gobnyan.
Psalms33:19 Gobnyan geupeuseulamat awaknyan nibak mawöt
Psalms33:20 Teuma geutanyoe meuharab ubak Tuhan
Psalms33:21 Geutanyoe meusukaria sabab Gobnyan dan peucaya ubak nan Gobnyan nyang suci.
Psalms33:22 Seumoga kamoe teutab Droeneueh gaséh
Psalms34:1 Zabur Nabi Daud
Psalms34:2 Ulôn keuneuk meusyukoe ubak Tuhan tieb-tieb watée
Psalms34:3 Ulôn keuneuk meubangga droe sabab buet Tuhan; seumoga ureuëng nyang teutindéeh ngon teuseupet jideungoe dan meugeumbira.
Psalms34:4 Agong kheueh Tuhan meusajan deungon ulôn
Psalms34:5 Ulôn meudoá ubak Tuhan
Psalms34:6 Ureuëng teuseupet ngon teutindéeh meuharab ubak Gobnyan dan meugeumbira
Psalms34:7 Ureuëng manglang jimeuhôi dan Tuhan geujaweueb
Psalms34:8 Malaikat Tuhan geukawai ureuëng nyang taqwa
Psalms34:9 Rasa kheueh keudroe pakriban get jih Tuhan
Psalms34:10 Horeumat kheueh Tuhan
Psalms34:11 Singa-singa pih deuk sabab kureueng peunajoh; teuma ureuëng nyang seumah Tuhan hana kureueng sapeue pih.
Psalms34:12 Deungoe kheueh
Psalms34:13 Peu kheueh na meuheuët mangat panyang umu dan tanékmat nyang gét-gét?
Psalms34:14 Bék tapeuteubiet tutoe haba nyang jeuhet
Psalms34:15 Peujiôh kheueh nyang jeuhet
Psalms34:16 Tuhan teutab jingieng ateueh ureuëng saléeh
Psalms34:17 Teuma ureuëng nyang jipeubuet jeuhet geulawan lé Gobnyan
Psalms34:18 Meunyoe ureuëng saléeh nyang meuhôi
Psalms34:19 Tuhan tô that ubak ureuëng nyang peu-ubit até; Gobnyan geupeuseulamat ureuëng nyang ka patah seumangat.
Psalms34:20 Lé that peundeuritaan ureuëng nyang jroh-jroh
Psalms34:21 Tuboh jih teutab geujaga lé Tuhan
Psalms34:22 Ureuëng jeuhet teuma maté sabab buet jih nyang jeuhet
Psalms34:23 Tuhan geupeuseulamat hamba-hamba Gobnyan; nyang meulindong nibak Gobnyan hana teuma geuhuköm.
Psalms35:1 Zabur Nabi Daud. Tuhan
Psalms35:2 Neucok kheueh utar-utar dan peurisai Droeneueh
Psalms35:3 Beuôt kheueh leumbeng dan kapak Droeneueh keu neulawan ureuëng nyang tiyeub ulôn. Neupeugah kheueh ubak ulôn bahwa Droeneueh nyang peuseulamat lôn.
Psalms35:4 Bah kheueh ureuëng nyang keuneuk poh maté lôn neupeutaloe dan neupeumalée. Bah kheueh ureuëng nyang meusapat dan mupakat jijak lawan lôn surot kheueh lam keuadaan bingong.
Psalms35:5 Bah kheueh awaknyan geupeulet lé malaikat Tuhan
Psalms35:6 Bah kheueh awaknyan jipeulet lé malaikat Tuhannibak jalan nyang seupôt dan glue.
Psalms35:7 Teusia payah mantong awaknyan jiteun taron keu ulôn
Psalms35:8 Bah kheueh awaknyan keunong binasa deungon hana jisangka-sangka. Bah kheueh awaknyan meucarueh lam taron jih keudroe laju reubah dan binasa.
Psalms35:9 Teuma ulôn meusurak-surak sabab lé Tuhan
Psalms35:10 Deungon sikeubit jih ulôn peugah
Psalms35:11 Saksi-saksi nyang jeuhet jibeudôh jijak lawan ulôn
Psalms35:12 Jroh nibak ulôn awaknyan balaih ngon nyang jeuhet; ulôn ngob lam putôh asa.
Psalms35:13 Watée awaknyan deumam
Psalms35:14 lagée lôn meudoá keu sidroe syedara atawa keu rakan lôn nyang paleng krab. Ulôn teukui ulôn mo keu awaknyan
Psalms35:15 Teuma bak watée ulôn sosah
Psalms35:16 hana putôh-putôh awaknyan jihina sidroe ureuëng lapée
Psalms35:17 Trok án pajan
Psalms35:18 Teuma ulôn meusyukoe ubak Droeneueh diteungoh umat Droeneueh
Psalms35:19 Bék neupeubiyeu ulôn jipeumeu én lé ureuëng nyang musoh ngon lôn deungon hana sabab. Bék neupeubiyeu ulôn jisurak lé ureuëng nyang banci keu ulôn deungon hana sabab.
Psalms35:20 Haba awaknyan hana ramah; awaknyan jipeugot reuncana keuneuk teumipée ateueh ureuëng nyang udeb rukon bahgia.
Psalms35:21 Awaknyan jikliek-kliek u ateueh ulôn sira jipeugah bahwa awaknyan ka lheueh jikalon peue nyang ulôn peubuet.
Psalms35:22 Teuma Droeneueh
Psalms35:23 Beudôh kheueh neubila peukara ulôn
Psalms35:24 Neubila kheueh ulôn
Psalms35:25 Bék neupeubiyeu awaknyan jimariet lam até
Psalms35:26 Bah kheueh ureuëng nyang harôk jikalon seungsara lôn jeuet keu bingong dan meuteumé malée. Bah kheueh ureuëng nyang jipeusombong droe keulôn geuhina dan geupeumalée.
Psalms35:27 Seumoga ureuëng nyang keuneuk ngieng ateueh ulôn geupeubeuna meusurak dan meugeumbira. Seumoga awaknyan meu ulang-ulang jipeugah
Psalms35:28 Dan ulôn teuma lôn jak peugah keuadelan Droeneueh
Psalms36:1 Keu teupimpén kor. Nibak Nabi Daud
Psalms36:2 Desya jimariet lam reulong até ureuëng jeuhet
Psalms36:3 Jihnyan jianggab droe jih nyan lumpah hebat
Psalms36:4 Tutoe haba jih jeuhet dan peunoh tipée daya
Psalms36:5 Sira ji-éh di ateueh teumpat éh pi jipeugöt reuncana keuhai buet nyang jeuhet nyang harôh jipeubuet; peue mantong buet jih hana nyang jroh
Psalms36:6 Tuhan
Psalms36:7 Keubaiékan Droeneueh meujulang manyang santeut éuet gunong
Psalms36:8 Hana ék teukira gaséh Droeneueh
Psalms36:9 Awaknyan puih deungon peunajoh nyang na meulimpah di Baét Droeneueh
Psalms36:10 Droeneueh kheueh panghulée udeb mandum makhluk
Psalms36:11 Seumoga Droeneueh teutab neugaséh keu ureuëng nyang jituri Droeneueh
Psalms36:12 Bék neupeubiyeu ulôn jiseurang lé ureuëng cungkak
Psalms36:13 Ngieng kheueh
Psalms37:1 Nibak Nabi Daud. Bék kheueh apoh apah sabab ureuëng jeuhet
Psalms37:2 Sabab awaknyan lagée naleueng nyang gadôh
Psalms37:3 Peucaya kheueh ubak Tuhan
Psalms37:4 Mita kheueh keubahgiaan ubak Tuhan
Psalms37:5 Peujok kheueh udeb gata ubak Tuhan
Psalms37:6 Gobnyan geupeugah keuseutiaan gata lagée trang
Psalms37:7 Preh kheueh Tuhan deungon até nyang teunang
Psalms37:8 Bék bagaih beungéh dan seu-uem até
Psalms37:9 Sabab ureuëng nyang jipeubuet jeuhet geupeuhanco
Psalms37:10 Ureuëng jeuhet reujang gadôh
Psalms37:11 Ureuëng nyang miyueb até nyan kheueh nyang jeuet keuwaréh tanoh nyan
Psalms37:12 Ureuëng jeuhet jireuncana nyang jeuhet ateueh ureuëng gét
Psalms37:13 Teuma lé Tuhan geupeukém ureuëng jeuhet nyang lagée nyan
Psalms37:14 Ureuëng jeuhet jisuet peudeueng lam sarông dan aneuk panah pi laju jitimbak keu jipoh maté ureuëng gasien dan ureuëng seungsara
Psalms37:15 Teuma ureuëng jeuhet nyan teutôb deungon peudeueng jih keudroe
Psalms37:16 Barang nyang na bacut atra ureuëng nyang jroh leubeh meuyuém nibak barang atra ureuëng jeuhet nyang meulimpah ruah.
Psalms37:17 Sabab kuasa ureuëng jeuhet teuma geuwiet sampoe patah lé Tuhan
Psalms37:18 Tuhan geujaga udeb ureuëng saléeh
Psalms37:19 Bak watée meukarat awaknyan hana teuma meudeurita
Psalms37:20 Teuma
Psalms37:21 Ureuëng jeuhet watée jingui atra gob hana jipulang
Psalms37:22 Ureuëng nyang geubri beureukat lé Tuhan teuma jeuet keuwaréh tanoh nyan
Psalms37:23 Tuhan geubimbéng ureuëng nibak rot nyang harôh geulalu
Psalms37:24 Meunyoe rhot
Psalms37:25 Watée ulôn muda sampoe ka tuha lagée nyoe
Psalms37:26 Gobnyan sabe geubri pinjam dan geujok mantong
Psalms37:27 Tinggai laju buet jeuhet
Psalms37:28 Sabab Tuhan geucinta ubak buet nyang ade dan gét
Psalms37:29 Ureuëng saléeh jeuet keu waréh nibak tanoh nyan
Psalms37:30 Ureuëng gét meunyoe jipeugah haba gét that bijaksana
Psalms37:31 Huköm Po teu Allah na teukeubah lam até gobnyan
Psalms37:32 Ureuëng jroh-jroh sabe jiluem lé ureuëng jeuhet nyang jimita keuseumpatan mangat jipoh maté.
Psalms37:33 teuma Tuhan hana geupeubiyeu ureuëng nyan rhot lam jaroe musoh
Psalms37:34 Meuharab kheueh ubak Tuhan dan taát kheueh ubak peurintah Gobnyan
Psalms37:35 Ulôn ka lheueh lôn ngieng ureuëng jeuhet nyang galak meusulet ngon raya haba; jihnyan lagée bak kayée nyang luhu ngon ukeue nyang lhok.
Psalms37:36 Watée ulôn jak
Psalms37:37 Neungieng kheueh ateueh ureuëng nyang jroh dan jujoe até; ureuëng nyang galak keu damé
Psalms37:38 Teuma ureuëng nyang meudesya geupeubinasa; keuturonan awaknyan geupeuhanco.
Psalms37:39 Tuhan geupeuseulamat ureuëng saléeh
Psalms37:40 Gobnyan geutulông dan geupeuseulamat awaknyan
Psalms38:1 Zabur Nabi Daud watée geupeuseumah keureubeuen peuingat.
Psalms38:2 Tuhan
Psalms38:3 Aneuk panah Droeneueh nyang neu timbak ateueh ulôn sampoe beusot dan luka tuboh lôn
Psalms38:4 Ulôn sakét brat sabab Droeneueh beungéh; hana nyang seuhat nibak tuboh lôn sabab desya lôn.
Psalms38:5 Ulôn ngob lam ié raya keusalahan lôn
Psalms38:6 Luka meucabok nyang na nibak ulôn ka meunanoh dan meubée khéub
Psalms38:7 Ulôn meuteukui dan meubungkok
Psalms38:8 Deumam ngon seu-uem lagée apui keunong bak tuboh lôn
Psalms38:9 Ulôn ka reumok hanco meukeupeng dan teunaga lôn pi habéh
Psalms38:10 Tuhan
Psalms38:11 Jantong lôn yo meugám-gám
Psalms38:12 Kawöm dan rakan ulôn jiwéeh sabab peunyakét nyang na nibak ulôn
Psalms38:13 Ureuëng nyang keuneuk poh maté lôn ka jijak teun taron; dan nyang keuneuk peuceulaka lôn laju jiancam keuneuk poh ulôn.
Psalms38:14 Teuma ulôn lagée ureuëng tulo nyang hana teudeungoe sapeue
Psalms38:15 Keubit
Psalms38:16 Teuma ulôn meuharab ubak Droeneueh
Psalms38:17 Bék neupeubiyeu musoh ulôn galak jingieng ulôn nyang susah lagée nyoe bagoe
Psalms38:18 Ulôn rab reubah
Psalms38:19 Ulôn meungaku mandum desya lôn; até ulôn gundah watée lôn pike keusalah lôn.
Psalms38:20 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang jimeumusoh ngon ulôn ramé dan teuga-teuga
Psalms38:21 Ureuëng nyang jibalah buet nyang jroh deungon nyang jeuhet jimeumusoh ngon lôn sabab ulôn lôn peubuet nyang jroh.
Psalms38:22 Ya Tuhan
Psalms38:23 Neuteuka kheueh bubagaih neutulông ulôn

Psalms40:1 Keu teupimpén kor. Zabur Nabi Daud.
Psalms40:2 Deungon saba ulôn preh-preh Tuhan tulông; laju Gobnyan geupakoe ulôn dan geudeungoe peue nyang ulôn lakée.

Psalms41:8 Banmandum nyang jibanci keu lôn jimeusáh-sáh; awaknyan jipeugah hai nyang paleng brôk keuhai ulôn.
