Galatians4:5 Ngon lagée nyan Gobnyan geupeu beubaih ureuëng-ureuëng nyang udeb dimiyueb keukuasaan huköm agama; mangat tanyoe pih hase jeuet keu aneuëk-aneuëk Allah.
Galatians4:6 Sabab gata na kheueh aneuëk-aneuëk Allah
Galatians4:7 Ngon lagée nyan
Galatians4:8 Yoh watée ilée gata hana taturi keu Allah
Galatians4:9 Teuma bak watéenyoe gata ka taturi keu Allah
Galatians4:10 Gata tapeuna uroe raya bak uroe-uroe nyang ka teupeuteuntée
Galatians4:11 Ulôn khawate
Galatians4:12 Syedara-syedara! Ulôn meulakée ngon meuharab that mangat gata beujeuet lagée ulôn. Sabab ulôn pi ka jeuet lagée gata. Gata hana tapeubuet musapeue pih nyang salah ateueh ulôn.
Galatians4:13 Gata teuntée mantong teuingat peue sabab jih bak awaiphon ulôn peusampoe Haba Gét ubak gata. Sabab jih na kheueh ulôn rhot bak sakét.
Galatians4:14 Bak watée nyan gata hana meurasa luwat keu ulôn
Galatians4:15 Gata mubahgia that bak watée nyan. Teuma bak watée nyoe
Galatians4:16 Peu kheueh gata bak watéenyoe ka gata anggab ulôn sibagoe musoh gata
Galatians4:17 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang laén nyan ngon peunoh seumangat jimita gata
Galatians4:18 Beutôi gét that beuna seumangat lam hai-hai nyang gét
Galatians4:19 Aneuëk-aneuëk ulôn nyang lôn cinta! Ulôn bak watée nyoe ka meudeurita lom sabab lé gata. Ulôn meudeurita lagée sidroe inong meudeurita watée jipeulahé aneuëk. Ulôn teuma sabe meudeurita
Galatians4:20 Ulôn meuheuét that keuneuk meugumpôi lamkawan gata bak watée nyoe
Galatians4:21 Syedara-syedara nyang keuneuk udeb dimiyueb keukuasaan huköm agama
Galatians4:22 Disinan na teutuléh bahwa Nabi Ibrahim na dua droe aneuëk: Mak nibak aneuëk nyang sidroe na kheueh sidroe namiet
Galatians4:23 Aneuëk nibak inong namiet lahé jih lazem sabab keuheundak manusia. Teuma aneuëk nyang lahé nibak inong nyang meurdehka
Galatians4:24 Nyoe jeuet tapeuguna sibagoe kiasan. Dua droe inong nyan na kheueh miseue lagée dua boh janji: nyang sidroe asai jih nibak Gunong Sinai – nyan kheueh Hagar; aneuëk-aneuëk inong nyan lahé sibagoe namiet.
Galatians4:25 Dan
Galatians4:26 Teuma Yerusalem nyang na lam syeuruga nyan na kheueh Yerusalem nyang meurdehka
Galatians4:27 Sabab lam Alkitab teutuléh lagée nyoe
Galatians4:28 Syedara-syedara! Gata keudroe na kheueh aneuëk-aneuëk Allah nyang teupeulahé sabab janji Allah; gata saban lagée Nabi Ishaq.
Galatians4:29 Bak watée nyan aneuëk nyang lahé meunurot keuheundak manusia
Galatians4:30 Teuma peu kheueh nyang teutuléh lam Alkitab? Disinan teutuléh lagéenyoe: “Use kheueh namiet inong nyan meusajan ngon aneuëk jih
Galatians4:31 Ngon lagée nyan
Galatians5:1 Tanyoe jinoenyoe meurdehka
Galatians5:2 Ingat
Galatians5:3 Sigoeteuk lôn peuingat keu ureuëng nyang jilakée meusunat
Galatians5:4 Meunyoe gata meu-useuha tameugét lom teuma ngon Allah rot huköm agama
Galatians5:5 Teuma nibak kamoe
Galatians5:6 Sabab meunyoe tanyoe ka meusaboh ngon Isa Almaseh
Galatians5:7 Yohmasa ilée gata meujuang ngon gét! Dan jinoenyoe pakon gata hana taát lé ubak keuheundak Po teu Allah? Soe nyang ka peusuna gata?
Galatians5:8 Pasti nyang peubuet nyan bukon Allah nyang ka geutawök gata!
Galatians5:9 “Rago nyang bacut teuma jipeukeumang banmandum teupông nyang ka teulawok
Galatians5:10 Bah kheueh meunan ulôn teutab mantong peucaya bahwa gata hana ta anut peundirian nyang laén
Galatians5:11 Keuhai ulôn
Galatians5:12 Leubeh gét ureuëng-ureuëng nyang peukaru pikeran gata nyan jiteubiet mantong lam jeumaáh!
Galatians5:13 Gata banmandum teutawök beujeuet keu ureuëng nyang meurdehka. Teuma bék kheueh gata peuguna keubeubaihan gata nyan hana putôh-putôh gata peubuet peue nyang gata galak. Nyang sikeubiet jih
Galatians5:14 Banmandum huköm agama ka teupeusaboh lam peurintah nyang saboh nyoe
Galatians5:15 Teuma meunyoe gata saléng tameukrok sabe keudroe-droe
Galatians5:16 Nyang ulôn meukeusut lagée nyoe: Bah kheueh Roh Allah geubimbéng gata dan bék udeb meunurot tabiát manusia.
Galatians5:17 Sabab keuheundak manusia hana sisuai ngon keuheundak Roh Allah
Galatians5:18 Teuma meunyoe Roh Allah nyang pimpén gata
Galatians5:19 Keuheundak tabiát manusia deuh that nibak buet-buet nyang cabui
Galatians5:20 nibak teuseumah beurala dan iéleumé guna-guna; nibak meumusoh-musoh
Galatians5:21 meunan cit picék até
Galatians5:22 Teuma
Galatians5:23 awaknyan miyueb até
Galatians5:24 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang ka jeuet keu milék Isa Almaseh
Galatians5:25 Roh Allah ka geubri keugeutanyoe udeb nyang barô; ngon sabab nyan Roh Allah cit teuma nyang kuasa lam udeb geutanyoe.
Galatians5:26 Geutanyoe bék jeuet keu ureuëng sombong
Galatians6:1 Syedara-syedara! Meunyoe sidroe-droe ureuëng meuteumé teungoh jipeubuet desya
Galatians6:2 Bah kheueh gata saléng tabantu tatanggong beuban ureuëng laén
Galatians6:3 Meunyoe sidroe-droe ureuëng jipike jih nyan leubeh peunteng
Galatians6:4 Tieb-tieb ureuëng bah kheueh jipeureksa droe jih keudroe peu kheueh droe jih nyan gét atawa hana. Meunyoe gét
Galatians6:5 Sabab maséng-maséng ureuëng harôh jiseuôn tanggong jaweueb jih keudroe.
Galatians6:6 Ureuëng nyang teurimong peue nyang geupeurunoe lé Almaseh
Galatians6:7 Bék sampoe keunong peungeut. Allah hana jeuet teupeumeuén! Peue nyang jipula
Galatians6:8 Meunyoe jipula meunurot tabiát manusia nyang na nibak jih
Galatians6:9 Ngon sabab nyan
Galatians6:10 Ngon lagée nyan
Galatians6:11 Simak kheueh beugét-gét bagian nyoe nyang ulôn tuléh ngon hurof nyang rayeuk-rayeuk.
Galatians6:12 Ureuëng nyang jitem peubangga droe ngon hai-hai nyang lahé
Galatians6:13 Ureuëng-ureuëng jiseutôt atoran meukatan nyan pih hana jipeujak lagée huköm agama. Teuma awaknyan meuharab mangat gata tameukatan
Galatians6:14 Teuma ulôn mubacut pi hana kutem peubangga droe keuhai peue-peue mantong
Galatians6:15 Meukatan atawa hana meukatan
Galatians6:16 Keu ureuëng nyang udeb lagée peundirian nyan
Galatians6:17 Óh lheueh nyan
Galatians6:18 Seumoga Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh sabe geubri beureukat keugata banmandum. Amin. Horeumat kamoe
Ephesians1:1 Umat Allah di Efesus
Ephesians1:2 Ulôn
Ephesians1:3 Teupujoe kheueh Allah
Ephesians1:4 Sigohlom donya nyoe geucebta
Ephesians1:5 teuma Gobnyan ka geupeuteuntée leubeh ilée bahwa rot Isa Almaseh
Ephesians1:6 Teupujoe kheueh Allah nyang agong
Ephesians1:7 Sabab
Ephesians1:8 Gobnyan geupeubuet lagée nyan sabab Gobnyan keubiet that geugaséh keutanyoe
Ephesians1:9 Meunurot nyang geumeuhéuet keudroe
Ephesians1:10 Reuncana nyan na kheueh mangat peue-peue mantong
Ephesians1:11 Allah geupeubuet peue-peue mantong meunurot nyang geumeuhéuet dan peunutôh geuh keudroe. Yoh awaikon Gobnyan ka geupiléh tanyoe sabab Gobnyan meuharab geutanyoe jeuet keu umat geuh sabab meusaboh ngon Almaseh.
Ephesians1:12 Bah kheueh geutanyoe
Ephesians1:13 Gata pi ka jeuet keu umat Allah watée gata deungoe peusan Po teu Allah
Ephesians1:14 Roh nyan kheueh sibagoe jaminan bahwa geutanyoe tateurimong peue nyang ka geupeu janji lé Po teu Allah ubak umat Gobnyan. Nyoe teubri keuyakénan ubak geutanyoe bahwa Po teu Allah teuma geupeubeubaih umat Gobnyan. Teupujoe kheueh Allah sabab keuagongan Gobnyan!
Ephesians1:15 Ngon sabab nyan
Ephesians1:16 ulôn hana putôh-putôh lôn lakée teurimong gaséh ubak Allah keuhai gata. Sabe lôn teuôh nan gata watée ulôn meudoá.
Ephesians1:17 Ulôn meulakée mangat Allah Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh
Ephesians1:18 Ulôn meulakée mangat Allah geubuka pikeran gata sampoe jeuet keu trang; ngon lagée nyan gata muphom peue nyang gata teumé meuharab nibak Allah nyang ka geutawök gata. Meunan cit mangat gata tateupeue padub na jai beureukat-beureukat nyang ceudah meulimpah geukeubah lé Allah keu umat Gobnyan;
Ephesians1:19 dan padub na hebat jih Allah geumubuet ngon peunoh kuasa lam droe geutanyoe nyang meuiman. Kuasa Allah nyan saban lagée kuasa nyang luwabiasa
Ephesians1:20 nyang geupeu guna watée geupeu udeb lom teuma Almaseh nibak maté dan geubri ubak Gobnyan jabatan nyang paleng manyang meusajan-sajan ngon Allah lam syeuruga.
Ephesians1:21 Jabatan Almaseh nyan jiôh leubeh manyang nibak jabatan bubena peumeurintah
Ephesians1:22 Allah geupeu taklok banmandum nyan dimiyueb keukuasaan Almaseh
Ephesians1:23 Jeumaáh na kheueh tuboh Almaseh
Ephesians2:1 Yoh watée ilée gata maté seucara rohani sabab gata meudesya dan gata iengkeue peue-peue nyang geupeurintah lé Allah.
Ephesians2:2 Bak watée nyan gata taseutôt keulazeman-keulazeman lam donya nyoe; ngon lagée nyan gata taát ubak peunguasa angkasa raya
Ephesians2:3 Yoh masa ilée tanyoe banmandum saban lagée awaknyan; tanyoe udeb meunurot tabiát manusia teuh keudroe dan tapeubuet peue nyang jipeugalak badan dan pikeran tanyoe. Bak watée nyan tanyoe na kheueh ureuëng-ureuëng nyang keunong meureuka Allah cit teuma
Ephesians2:4 Teuma padubna rayeuk jih keumurahan até Allah! Gobnyan keubiet that geugaséh geutanyoe
Ephesians2:5 sampoe watée tanyoe mantong maté seucara rohani sabab buet-buet tanyoe nyang teularang
Ephesians2:6 Sabab tanyoe meusaboh ngon Isa Almaseh
Ephesians2:7 Allah geupeubuet lagée nyan mangat bak jamén nyang teuma teuka
Ephesians2:8 Allah geugaséh gata
Ephesians2:9 
Ephesians2:10 Tanyoe na kheueh cebtaan Allah
Ephesians2:11 Syedara-syedara nyang kon ureuëng Yahudi! Ingat kheueh keuadaan gata yoh masa ilée: Gata jipeugah “ureuëng hana meusunat”
Ephesians2:12 Bak watée nyan gata hana meusaboh ngon Almaseh
Ephesians2:13 Teuma bak watée nyoe
Ephesians2:14 Sabab Almaseh keudroe nyang peudamé tanyoe. Gobnyan geupeu saboh ureuëng-ureuëng Yahudi dan ureuëng-ureuëng nyang bukon Yahudi jeuet keusaboh bansa. Beuton nyang peujiôh keu awaknyan
Ephesians2:15 Huköm agama Yahudi ngon peurintah-peurintah dan peuratoran-peuratoran jih ka geusampôh lé Almaseh mangat dua boh bansa nyan jeuet keusaboh bansa manusia barô
Ephesians2:16 Lé maté Gobnyan bak kayée saleb
Ephesians2:17 Nyang kheueh sabab jih Almaseh teuka sira geuba Haba Gét keuhai meudamé nyan ubak gata; bah kheueh keugata nyang kon ureuëng Yahudi nyang yoh awai ilée jiôh nibak Allah
Ephesians2:18 Ngon peurantaraan Almaseh
Ephesians2:19 Ngon sabab nyan
Ephesians2:20 Gata pih teupeudong ateueh dasai nyang ka jikeubah lé rasui-rasui dan nabi-nabi
Ephesians2:21 Gobnyan kheueh nyang suson banmandum bangunan nyan dan jeuet keu Baét Allah nyang khusos keu Tuhan.
Ephesians2:22 Sabab udeb meusaboh ngon Almaseh
Ephesians3:1 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn
Ephesians3:2 Teuntée gata katadeungoe bahwa Allah
Ephesians3:3 Allah geupeugah rahsia reuncana Gobnyan dan geupeugah nyan ubak ulôn. (Keuhainyoe ka ulôn tuléh di ateueh ngon ringkaih
Ephesians3:4 dan meunyoe gata baca nyan
Ephesians3:5 Yoh watée ilée rahsia nyan hántom na teubri keumanusia
Ephesians3:6 Rahasia nyan na kheueh lagée nyoe: Rot Haba Gét nyan
Ephesians3:7 Allah geubri ubak ulôn anugeurah – na kheueh tugaih – keuteupeusampoe Haba Gét nyan. Ulôn teurimong anugeurah nyan rot kuasa Allah nyang mubuet lam droe ulôn.
Ephesians3:8 Lam bandum umat Allah
Ephesians3:9 dan meunan cit mangat rot ulôn banmandum ureuëng jiteupeue pakriban Allah
Ephesians3:10 Meukeusut Allah na kheueh mangat bak watée nyoe
Ephesians3:11 Allah geupeubuet nyan sisuai ngon reuncana Gobnyan nyang keukai
Ephesians3:12 Ngon teumeuiman ubak Almaseh dan sabab meusaboh ngon Gobnyan
Ephesians3:13 Sabab nyan
Ephesians3:14 Ngon sabab nyan kheueh ulôn meuteuôt dikeue Bapak.
Ephesians3:15 Nibak Gobnyan kheueh tieb-tieb keuluwarga bah kheueh nyang na lam syeuruga meunan cit nyang na ateueh rhueng bumoe nyoe jiteurimong sifeuet Gobnyan nyang khusos.
Ephesians3:16 Ulôn meudoá seumoga Allah nyang mahamulia geutembri teupeukong batén gata ngon Roh Gobnyan.
Ephesians3:17 Seumoga teuma sabab gata meuiman ubak Almaseh
Ephesians3:18 Ulôn meudoá seumoga meusajan-sajan ngon banmandum umat Allah
Ephesians3:19 nyang ngon akai manusia hana hase jipike silhok-lhok jih. Seumoga gata taturi geunaséh Almaseh nyan
Ephesians3:20 Ngon kuasa Allah nyang biet-biet jimubuet lam tuboh geutanyoe
Ephesians3:21 Seumoga Allah teupeumulia tron meutron lam jeumaáh
Ephesians4:1 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn – sidroe ureuëng huköman
Ephesians4:2 Bah kheueh gata sabe miyueb até
Ephesians4:3 Useuha kheueh beu biet-biet keu udeb lam damé mangat meusaboh nyang ka geucebta lé Roh Allah teutab teupeulara.
Ephesians4:4 Teuma na saboh tuboh dan saboh Roh. Meunan cit gata teuhôi keu jeuet saboh harapan nyang sa.
Ephesians4:5 Teuma na sidroe Tuhan
Ephesians4:6 dan sidroe Allah nyang jeuet keu Bapak banmandum manusia. Gobnyan kheueh Tuhan seumesta álam
Ephesians4:7 Geutanyoe maséng-maséng tateurimong meuneubri meunurot peue nyang geubri lé Almaseh.
Ephesians4:8 Lam Alkitab na teutuléh lagée nyoe
Ephesians4:9 Ngon lagée nyan
Ephesians4:10 Dan Gobnyan nyang ka geutreun nyan
Ephesians4:11 Gobnyan kheueh nyang “bri raseki-raseki keu umat manusia”; na nyang geuangkat jeuet keu rasui
Ephesians4:12 Nyoe geupeubuet mangat umat Allah geupeu leungkab sampoe peunoh mangat hase jilayani Tuhan dan jipeudong tuboh Almaseh.
Ephesians4:13 Ngon lagée nyan tanyoe banmandum ka jeuet keusaboh lé iman nyang saban dan peungeurtian nyang saban keuhai Aneuëk Allah. Dan tanyoe jeuet keu ureuëng-ureuëng rayeuk nyang maken treb maken meutamah sampoereuna lagée Almaseh.
Ephesians4:14 Ngon lagée nyan tanyoe hana lé jeuet lagée aneuëk miet nyang hana lom teutab peundirian jiba keudeuh keunoe lé mubagoe rupa peungajaran nibak ureuëng-ureuëng nyang jeuhet. Awaknyan jipeusisat gob ngon tipée daya jih.
Ephesians4:15 Hán jeuet! Nyang sikeubiet jih tanyoe meuseuti tapeugah hai-hai nyang beutôi ngon até nyang peunoh gaséh sayang
Ephesians4:16 Dimiyueb pimpénan Gobnyan
Ephesians4:17 Sabab nyan
Ephesians4:18 Pikeran awaknyan ka teutôb. Awaknyan hana jituri keu udeb nyang geubri lé Allah
Ephesians4:19 Awaknyan ka hana lé peurasaan malée
Ephesians4:20 Teuma Isa Almaseh nyang gata turi kon lagée nyan!
Ephesians4:21 Gata ka tadeungoe keuhai Gobnyan! Dan sibagoe murit-murit Gobnyan
Ephesians4:22 Ngon sabab nyan suet kheueh laju manusia awai ngon pola udeb nyang ka treb nyang teungoh jireulôh lé keuheundak-keuheundak jih nyang sisat nyan.
Ephesians4:23 Bah kheueh até dan pikeran gata teupeubarô banmandum.
Ephesians4:24 Bah kheueh gata udeb sibagoe manusia barô nyang teucebta meunurot pola Allah; na kheueh ngon tabiát nyang beutôi
Ephesians4:25 Sabab nyan Syedara-syedara banmandum
Ephesians4:26 Meunyoe gata beungéh
Ephesians4:27 mangat Iblih hana jiteumé keuseumpatan.
Ephesians4:28 Ureuëng nyang kalazem buet jih ceumeucue piôh kheueh laju nibak buet lagée nyan. Bah kheueh ureuëng nyan jimubuet mangat meuteumé atra hareukat nyang jujoe dan hase jitulông ureuëng-ureuëng nyang kureueng mampu.
Ephesians4:29 Meunyoe gata meututoe
Ephesians4:30 Bék kheueh sampoe tapeuseudeh até Roh Allah. Keugata ka geuboh materai ngon Roh
Ephesians4:31 Peugadôh kheueh bubena peurasaan sakét até
Ephesians4:32 Nyang sikeubiet jih
Ephesians5:1 Gata na kheueh aneuëk-aneuëk Allah nyang geugaséh
Ephesians5:2 Udeb gata bah kheueh meujiwa ngon gaséh sayang
Ephesians5:3 Gata na kheueh umat Allah. Sabab nyan
Ephesians5:4 Meunan cit hana patot nibak gata tapeuteubiet tutoe haba nyang kutoe
Ephesians5:5 Simak kheueh beugét-gét: ureuëng nyang pi-e jih cabui
Ephesians5:6 Bék sampoe gata keunong peungét ngon tutoe haba nyang sulet. Sabab hai-hai nyang lagée nyoe kheueh nyang teupeuteuka meureuka Allah ateueh ureuëng-ureuëng nyang hana taát ubak Gobnyan.
Ephesians5:7 Ngon lagée nyan
Ephesians5:8 Gata yoh watée ilée ka lheueh udeb lam seupôt. Jinoenyoe gata ka jeuet keu umat Tuhan
Ephesians5:9 Sabab lam peungéh nyan kheueh jiteubiet banmandum nyang jroh
Ephesians5:10 Useuha kheueh beugata turi peue nyang jeuet keumangat até Tuhan.
Ephesians5:11 Bék gata peubuet buet-buet nyang hana meuguna nyang jipeubuet lé ureuëng-ureuëng nyang udeb lam seupôt. Sikeubiet jih
Ephesians5:12 Sabab hai-hai nyang awaknyan peubuet ngon cara seungab-seungab nyan
Ephesians5:13 Peue-peue mantong nyang jilôh lé peungéh nyan
Ephesians5:14 Sabab mandum nyang deuh teukalon ngon nyata
Ephesians5:15 Ngon sabab nyan
Ephesians5:16 Peuguna kheueh sigét-gét jih tieb-tieb keuseumpatan nyang na nibak gata
Ephesians5:17 Bék bangai
Ephesians5:18 Bék kheueh gata mabök lé ié anggô
Ephesians5:19 Peuguna kheueh tutoe haba nyang na lam kitab zabur
Ephesians5:20 Sabe-sabe dan keuhai peue mantong
Ephesians5:21 Keu teuhoreumat Almaseh
Ephesians5:22 Purumoh
Ephesians5:23 Sabab lakoe na kheueh ulée ateueh purumoh jih
Ephesians5:24 Saban lagée jeumaáh tundok ubak Almaseh
Ephesians5:25 Lakoe
Ephesians5:26 Almaseh geupeubuet lagée nyan mangat Gobnyan jeuet geupeu gleh jeumaáh nyan ngon ajaran Gobnyan dan rot ié pumanö
Ephesians5:27 Ngon lagée nyan Almaseh ka geupeujeuet jeumaáh nyan teudong ngon agong dan murni dikeue Gobnyan
Ephesians5:28 Meunan kheueh teuma lakoe beujigaséh keupurumoh saban lagée jigaséh tuboh jih keudroe. Ureuëng nyang gaséh keupurumoh jih saban cit lagée ka jigaséh keu droe jih keudroe. (
Ephesians5:29 Hántom na ureuëng nyang jibanci keu tuboh jih keudroe. Sikeubiet jih
Ephesians5:30 Tanyoe tateupeue nyan
Ephesians5:31 Lam Alkitab na teutuléh lagée nyoe
Ephesians5:32 Ayat nyan keubiet lhok that makna jih. Dan lôn peusangkot hainyan ngon hubongan Almaseh ngon jeumaáh.
Ephesians5:33 Teuma ayat nyan na hubongan jih ngon gata: Bah kheueh tieb-tieb lakoe jigaséh keupurumoh jih dan jigaséh teuma keu droe jih keudroe meunan cit tieb-tieb purumoh bah kheueh jiuseuha jihoreumat keu lakoe jih.
Ephesians6:1 Aneuëk-aneuëk! Sibagoe murit Almaseh
Ephesians6:2 “Horeumat kheueh keu bapak ngon ma gata” na kheueh peurintah nyang paleng phon nibak Allah ngon janji Gobnyan
Ephesians6:3 na kheueh: “Mangat gata mubahgia dan panyang umu gata di bumoe”.
Ephesians6:4 Syedara-syedara nyang jeuet keu bapak! Bék kheueh gata peusakét aneuëk-aneuëk gata leubeh nibak patot sampoe aneuëk gata nyan beungéh. Seubalek jih
Ephesians6:5 Syedara-syedara nyang jeuet keunamiet! Turot kheueh peurintah po gata nyang na lam donya nyoe. Peubuet kheueh nyan ngon peurasaan horeumat dan patuh lom ngon keubiet-keubiet siulah-ulah gata peubuet nyan keu Almaseh keudroe.
Ephesians6:6 Bék kheueh gata peubuet nyang jroh nyan meunyoe gata jijaga
Ephesians6:7 Buet nyang gata peubuet sibagoe namiet nyan
Ephesians6:8 Ingat kheueh bahwa tieb-tieb ureuëng
Ephesians6:9 Syedara-syedara nyang jeuet keu po! Bah kheueh gata meusikeub lagée nyan cit teuma ateueh namiet-namiet gata. Bék lé gata peuguna ancaman-ancaman. Ingat bahwa gata dan namiet-namiet gata nyan
Ephesians6:10 Akhé jih
Ephesians6:11 Peuguna kheueh banmandum peuleungkapan prang nyang geubri lé Allah keugata
Ephesians6:12 Sabab tanyoe meujuang kon talawan manusia
Ephesians6:13 Sabab nyan
Ephesians6:14 Bah kheueh gata siab sabe. Peuguna kheueh keuseutiaan gata ubak Allah sibagoe taloe keuieng
Ephesians6:15 Bah kheueh keurilaan até gata tapeusampoe Haba Gét nyang teuba ubak seujahteura jeuet keusipatu gata.
Ephesians6:16 Tieb-tieb watée peuguna kheueh peucaya gata ubak Tuhan sibagoe sinjata tangkesan gata; ngon iman nyan gata hase tapeulon banmandum aneuëk panah meuapui nyang teuka nibak sijeuhet.
Ephesians6:17 Cok kheueh keuseulamatan sibagoe tupi beuso
Ephesians6:18 Peubuet kheueh banmandum nyan sira meudoá keuteulakée tulông ubak Allah. Bak tieb-tieb keuseumpatan
Ephesians6:19 Dan meunan cit meudoá kheueh keu ulôn cit teuma
Ephesians6:20 Sabab lé Haba Gét nyan
Ephesians6:21 Tikhikus
Ephesians6:22 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn utus jihnyan keugata keujipeugah keuadaan kamoe keugata banmandum
Ephesians6:23 Seumoga Allah Bapak
Ephesians6:24 Seumoga Allah geubri beureukat ubak Gata mandum nyang teugaséh ubak Tuhan tanyoe Isa Almaseh ngon gaséh nyang hana hase teupeulon. Horeumat kamoe
Philippians1:1 Syedara-syedara umat Allah banmandum nyang na tinggai di Filipi
Philippians1:2 meuharab that seumoga Allah Bapak geutanyoe dan Tuhan Isa Almaseh geubri beureukat dan seujahteura ateueh gata.
Philippians1:3 Tieb-tieb watée ulôn teuingat keu gata
Philippians1:4 Dan pajan mantong watée ulôn meudoá keu Gata mandum
Philippians1:5 Ulôn lakée teurimong gaséh ubak Po teu Allah sabab phon uroe phon sampoe bak watée nyoe
Philippians1:6 Allah keudroe kheueh nyang peuphon buet nyang jroh nyan keu gata
Philippians1:7 Keubiet ka bak teumpat jih ulôn na peurasaan nyang lagée nyan ubak gata
Philippians1:8 Allah geuteupeue bahwa ulôn biet-biet that meucen keu gata ngon peurasaan gaséh meusra nyang teuka nibak Isa Almaseh keudroe.
Philippians1:9 Nyoe kheueh doá ulôn keu gata: seumoga gata banmandum seumaken tagaséh ubak Allah dan seusabe manusia dan laju meutamah lam peungeutahuan nyang beutôi dan pandangan nyang bijaksana.
Philippians1:10 Ngon lagée nyan gata tateupeue tapiléh peue nyang paleng gét
Philippians1:11 Udeb gata teuma meulimpah ngon buet nyang biet-biet gét nyang jipeuhase lé Isa Almaseh keudroe; ngon lagée nyan Allah teuma jipeumulia dan jipujoe-pujoe.
Philippians1:12 Ulôn meuharab mangat gata tateupeue
Philippians1:13 Akibat jih
Philippians1:14 Ngon jipeutamong ulôn lam glab ka teupeujeuet ureuëng-ureuëng Kristen nyang na lam banda nyoe ka jeuet keu yakén lom keuhai Tuhan
Philippians1:15 Beutôi na meupadum droe lamkawan awaknyan nyang jipeusampoe keuhai Almaseh sabab bingiek até dan keuneuk meudakwa
Philippians1:16 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyoe jipeubuet hai nyan sabab awaknyan jigaséh keu Po teu Allah dan ulôn
Philippians1:17 Teuma ureuëng laén jipeugah keuhai Almaseh ngon meukeusut nyang hana gét; awaknyan jipeusampoe hainyan keu keupeuntengan droe jih. Ngon lagée nyan awaknyan meuharab hase jipeubuet ulôn nyoe leubeh meukarat lam glab.
Philippians1:18 Teuma hana peue! Sabab pakriban kheueh mantong
Philippians1:19 sabab ulôn kuteupeu bahwa ngon doá-doá gata dan ngon geubantu lé Roh Isa Almaseh
Philippians1:20 Nyang lumpah that lôn lakée dan ulôn meuharab na kheueh mangat bék sagai-sagai ulôn nyoe gagai nibak tugaih lôn. Teuma ulôn meuharab that mangat bak tieb-tieb watée
Philippians1:21 Sabab nibak ulôn
Philippians1:22 Teuma meunyoe ngon udeb lam donya nyoe
Philippians1:23 Ulôn jitarek nibak dua pihak. Ulôn meuheuét that keuneuk tinggai donya nyoe keu ulôn jak tinggai meusajan Almaseh
Philippians1:24 teuma
Philippians1:25 Ulôn yakén that keuhai nyan. Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn teupeu bahwa ulôn teutab tinggai ngon Syedara banmandum
Philippians1:26 Sabab nyan
Philippians1:27 Ngon lagée nyan
Philippians1:28 Bah kheueh gata sabe beurani; bék teumakot ateueh lawan-lawan gata. Ngon lagée nyan gata tatunyok bahwa awaknyan pasti taloe
Philippians1:29 Sabab Po teu Allah ka geubri anugeurah ateueh gata kon keumeuiman ubak Almaseh mantong
Philippians1:30 Jinoenyoe gata pi na meusajan ngon ulôn lam meujuang nyang sa; na kheueh nyang gata ka lheueh takalon ulôn peujuang yoh masa ilée
Philippians2:1 Gata teuga
Philippians2:2 Ngon lagée nyan
Philippians2:3 Bék kheueh gata peubuet sapeue lé sabab jidurong lé keupeuntengan gata keudroe
Philippians2:4 Peurati kheueh keupeuntengan ureuëng laén; bék keupeuntengan droe keudroe.
Philippians2:5 Bah kheueh gata na jiwa lagée Isa Almaseh:
Philippians2:6 Nibak dasai jih Gobnyan saban ngon Po teu Allah
Philippians2:7 Nyang sibeuna jih
Philippians2:8 Gobnyan geupeumiyueb droe
Philippians2:9 Sabab nyan kheueh Allah geuangkat Gobnyan simanyang-manyang jih
Philippians2:10 Teuma keuteuhoreumat Isa
Philippians2:11 Awaknyan banmandum teuma jiaku bahwa Isa Almaseh kheueh Tuhan; ngon lagée nyan Allah Bapak teupeumulia.
Philippians2:12 Sabab nyan
Philippians2:13 sabab Allah keudroe nyang mubuet lam tuboh gata keugeupeujeuet gata rila dan sanggob tapeugalak até Allah.
Philippians2:14 Peubuet kheueh peue mantong ngon hana meu krôb-krôb atawa meudakwa.
Philippians2:15 Ngon lagée nyan gata katatunyok bahwa gata na kheueh aneuëk-aneuëk Allah nyang hana meucupa
Philippians2:16 
Philippians2:17 Mungken ulôn teuma jipoh maté dan darah ulôn jeuet lagée darah keureubeuen nyang teuroe ateueh peue nyang gata peuseumah ubak Po teu Allah sibagoe tanda bahwa gata meuiman ubak Gobnyan. Meunyoe keubit nyan meuseuti lagée nyan
Philippians2:18 Meunan cit heundak jih gata meurasa mangat dan meusajan meugeumbira ngon ulôn.
Philippians2:19 Ulôn peucaya bahwa ngon geutulông lé Tuhan Isa
Philippians2:20 Teuma Timotius kheueh sidroe sagai ureuëng nyang saboh jiwa ngon ulôn
Philippians2:21 Banmandum nyang laén nyang jiurôih na kheueh keu keupeuntengan jih keudroe
Philippians2:22 Gata keudroe ka gata ngieng bukeuti jih bahwa Timotius nyan meuguna. Jihnyan ka jimubuet brat that meusajan ngon ulôn keuteujak peusampoe Haba Gét nyang teuka nibak Allah. Kamoe bandua deuh jih lagée aneuëk ngon bapak.
Philippians2:23 Ngon sabab nyan
Philippians2:24 Ulôn peucaya bahwa ngon tulông Tuhan
Philippians2:25 Keuhai syedara tanyoe di Epafroditus nyang gata kirém keu jitulông ulôn
Philippians2:26 Jihnyan meucen that-that keugata banmandum
Philippians2:27 Keubiet beutôi jihnyan sakét karab habéh umu. Teuma Allah geugaséh keu jih nyan; dan kon keu jih mantong
Philippians2:28 Nyang kheueh sabab jih seumaken rayeuk mantong keuheundak ulôn keu lôn yue jihnyan jigisa ubak gata
Philippians2:29 Ngon lagée nyan
Philippians2:30 Deumi keu keupeuntengan buet Almaseh
Philippians3:1 Akhé jih
Philippians3:2 Até-até kheueh keu ureuëng-ureuëng nyang jipeubuet hai-hai nyang jeuhet
Philippians3:3 Padahai tanyoe kheueh ureuëng-ureuëng nyang ka tateurimong meukatan nyang seujati
Philippians3:4 Nyang sibeuna jih ulôn jeuet mantong lôn meugantueng ubak upacara-upacara nyan. Sabab meunyoe na sidroe-droe ureuëng bak jih nyan na alasan keujimeugantung nibak upacara nyang sifeuet jih lahé
Philippians3:5 Ulôn teupeukatan watée ulôn meu-umu lapan uroe. Ulôn lahé sibagoe ureuëng Israel
Philippians3:6 Ulôn keubiet that-that meuseumangat lôn iénanya jeumaáh. Meunyoe teutilek rot huköm agama Yahudi
Philippians3:7 Teuma lé sabab Almaseh
Philippians3:8 Kon mantong hai-hai nyang teupeugah nyan
Philippians3:9 dan biet-biet meusaboh ngon Gobnyan. Hubongan nyang jroh ngon Po teu Allah hana lé lôn useuha keudroe ngon cara lôn taát ubak huköm agama. Jinoenyoe ulôn na hubongan nyang jroh ngon Allah
Philippians3:10 Saboh sagai nyang ulôn lakée
Philippians3:11 Dan ulôn meuharab bahwa ulôn keudroe teuma geupeu udeb lom teuma nibak maté.
Philippians3:12 Ulôn hana lôn peugah bahwa ulôn ka meuhase
Philippians3:13 Ka teuntée
Philippians3:14 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn teutab kuplueng mangat meuteumé tujuan akhé mangat meuteumé meunang
Philippians3:15 Tanyoe mandum nyang ka rayeuk seucara rohani
Philippians3:16 Teuma hainyoe nyang harôh gata peurati: Tanyoe meuseuti taudeb meunurot peuratoran nyang ka taseutôt trok bak watée nyoe.
Philippians3:17 Syedara-syedara lôn banmandum! Seutôt kheueh teuladan ulôn. Kamoe ka kamoe bri teuladan nyang beutôi
Philippians3:18 Ulôn ka kayém that ulôn britée ubak gata
Philippians3:19 Udeb ureuëng-ureuëng nyang lagée nyan akhé jih teuma rhot ubak hanco
Philippians3:20 Teuma geutanyoe na kheueh wareuga neugahra syeuruga. Nibak teumpat nyan kheueh teuma Raja Peuseulamat geutanyoe
Philippians3:21 Tuboh geutanyoe nyang leumoh dan hase hanco nyoe
Philippians4:1 Sabab nyan
Philippians4:2 Gata hei inong Euodia dan meunan cit gata inong Sintike! Ulôn lakée ngon meuharab that mangat gata saboh até sibagoe ureuëng-ureuëng nyang saboh iman.
Philippians4:3 Keu rakan ulôn nyang seutia
Philippians4:4 Seumoga gata sabe lam geumbira sabab gata ka udeb meusaboh ngon Tuhan. Sigoe teuk ulôn peugah: meugeumbira kheueh!
Philippians4:5 Bah kheueh mandum ureuëng hase jikalon sikeub gata nyang gét até. Sabab hana treb lé Tuhan teuma teuka.
Philippians4:6 Bék kheueh khawate keuhai peue mantong. Lam hai-hai peue mantong. Lam sigala hai meudoá kheueh dan kirém kheueh meulakée gata ubak Allah. Peue nyang gata peureulée
Philippians4:7 Teuma seujahteura nyang teuka nibak Allah hana mungken hase jimuphom lé manusia
Philippians4:8 Akhé jih
Philippians4:9 Peujak kheueh peue nyang ka gata meurunoe dan gata teurimong nibak ulôn; bah kheueh nyan nibak tutoe haba meunan cit nibak buet-buet nyang ulôn keureuja. Allah teumpat sigala seujahteura
Philippians4:10 Lam udeb lôn nyang meusaboh ngon Tuhan
Philippians4:11 Ulôn peugah nyoe kon sabab di ulôn nyoe kakureueng sipeue-peue
Philippians4:12 Ulôn ka lôn rasa udeb lam keuadaan kureueng hana sapeuena
Philippians4:13 Ngon kuasa nyang geubri lé Almaseh keu ulôn
Philippians4:14 Teuma gata katatulông ulôn lam keuadaan ulôn sosah; dan peue nyang gata peubuet nyan keubiet gét lagoena.
Philippians4:15 Syedara-syedara ureuëng Filipi! Gata keudroe tateupeue that bahwa bak watée ulôn tinggai Makedonia yoh masa ilée
Philippians4:16 Bak watée ulôn na di Tesalonika dan ulôn peureulée bantuan
Philippians4:17 Nyan kon meumakna bahwa ulôn teuma keuneuk teurimong meuneubri. Nyang ulôn lakée na kheueh mangat ulôn jeuet lôn ngieng hase-hase nyang teutamah keulaba gata.
Philippians4:18 Ulôn ka kuteurimong banmandum – bahkan leubeh nibak nyang seb! Banmandum meuneubri nyang gata kirém keu ulôn
Philippians4:19 Allah nyang ulôn seumah
Philippians4:20 Teupujoe kheueh Allah Bapak geutanyoe siumu masa! Amin.
Philippians4:21 Peutrok kheueh saleuem ulôn ubak banmandum umat Allah nyang meusaboh ngon Isa Almaseh. Dan teurimong kheueh teuma saleuem nibak syedara-syedara nyang na meusajan ulôn disinoe.
Philippians4:22 Banmandum umat Allah nyang na lam banda nyoe
Philippians4:23 Seumoga Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh geubri beureukat keugata mandum. Horeumat kamoe
Colossians1:1 Syedara-syedara umat Allah di Kolose nyang seutia meusaboh ngon Almaseh! Sibagoe rasui Isa Almaseh
Colossians1:2 Kamoe ka meudeungoe bahwa gata meuiman ubak Isa Almaseh dan gata tagaséh keumandum umat Allah. Nyang kheueh sabab jih watée kamoe meudoá keugata
Colossians1:3 
Colossians1:4 
Colossians1:5 Gata meuiman dan gata tagaséh
Colossians1:6 Haba nibak Po teu Allah meutabu bansigom donya
Colossians1:7 Hai nyan jipeutrok bak gata lé Epafras
Colossians1:8 Nibak jihnyan kamoe deungoe bahwa ngon kuasa Roh Allah gata hase saléng meugaséh sayang.
Colossians1:9 Nyang kheueh sabab jih kamoe sabe meudoá keugata watée phon that kamoe deungoe keuhai gata. Kamoe lakée ubak Allah mangat Roh Allah geubri keugata keubijaksanaan dan peungeurtian sampoe gata tateupeue ngon sampoereuna peue nyang geukeuheundak lé Allah.
Colossians1:10 Ngon lagée nyan gata hase udeb meunurot keuheundak Allah
Colossians1:11 Peunoh harapan
Colossians1:12 dan ngon teupeugah teurimong gaséh ubak Bapak. Sabab Bapak nyan kheueh nyang peujeuet gata jeuet gata teurimong peue nyang geukeubah lé Allah keu umat Gobnyan lam keurajeuen gobnyan nyang trang.
Colossians1:13 Gobnyan ka geupeuleueh geutanyoe nibak kuasa nyang seupôt dan geupinah geutanyoe u dalam keurajeuen Aneuëk Gobnyan nyang geugaséh.
Colossians1:14 Lé Aneuëk Gobnyan tanyoe geupeubeubaih; ngon lagée nyan banmandum desya-desya geutanyoe ka geupeu amphon.
Colossians1:15 Almaseh na kheueh gamba nyang nyata nibak droe Allah nyang hana leumah teukalon; Almaseh na kheueh aneuëk nyang tuha
Colossians1:16 Sabab meulalu Gobnyan kheueh Allah geucebta peue-peue mantong nyang na lam syeuruga dan nyang na ateueh rhung bumoe
Colossians1:17 Sigohlom na peue-peue mantong ateueh rhung donya nyoe
Colossians1:18 Gobnyan kheueh ulée nibak tuboh geuh
Colossians1:19 Allah keudroe nyang lakée mangat peue-peue mantong nyang na nibak droe Allah
Colossians1:20 Dan rot Aneuëk nyan teuma Allah geucok keuputosan keugeupeugét peue-peue mantong jimeugét lom teuma ngon Gobnyan – bah kheueh nyang na peue-peue ateueh rhueng bumoe
Colossians1:21 Yoh masa ilée gata jiôh nibak Po teu Allah. Gata meumusoh ngon Gobnyan sabab pi-e dan pikeran gata jeuhet.
Colossians1:22 Teuma jinoenyoe
Colossians1:23 Teuma gata kateuntée dan meuseuti teutab seutia meuiman dan teudong cot nibak keuimanan gata. Bék sampoe gata peulheueh harapan gata nyang ka geubri keugata watée gata tateurimong Haba Gét nyang teuka nibak Allah. Haba nyan ka geupeusampoe ubak tieb-tieb ureuëng bansigom donya. Dan keunyan kheueh teuma ulôn
Colossians1:24 Jinoenyoe ulôn galak meudeurita deumi keu keupeuntengan gata. Sabab ngon na peundeuritaan bak tuboh ulôn
Colossians1:25 Allah geuyue ulôn jeuet keupeulayan jeumaáh Gobnyan deumi keu keupeuntengan gata. Ulôn meuseuti lôn peusampoe haba nyang teuka nibak Allah
Colossians1:26 na kheueh haba nyang ka meuabat-abat nyang ka lheueh geusöm lé Po teu Allah keumandum ureuëng
Colossians1:27 Ubak umat Geuhnyan Allah geupeugah padun na gét jih dan agong jih rahsia Geuhnyan keu banmandum umat manusia. Rahasia nyan na kheueh: Almaseh na lam tuboh gata
Colossians1:28 Almaseh nyan kheueh nyang kamoe peugah ubak tieb-tieb manusia. Kamoe peuingat dan kamoe peurunoe awaknyan banmandum ngon sigala bijaksana. Tujuan kamoe na kheueh mangat tieb-tieb ureuëng hase teuba ubak Allah
Colossians1:29 Keumeuteumé hainyan ulôn meukeureuja brat. Ulôn meujuang ngon sigeunab teunaga nyang ka geubri lé Almaseh ubak ulôn dan nyang mubuet lam tuboh ulôn ngon peunoh kuasa.
Colossians2:1 Ulôn meuharab mangat gata teupeu pakriban brat jih ulôn meujuang deumi keugata dan keu awaknyan nyang na di Laodikia dan banmandum nyang hana jituri keulôn seucara pribadi.
Colossians2:2 Banmandum nyoe ulôn peubuet mangat até awaknyan beujeuet keuteuga dan awaknyan saléng lam gaséh sayang ngon lagée nyan awaknyan beujeuet meusaboh. Deungon lagée nyan awaknyan biet-biet muphom dan yakén lom jituri rahsia Allah
Colossians2:3 Almaseh kheueh nyang peutrang banmandum keubijaksanaan dan peungeutahuan Allah nyang yoh masa ilée teusöm.
Colossians2:4 Ulôn peugah nyoe mangat gata bék jipeungét lé soe mantong nyang babah jih maméh ateueh gata.
Colossians2:5 Dan bah kheueh ulôn nyoe jiôh nibak gata
Colossians2:6 Syedara banmandum ka tateurimong Isa Almaseh sibagoe Tuhan. Lé sabab nyan bah kheueh gata udeb meusaboh ngon Gobnyan
Colossians2:7 dan meu-ukeue lam Gobnyan. Bah kheueh gata tapeudong udeb gata ngon Almaseh sibagoe dasai jih. Bah kheueh gata seumaken tameuiman ubak Almaseh
Colossians2:8 Bah kheueh gata beuaté-até
Colossians2:9 Sabab banmandum pribadi Allah na tinggai lam Almaseh
Colossians2:10 Dan sabab udeb meusaboh ngon Almaseh
Colossians2:11 Sabab meusaboh ngon Almaseh
Colossians2:12 Sabab bak watée gata teupumanö
Colossians2:13 Yoh masa ilée
Colossians2:14 dan geupeubateue surat utang ateueh geutanyoe
Colossians2:15 Nibak saleb nyan Almaseh geupeugöt banmandum roh-roh nyang mat peurintah dan nyang meukuasa ka jeuet hana meudaya lé. Awaknyan ka jeuet keubeunda nyang jinonton lé ureuëng ramé bak watée Almaseh geuiréng awaknyan sibagoe ureuëng teuteun lam pawai keumeunangan.
Colossians2:16 Sabab nyan bék kheueh tapeubiyeu ureuëng laén jipeusalah gata keuhai peunajoh atawa nyang gata jieb
Colossians2:17 Banmandum nyan na kheueh bubayang mantong nibak hai-hai nyang teuma teuka
Colossians2:18 Bék kheueh gata tapeubiyeu droe jipeurugoe lé ureuëng-ureuëng nyang pura-pura peumiyueb droe dan nyang seumah malaikat-malaikat. Ureuëng nyan sombong ngon pikeran-pikeran donya dan jipeubangga-bangga droe ngon peue-peue nyang jikalon nyang khusos
Colossians2:19 sampoe hana lé jimumat ubak Almaseh nyang jeuet keu ulée. Dimiyueb pimpénan Almaseh
Colossians2:20 Gata ka maté meusajan-sajan ngon Almaseh
Colossians2:21 “Bék mat nyoe”
Colossians2:22 Banmandum atoran nyan na kheueh keuhai-hai nyang meunan jimat hana meuguna lé. Nyan na kheueh atoran-atoran dan peungajaran-peungajaran nyang jipeugét lé manusia.
Colossians2:23 Beutôi deuh jih hainyan bijaksana
Colossians3:1 Gata ka teupeu udeb lom teuma meusajan-sajan Almaseh. Sabab nyan bah kheueh gata useuha keumeuteumé hai-hai nyang lam syeuruga
Colossians3:2 Peupusat kheueh pikeran gata bak hai-hai nyang na disinan
Colossians3:3 Sabab gata ka maté
Colossians3:4 Ngon lagée nyan
Colossians3:5 Sabab nyan
Colossians3:6 Hai-hai nyang lagée nyan kheueh nyang jeuet meuakibat ubak meureuka Allah ateueh ureuëng-ureuëng nyang hana taát.
Colossians3:7 Yoh masa ilée gata keudroe pi taturot hai-hai nyang meuheuét nyan
Colossians3:8 Teuma bak watée nyoe bah kheueh gata tiek hai-hai nyang jeuhet lam tuboh gata: bék beungéh lé
Colossians3:9 Bék meusulet sidroe ngon nyang laén
Colossians3:10 Gata jinoenyoe ka teubri udeb nyang barô. Gata na kheueh manusia barô
Colossians3:11 Sibagoe akibat nibak mandum nyan hanco kheueh peue-peue mantong nyang na meubeda ureuëng Yahudi ngon kon ureuëng Yahudi
Colossians3:12 Gata na kheueh umat Allah
Colossians3:13 Gata meuseuti saba sidroe ngon nyang laén
Colossians3:14 Dan nyang paleng peunteng na kheueh: Gata meuseuti saléng tameugaséh sabab gaséh nyan kheueh nyang peusaboh Gata banmandum sampoe jeuet keusampoereuna.
Colossians3:15 Bah kheueh peue-peue mantong nyang gata cok keuputosan jipeuteuntée nibak damé nyang geubri lé Almaseh lam até gata. Sabab Allah geutawök gata jeuet keu anggota saboh tuboh
Colossians3:16 Bah kheueh ajaran-ajaran Almaseh nyang peunoh beureukat jilhob lam até gata. Bah kheueh gata saléng peurunoe dan saléng tabri naseuhat ngon bijaksana mungken. Meuca-e kheueh ngon lagu-lagu zabur puja dan pujoe meunan cit lagu-lagu rohani; meulagu kheueh keu Po teu Allah ngon peurasaan syukoe lam até gata.
Colossians3:17 Peue mantong nyang gata peubuet atawa nyang gata peugah
Colossians3:18 Hei gata-gata nyang jeuet keupurumoh! Taát kheueh ubak lakoe gata
Colossians3:19 Hei gata-gata nyang jeuet keu ureuëng lakoe! Gaséh kheueh keupurumoh gata. Bék gata peubuet gasa ateueh purumoh teuh nyan.
Colossians3:20 Aneuëk-aneuëk! Na kheueh keuwajéban gata sibagoe ureuëng Kristen keusabe ta-taát ubak ayah ngon ma
Colossians3:21 Hei gata-gata nyang jeuet keu ayah! Bék gata peusakét até aneuëk-aneuëk gata akhé jih aneuëk gata nyan jeuet keuputôh asa.
Colossians3:22 Hei gata-gata nyang jeuet keu namiet! Lam hai peue mantong
Colossians3:23 Buet peue mantong nyang geubri ateueh gata
Colossians3:24 Ingat kheueh bahwa gata teuma tateurimong upah nibak Tuhan. Peue nyang geukeubah lé Tuhan keu umat Gobnyan
Colossians3:25 Dan soe mantong nyang peubuet salah
Colossians4:1 Syedara-syedara nyang jeuet keu amphon! Bah kheueh gata peusaneut namiet-namiet gata ngon beuna dan ade. Ingat kheueh bahwa gata pih na sidroe amphon lam syeuruga.
Colossians4:2 Bah kheueh gata meudoá ngon khusyuék dan sabe siab waspada
Colossians4:3 Meudoá kheueh teuma keukamoe mangat Allah geubri keukamoe keuseumpatan nyang jroh keukamoe peusampoe haba keuhai Almaseh. Sabab hainyan kheueh jinoenyoe ulôn na lam rumoh glab.
Colossians4:4 Meudoá kheueh mangat ulôn hase lôn peugah rahsia nyan ngon sijeulaih-jeulaih jih lagée nyang sibeuna jih.
Colossians4:5 Lam hubongan gata ngon ureuëng-ureuëng nyang hana meuiman
Colossians4:6 Bah kheueh hai-hai nyang gata peugah nyan sabe mangat dan teutarek até. Bah kheueh gata tateupeue pakriban nyang sibeuna jih gata meuseuti tajaweueb peue-peue nyang jitanyong lé gob.
Colossians4:7 Tikhikus
Colossians4:8 Ulôn kukirém jihnyan ubak gata ngon alasan mangat gata tateupeue keuadaan kamoe dan gata teuhibor.
Colossians4:9 Onesimus teuma jijak meusajan-sajan ngon Tikhikus; jihnyan sidroe ureuëng gata. Jihnyan sidroe ureuëng nyang seutia
Colossians4:10 Aristarkus
Colossians4:11 Saleuem teuma nibak Isa nyang nan jih Yustus. Nibak ureuëng-ureuëng Yahudi nyang ka meuiman ubak Tuhan Isa
Colossians4:12 Saleuem nibak Epafras. Ureuëng nyoe pi ureuëng gata. Jihnyan namiet Isa Almaseh
Colossians4:13 Ulôn kalon keudroe bahwa jihnyan biet-biet ka jikeureuja brat keu gata dan keu ureuëng-ureuëng nyang na di Laodikia dan Hierapolis.
Colossians4:14 Dokto Lukas
Colossians4:15 Peutrok kheueh saleuem kamoe ubak ureuëng-ureuëng Kristen di Laodikia; meunan cit ubak Nimfa
Colossians4:16 Óh lheueh surat nyoe teubaca keugata
Colossians4:17 Dan peugah cit ubak Arkhipus
Colossians4:18 Saleuem nibak ulôn
1Thessalonians1:1 Syedara-syedara jeumaáh nyang na di Tesalonika
1Thessalonians1:2 Kamoe sabe meusyukoe ubak Allah sabab lé Syedara mandum. Tieb-tieb watée kamoe meudoá ubak Allah dan Bapak geutanyoe
1Thessalonians1:3 
1Thessalonians1:4 Kamoe meuteupeue
1Thessalonians1:5 Sabab kamoe peusampoe Haba Gét keugata kon ngon tutoe haba mantong
1Thessalonians1:6 Gata taseutôt teuladan kamoe dan teuladan Tuhan. Bah pih gata keubiet that meudeurita
1Thessalonians1:7 Ngon lagée nyan gata kajeuet keucuntoh keumandum ureuëng Kristen nyang na di Makedonia dan Akhaya.
1Thessalonians1:8 Sabab phon nibak gata
1Thessalonians1:9 Banmandum awaknyan jipeugah pakriban gata tateurimong kamoe yoh watée kamoe ilée meujak ubak gata. Awaknyan jimeututoe pakriban gata tatinggai beurala-beurala dan tajak ubak Allah nyang sidroe nyang udeb keuteuseumah Gobnyan.
1Thessalonians1:10 Awaknyan jimeututoe cit pakriban gata tameuharab teuka Aneuëk Allah nibak syeuruga
1Thessalonians2:1 Syedara-syedara! Gata keudroe tateupeue bahwa kamoe jaksaweue gata hana sia-sia.
1Thessalonians2:2 Gata tateupeue bahwa sigohlom kamoe jak ubak gata di Tesalonika
1Thessalonians2:3 Kamoe pakat gata kon kheueh saboh hai nyang keuliru; dan kon teuma ngon meukeusut hana gleh atawa teumipée.
1Thessalonians2:4 Hana! Kamoe hana kamoe meututoe keuneuk peumangat até gob
1Thessalonians2:5 Gata keudroe tateupeue bahwa kamoe hántom na meututoe ngon haba maméh atawa keuneuk peungeut gata ngon meukeusut geureuda. Allah saksi jih!
1Thessalonians2:6 Kamoe hana cit meu-useuha mangat jipujoe lé gob – bah kheueh nibak gata meunan cit nibak ureuëng laén. Nyang sibeuna jih sibagoe rasui Almaseh
1Thessalonians2:7 Teuma kamoe meusikeub leumoh-leumbot watée kamoe na lamkawan gata
1Thessalonians2:8 Sabab lé gaséh sayang kamoe
1Thessalonians2:9 Teuntée gata mantong teuingat pakriban brat jih kamoe meu-useuha dan meujuang. Uroe malam kamoe meukeureuja mangat kamoe hana kamoe peususah meusidroe pih nibak gata bak watée kamoe tabu Haba Gét nyang teuka nibak Allah nyan keugata.
1Thessalonians2:10 Kamoe udeb lam suci
1Thessalonians2:11 Gata tateupeue bahwa kamoe peusaneut gata maséng-maséng lagée sidroe ayah geupeusaneut aneuëk geuh.
1Thessalonians2:12 Kamoe naseuhat gata
1Thessalonians2:13 Na lom saboh teuk hai nyang laén nyang teupeujeuet kamoe sabe meulakée teurimong gaséh ubak Allah. Hainyan na kheueh
1Thessalonians2:14 Syedara-syedara
1Thessalonians2:15 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyan nyang poh maté Tuhan Isa dan nabi-nabi
1Thessalonians2:16 Teuma awaknyan jipagab-pagab kamoe keukamoe peusampoe habanyan keu bansa-bansa nyang kon Yahudi haba nyang hase teupeuseulamat bansa-bansa nyan. Deungon lagée nyan
1Thessalonians2:17 Teuma syedara-syedara
1Thessalonians2:18 Kamoe naniet keuneuk jak saweue gata; dan ulôn
1Thessalonians2:19 Keubiet
1Thessalonians2:20 Keubiet gata kheueh keubanggaan dan keumangat até kamoe!
1Thessalonians3:1 Akhé jih meucen kamoe hana ék teuteun lé. Sabab nyan kheueh kamoe pike leubeh gét tinggai di Atena
1Thessalonians3:2 teungoh kamoe kirém syedara tanyoe Timotius. Jihnyan peulayan Allah nyang meukeureuja meusajan kamoe keu jijak peusampoe Haba Gét keuhai Almaseh. Meunan cit kamoe kirém Timotius ubak gata mangat jihnyan jeuet jipeukong gata dan jidurong gata guna keuleubeh jimeuiman lom ubak Almaseh.
1Thessalonians3:3 Deungon lagée nyan hana meusidroe pi nibak gata nyang surot sabab deurita-deurita tanyoe nyoe. Gata keudroe tateupeue bahwa deurita-deurita nyan jitamong lam reuncana Allah keugeutanyoe.
1Thessalonians3:4 Watée kamoe mantong na meusajan gata
1Thessalonians3:5 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn kirém Timotius
1Thessalonians3:6 Jinoenyoe Timotius ka jigisa dan ka jipeusampoe bak kamoe haba geumbira keuhai pakriban gata meuiman ubak Almaseh dan udeb lam gaséh sayang. Jihnyan jipeugah bak kamoe bahwa gata sabe takeubah keunang-keunangan nyang jroh keuhai kamoe lam até gata. Dan gata keuneuk meurumpok ngon kamoe
1Thessalonians3:7 Nyang kheueh sabab jih
1Thessalonians3:8 sampoe jinoenyoe kamoe keubiet meurasa biet-biet udeb
1Thessalonians3:9 Padubna rayeuk jih peurasaan teurimong gaséh kamoe ubak Allah ateueh banmandum keugeumbiraan nyang kamoe rasa dikeue Gobnyan ngon sabab lé gata.
1Thessalonians3:10 Uroe malam kamoe lakée bak Gobnyan ngon sipeunoh até
1Thessalonians3:11 Seumoga Allah Bapak geutanyoe keudroe
1Thessalonians3:12 Seumoga Tuhan geupeujeuet gata seumaken tagaséh sidroe ngon nyang laén dan seumaken tagaséh banmandum manusia
1Thessalonians3:13 Deungon lagée nyan Tuhan teuma geupeuteuga até gata
1Thessalonians4:1 Akhé jih Syedara-syedara
1Thessalonians4:2 Sabab gata ka tateupeue peutunyok-peutunyok nyang ka kamoe bri bak gata ateueh kuasa Tuhan Isa.
1Thessalonians4:3 Nyoe kheueh keuheundak Po teu Allah: Mangat gata udeb khusos keu Gobnyan
1Thessalonians4:4 Tieb-tieb ureuëng agam nyang na lamkawan gata meuseuti jiteupeue pakriban udeb meusajan ngon purumoh jih ngon cara nyang teupeumangat até Allah dan manusia.
1Thessalonians4:5 Bék udeb meunurot hawa nafeusu ateueh purumoh gata
1Thessalonians4:6 Lam hai nyang lagée nyan
1Thessalonians4:7 Allah geutawök tanyoe
1Thessalonians4:8 Ureuëng nyang tulak peue nyang teupurunoe nyoe
1Thessalonians4:9 Hana peureulée lé kamoe teumuléh keu gata keuhai pakriban gata meuseuti tagaséh syedara-syedara nyang saboh iman. Gata keudroe ka geupurunoe lé Allah keusaleng tameugaséh.
1Thessalonians4:10 Dan hainyoe ka lheueh gata tunyok ateueh mandum syedara saboh iman di bansaboh Makedonia. Teuma
1Thessalonians4:11 Meu-useuha kheueh udeb ngon teunang dan hana gata peurhoh droe lam urosan ureuëng laén. Bah kheueh gata mubuet tamita nafeukah keudroe
1Thessalonians4:12 Meunyoe gata udeb lagée nyan
1Thessalonians4:13 Syedara-syedara
1Thessalonians4:14 Tanyoe tapatéh bahwa Isa ka maté dan ka udeb lom teuma. Nyang kheueh sabab jih tanyoe tapatéh bahwa Allah teuma geupeu udeb lom banmandum ureuëng nyang meuiman ubak Isa dan ka meuninggai
1Thessalonians4:15 Keuhai nyan
1Thessalonians4:16 Teuma malaikat agong geudumpék ngon su geuh nyang meutaga dan beureuguih Allah teuyueb sibagoe tanda aba-aba. Dan Tuhan Isa keudroe teuma geutron lam syeuruga
1Thessalonians4:17 Óh lheueh nyan
1Thessalonians4:18 Sabab nyan
1Thessalonians5:1 Syedara-syedara
1Thessalonians5:2 Sabab gata keudroe tateupeue ngon jeulaih that bahwa Uroe Tuhan teuka nyan teuma trok lagée pancuri nyang teuka bak watée malam.
1Thessalonians5:3 Meunyoe na ureuëng jipeugah
1Thessalonians5:4 Teuma gata kon ureuëng nyang udeb lam seupôt
1Thessalonians5:5 Gata banmandum na kheueh ureuëng nyang udeb lam trang; gata jitamong lam uroe nyang trang. Tanyoe kon ureuëng nyang udeb lam seupôt; atawa nyang jitamong nibak malam nyang seupôt.
1Thessalonians5:6 Sabab nyan geutanyoe hana jeuet taéh-éh mantong lagée ureuëng laén. Tanyoe meuseuti waspada dan pikeran tanyoe meuseuti trang.
1Thessalonians5:7 Watée malam teuka manusia jijak éh
1Thessalonians5:8 Teuma geutanyoe nyoe jitamong nibak ureuëng-ureuëng nyang peungéh dan trang; sabab nyan pikeran tanyoe meuseuti trang. Geutanyoe meuseuti teutab meuiman ubak Tuhan dan tagaséh keu ureuëng-ureuëng laén meunan cit tameuharab ngon yakén bahwa Po teu Allah teuma geupeu seulamat tanyoe. Nyan kheueh sinjata nyang peulindong geutanyoe nibak meujuang talawan seupôt.
1Thessalonians5:9 Allah geupiléh geutanyoe kon keu teuhuköm
1Thessalonians5:10 Gobnyan maté keugeutanyoe mangat bak watée Gobnyan teuka singoh – aléh geutanyoe mantong udeb
1Thessalonians5:11 Sabab nyan
1Thessalonians5:12 Syedara-syedara
1Thessalonians5:13 Peusaneut kheueh ateueh awaknyan ngon sihoreumat-horeumat jih dan ngon cinta gaséh sabab taingat peue nyang awaknyan peubuet. Udeb kheueh sabe lam keuadaan rukon.
1Thessalonians5:14 Meunan cit kamoe lakée
1Thessalonians5:15 Jaga kheueh mangat bék na nyang jibalaih buet nyang jeuhet ngon buet nyang jeuhet. Meu-useuha kheueh sabe keu tapeubuet nyang gét
1Thessalonians5:16 Bah kheueh gata sabe lam keuadaan geumbira
1Thessalonians5:17 dan meudoá kheueh sabe.
1Thessalonians5:18 Lam keuadaan peue mantong bah kheueh gata meusyukoe
1Thessalonians5:19 Bék kheueh gata keukang Roh Allah.
1Thessalonians5:20 Bék kheueh gata anggab phui mantong haba-haba nyang geupeutrok lé Roh Allah.
1Thessalonians5:21 Peue-peue mantong meuseuti teu ujoe
1Thessalonians5:22 Peujiôh kheueh peue-peue mantong nyang jeuhet.
1Thessalonians5:23 Seumoga Allah keudroe nyang bri ubak geutanyoe seujahteura
1Thessalonians5:24 Allah
1Thessalonians5:25 Doá kheueh keukamoe
1Thessalonians5:26 Meumat-mat jaroe kheueh banmandum seucara meusra sibagoe syedara ureuëng Kristen.
1Thessalonians5:27 Ateueh kuasa Tuhan
1Thessalonians5:28 Seumoga Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh geubri beureukat ateueh gata. Horeumat kamoe
2Thessalonians1:1 Syedara-syedara jeumaáh nyang na di Tesalonika
2Thessalonians1:2 meuharab seumoga Allah Bapak dan Tuhan Isa Almaseh geubri beureukat dan seujahteura ubak gata mandum.
2Thessalonians1:3 Syedara-syedara
2Thessalonians1:4 Nyang kheueh sabab jih pakon kamoe meututoe keuhai gata tieb-tieb watée kamoe jak saweue jeumaáh-jeumaáh Allah. Deungon bangga kamoe calitra pakriban gata teutab teugoh seutia gata meuiman ubak Almaseh lam keuadaan keunong iélanya dan deurita nyang gata rasa.
2Thessalonians1:5 Dan inoe kheueh deuh nyata padubna ade jih huköman Allah: Gata ka meudeurita sabab Donya Barô Allah
2Thessalonians1:6 Gobnyan geupeubuet peue nyang ade
2Thessalonians1:7 Dan ubak gata nyang ka jeuet bak watée nyoe meudeurita – meunan cit teuma ateueh kamoe – Allah teuma geubri keuleugaan nibak uroe Tuhan Isa geutron nibak syeuruga dan geupeuleumah droe Gobnyan ngon malaikat-malaikat Geuh nyang peukasa
2Thessalonians1:8 dan ngon apui nyang hu meuháb-háb. Gobnyan geutron keu geujak huköm ureuëng-ureuëng nyang hana jipako keu Po teu Allah dan nyang hana jitem udeb sisuai ngon Haba Gét keuhai Isa Tuhan geutanyoe.
2Thessalonians1:9 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyan teuma jiteurimong huköman keubinasaan siumu masa
2Thessalonians1:10 banmandum nyan teuma teujadi nibak uroe Gobnyan teuka singoh keujiagong lé umat Gobnyan dan keu jihoreumat lé mandum ureuëng nyang meuiman. Gata pi teuma na lamkawan umat Allah nyan
2Thessalonians1:11 Nyang kheueh sabab jih kamoe sabe meudoá keugata. Kamoe meudoá mangat Allah geupeujeuet gata patot keu udeb lagée nyang geulakée; keu nyan kheueh Gobnyan geutawök gata. Seumoga Allah
2Thessalonians1:12 Deungon lagéenyan
2Thessalonians2:1 Keuhai Tuhan tanyoe Isa Almaseh teuka
2Thessalonians2:2 Bék kheueh bagaih that bingong atawa apoh apah sabab na haba bahwa katrok uroe jih Tuhan Isa geuteuka lom teuma. Mungken haba nyan asai jih nibak saboh nubuat
2Thessalonians2:3 Pakriban mantong kheuh teuma
2Thessalonians2:4 Deungon sombong jihnyan jilawan dan jipeumanyang droe ateueh banmandum nyang jiseumah lé manusia
2Thessalonians2:5 Ingat kheueh bahwa ulôn ka lheueh lôn peugah banmandum nyan yoh ulôn mantong na meusajan gata.
2Thessalonians2:6 Dan gata tateupeue peue jinoenyoe mantong teutam teujadi mandum nyan. Singoh bak watée nyang ka teupeuteuntée lé Po teu Allah
2Thessalonians2:7 Teunaga nyang jipeubuet atranyan ka jipeuphon mubuet seucara rahsia
2Thessalonians2:8 barô kheueh deuh teungieng Manusia Jeuhet. Teuma meunyoe Tuhan Isa teuka
2Thessalonians2:9 Manusia Jeuhet nyan teuma teuka ngon saboh kuasa nyang rayeuk nibak Iblih. Jihnyan teuma jipeuna sapeue-sapeue buet ajaéb dan hai-hai nyang luwabiasa nyang peunoh ngon peungét dan teumipée.
2Thessalonians2:10 Jihnyan teuma jipeuguna sigala tipée daya nyang jeuhet keujipeusisat ureuëng-ureuëng nyang teuma binasa. Awaknyan binasa sabab jitulak dan hana jigalak keu haba nyang beuna nyang geubri lé Allah nyang hase peuseulamat awaknyan.
2Thessalonians2:11 Nyang kheueh sabab jih Allah geupeuteuka ateueh awaknyan saboh kuasa nyang keubiet sisat that
2Thessalonians2:12 Akibat jih
2Thessalonians2:13 Syedara-syedara nyang geugaséh lé Tuhan! Sabe kamoe peugah teurimong gaséh ubak Po teu Allah keuhai gata
2Thessalonians2:14 Keu nyan kheueh Allah geutawök gata keu Haba Gét nyang kamoe peusampoe ubak gata. Allah geutawök gata
2Thessalonians2:15 Lé sabab nyan
2Thessalonians2:16 Seumoga Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh keudroe
2Thessalonians2:17 
2Thessalonians3:1 Akhé jih
2Thessalonians3:2 Meudoá kheueh teuma mangat Allah geupeu seulamat kamoe nibak ureuëng-ureuëng nyang beujat dan jeuhet. Sabab hana mandum ureuëng jipatéh ubak haba nibak Tuhan nyan.
2Thessalonians3:3 Teuma Tuhan seutia. Gobnyan teuma geupeuteuga gata dan geulindong gata nibak Si Jeuhet.
2Thessalonians3:4 Dan kamoe peunoh meuiman ubak Tuhan keuhai gata
2Thessalonians3:5 Seumoga Tuhan nyang bimbeng gata leubeh tamuphom bahwa Allah geugaséh gata dan bahwa Almaseh geubri até gata nyang tabah.
2Thessalonians3:6 Syedara-syedara
2Thessalonians3:7 Gata keudroe tateupeue bahwa gata harôh taseutôt cuntoh bak kamoe. Kamoe hana laloe dan beu-o watée kamoe mantong na lamkawan gata.
2Thessalonians3:8 Kamoe hana kamoe makheun peunajoh gob ngon hana kamoe bayeue. Uroe malam kamoe meukeureuja kamoe banteng tuleueng mangat kamoe hana kamoe peususah soe-soe mantong meunan cit nyang na lamkawan gata.
2Thessalonians3:9 Kamoe peubuet nyan kon kamoe hana hak kamoe tuntot mangat gata tatulong kamoe
2Thessalonians3:10 Watée kamoe mantong na lamkawan gata
2Thessalonians3:11 Kamoe peugah nyoe sabab na kamoe deungoe bahwa ureuëng-ureuëng nyang na lamkawan gata na nyang udeb laloe ngon beu-o. Awaknyan hana jipeubuet meusapeue pi
2Thessalonians3:12 Ateueh kuasa Tuhan Isa Almaseh kamoe peurintah ureuëng-ureuëng nyan dan kamoe peuingat
2Thessalonians3:13 Teuma gata bék tunu tapeubuet nyang gét.
2Thessalonians3:14 Mungken singoh na ureuëng nyang hana jitem deungoe peue nyang kamoe peugah lam surat nyoe. Até-até kheueh keu ureuëng nyang lagée nyan dan bék meurakan ngon jihnyan mangat jihnyan malée.
2Thessalonians3:15 Teuma bék kheueh gata anggab jihnyan sibagoe musoh; teuma bri kheueh naseuhat sibagoe sidroe syedara.
2Thessalonians3:16 Tuhan na kheueh ulée keuseujahteuraan geutanyoe. Seumoga Gobnyan sabe geubri keugata seujahteura lam sigala hai. Seumoga Tuhan sabe na meusajan gata banmandum.
2Thessalonians3:17 Saleuem nibak ulôn
2Thessalonians3:18 Seumoga Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh geubri beureukat keugata mandum. Horeumat kamoe
1Timothy1:1 Timotius aneuëk ulôn nyang seujati lam Tuhan! Suratnyoe nibak ulôn
1Timothy1:2 
1Timothy1:3 Ulôn meuharab mangat gata teutab tinggai di Efesus lagée nyang ka lheueh ulôn peugah bak gata bak watée ulôn jak u Makedonia. Sabab
1Timothy1:4 Peugah kheueh bak awaknyan mangat bék lé jisimak haba dongeng dan calitra-calitra asai usui nyang hana jipiôh-piôh nyan. Banmandum nyan jipeuteuka riôh ngon meudakwa
1Timothy1:5 Tujuan naseuhat lôn na kheueh mangat jeuet manusia meuteumé até nyang gleh dan até nurani nyang suci
1Timothy1:6 Na siladum ureuëng nyang hana udeb lé lagée nyan
1Timothy1:7 Awaknyan keuneuk jeuet keugurée-gurée agama
1Timothy1:8 Tanyoe tateupeue bahwa huköm agama na kheueh gét
1Timothy1:9 Teuntée jih meuseuti beuingat bahwa huköm nyan teupeugét kon keu ureuëng gét
1Timothy1:10 keu ureuëng-ureuëng nyang peubuet cabui
1Timothy1:11 Ajaran nyan na meuteumé lam Haba Gét nyang jaktabu atra nyan geupeucaya ubak ulôn
1Timothy1:12 Ulôn peugah teurimong gaséh ubak Isa Almaseh Tuhan geutanyoe. Gobnyan ka geubri teunaga ubak ulôn keulôn layani Gobnyan
1Timothy1:13 bah pi yoh ilée ulôn fiteunah lôn iénanya meunan cit lôn hina Gobnyan. Teuma Allah geugaséh keulôn
1Timothy1:14 Biet pi meunan ulôn ka geupeu peunoh ngon rakhmat Tuhan tanyoe. Gobnyan geubri keu ulôn keumampuan keu lôn meuiman bak Gobnyan dan geuyue gaséh seusamoe manusia. Keumampuan nyan geubri bak geutanyoe mandum nyang ka meusaboh ngon Isa Almaseh.
1Timothy1:15 Keubiet beutôi that haba nyoe – sabab nyan patot kheueh teuteurimong dan teupeucaya sipeunoh até – : “Isa Almaseh geuteuka ateueh rhueng donya nyoe keu geupeu seulamat ureuëng meudesya.” Dan ulôn kheueh ureuëng meudesya nyang paleng jeuhet.
1Timothy1:16 Teuma lé sabab nyan kheueh Allah geugaséh ulôn
1Timothy1:17 Allah
1Timothy1:18 Timotius
1Timothy1:19 Meujuang kheueh ngon cara tamumat beukong nibak keupeucayaan nyang beutôi dan ngon até nurani nyang gleh. Na ureuëng nyang hana jipako keuhai su até nurani jih
1Timothy1:20 Lamkawan ureuëng nyan na kheueh Himeneus dan Aleksander. Mandua droe ureuëng nyan ka lôn huköm deungon cara ulôn jok ubak Iblih
1Timothy2:1 Phon-phon that
1Timothy2:2 keuraja-raja dan banmandum ureuëng nyang mat keukuasaan. Lakée kheueh mangat geutanyoe jeuet udeb teunang dan teuntram keu Po teu Allah ngon pi-e nyang patot.
1Timothy2:3 Nyan kheueh nyang gét dan teupeumangat até Allah
1Timothy2:4 Gobnyan meuharab mangat jeuet banmandum ureuëng teupeuseulamat dan jiteupeu nyang beuna.
1Timothy2:5 Sabab
1Timothy2:6 Gobnyan sidroe manusia nyang ka geupeujok droe Geuh guna teupeubeubaih mandum manusia nibak desya-desya jih. Deungon nyan Allah ka geutunyok bak watée nyang paih
1Timothy2:7 Dan nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn geuyuejak bak ureuëng-ureuëng nyang kon Yahudi keu lôn jak peusampoe bak awaknyan haba keuhai keupeucayaan nyang beutôi. Nyang ulôn peugah nyoe na kheueh beutôi dan ulôn hana buhak.
1Timothy2:8 Ulôn meuharab mangat dipat mantong ureuëng agam meudoá ngon até nyang gleh
1Timothy2:9 Bah kheueh ureuëng inong jipeungui droe jih ngon cara seudeurhana dan jisôk peukayan nyang sopan. Bék koh ôk mubagoe-bagoe atawa teungui piasan méuh atawa mutiara
1Timothy2:10 Nyang sikeubiet jih
1Timothy2:11 Ureuëng inong meuseuti jimurunoe ngon cara ji-iem droe dan patuh.
1Timothy2:12 Ulôn hana kupeubeuna ureuëng inong nyan jipeurunoe atawa jipeurintah ateueh ureuëng agam; awaknyan harôh seungab.
1Timothy2:13 Sabab nyang phon that teucebta na kheueh Nabi Adam óh lheueh nyan barô kheueh Siti Hawa.
1Timothy2:14 Dan kon Nabi Adam
1Timothy2:15 Teuma biet pi meunan
1Timothy3:1 Keubiet beutôi haba nyoe
1Timothy3:2 Sidroe ureuëng nyang jeuet keupeunilék jeumaáh ureuëng nyan hana meucupa
1Timothy3:3 bék ureuëng peumabök
1Timothy3:4 Ureuëng nyan jiteupeu atoe rumoh tangga deungon jroh
1Timothy3:5 Sabab meunyoe ureuëng nyan hana carông jiatoe rumoh tangga jih keudroe
1Timothy3:6 Sidroe peunilék jeumaáh hana jeuet ureuëng nyan ban jitamong Kristen
1Timothy3:7 Ureuëng nyan meuseuti nyang na nan gét lam masyarakat; sabab meunyoe hán lagée nyan
1Timothy3:8 Meunan cit deungon peumbantu jeumaáh meuseuti ureuëng nyang jroh dan jujoe; kon ureuëng nyang teupéng-péng dan galak jijieb ié anggô nyang jai.
1Timothy3:9 Ureuëng nyan meuseuti nyang kong jimumat nibak ajaran Kristen nyang beuna ngon até nurani nyang gleh nyang ka geupeugah lé Po teu Allah.
1Timothy3:10 Bah kheueh ureuëng nyan teu ujoe leubeh ilée
1Timothy3:11 Meunan cit deungon peurumoh awaknyan museuti ureuëng nyang jroh
1Timothy3:12 Peumbantu jeumaáh museuti sidroe mantong peurumoh geuh. Ureuëng nyan museuti carông jiatoe aneuëk-aneuëk jih dan rumoh tangga jih ngon jroh.
1Timothy3:13 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang jibantu deungon gét lam jeumaáh
1Timothy3:14 Ulôn meuharab hana treb lé ulôn jak saweue gata. Bah pih meunan
1Timothy3:15 mangat meunyoe ulôn teulat
1Timothy3:16 Hana meusidroe pi nyang hase jibantah
1Timothy4:1 Roh Allah deungon teugaih geupeugah bahwa bak watée-watée nyang teuma teuka
1Timothy4:2 nyang jipeusampoe lé ureuëng-ureuëng munafék nyang buhak. Até nurani ureuëng-ureuëng nyan ka seupôt.
1Timothy4:3 Ureuëng nyan jipeurunoe bék meukawen dan jitam bék jipajoh lé peunajoh nyang ka jipeuteuntée. Padahai peunajoh nyan geucebta lé Po teu Allah keuteupajoh ngon teupeugah teurimong gaséh ubak Gobnyan lé ureuëng-ureuëng nyang ka meuiman ubak Almaseh dan ka jiteupeue ajaran nyang beutôi nibak Allah.
1Timothy4:4 Peue-peue mantong nyang geucebta lé Allah nyan gét
1Timothy4:5 Sabab beureukat nibak Po teu Allah dan doá nyang teulakée teupeusabab peunajoh nyan haleue.
1Timothy4:6 Meunyoe gata tapeurunoe banmandum nyan ubak syedara-syedara nyang seuiman
1Timothy4:7 Peujiôh kheueh calitra-calitra tahyul nyang hana meuguna. Lateh kheueh droe gata keu udeb lam iébadat.
1Timothy4:8 Latehan jasmani bacut sagai hase jih
1Timothy4:9 Hainyan beutôi dan patot teuteurimong dan teupeucaya sipeunoh até.
1Timothy4:10 Nyang kheueh sabab jih tanyoe meujuang dan meukeureuja brat
1Timothy4:11 Peurunoe kheueh mandum nyan dan yue kheueh ureuëng-ureuëng beujiseutôt.
1Timothy4:12 Bék kheueh na meusidroe ureuëng pih jianggab gata hina sabab gata mantong muda. Nyang sikeubiet jih
1Timothy4:13 Watée nyoe
1Timothy4:14 Bék sampoe gata laloe tapeuguna karonya nibak Roh Allah nyang teubri ubak gata bak watée peumimpén-peumimpén jeumaáh geupeuduek jaroe gobnyan ateueh ulée gata
1Timothy4:15 Peubuet kheueh mandum nyan deungon biet-biet mangat keumajuan gata jikalon lé mandum ureuëng.
1Timothy4:16 Jaga kheueh droe gata dan beu até-até kheueh ngon peue nyang gata peurunoe. Bah kheueh gata ngon seutia gata peubuet banmandum nyan
1Timothy5:1 Bék kheueh gata beungéh ngon haba nyang kreueh ateueh ureuëng nyang leubeh tuha nibak gata teuma pakat kheueh gobnyan beugeudeungoe haba gata siulah-ulah gobnyan ureuëng syiek gata. Meunan cit peusaneut kheueh bubena ureuëng-ureuëng sibagoe syedara
1Timothy5:2 dan inong-inong tuha sibagoe ma. Inong-inong muda gata peujeuet sibagoe adoe
1Timothy5:3 Horeumat kheueh keu inong-inong balée nyang biet-biet udeb jih keudroe.
1Timothy5:4 Teuma meunyoe sidroe inong balée na aneuëk atawa cucoe
1Timothy5:5 Inong balée nyang biet-biet tinggai sidroe
1Timothy5:6 Teuma inong balée nyang galak udeb meumangat-mangat
1Timothy5:7 Peutrok kheueh peutunyok-peutunyok nyoe ubak awaknyan
1Timothy5:8 Teuma meunyoe ureuëng-ureuëng nyang hana jitem peulara waréh kawöm jih
1Timothy5:9 Teuma inong balée nyang jipeupeunoh syarat-syarat lagée nyoe jeuet teupeutamong lam dafeutar inong-inong balée; umu jih hana kureueng nibak nam ploh thon
1Timothy5:10 meugah sibagoe ureuëng inong nyang jipeubuet hai-hai nyang jroh
1Timothy5:11 Bék peutamong nibak inong-inong balée nyang mantong muda. Sabab meunyoe rasa beureuhi jih mantong teuga that
1Timothy5:12 Deungon lagée nyan awaknyan kasalah sabab ji-iengkeue janji nyang teubri ubak jihnyan.
1Timothy5:13 Lom teuma awaknyan jiböih-böih watée deungon cara jiteubiet tamong lam rumoh gob. Dan nyang leubeh brok lom
1Timothy5:14 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn meulakée mangat ureuëng inong balée nyang mantong-mantong muda jimeukawen lom
1Timothy5:15 Sabab na inong-inong balée nyang ka sisat jiseutôt peue nyang jikheun lé roh jeuhet.
1Timothy5:16 Teuma
1Timothy5:17 Peumimpén jeumaáh nyang jipeubuet tugaih jih deungon gét
1Timothy5:18 Sabab lam Alkitab na teutuléh lagée nyoe
1Timothy5:19 Bék kheueh teurimong tudohan ateueh sidroe-droe peumimpén jeumaáh
1Timothy5:20 Ureuëng peubuet desya
1Timothy5:21 Dikeue Po teu Allah
1Timothy5:22 Bék kheueh teugisa-gisa takeubah jaroe ateueh sidroe-droe ureuëng guna teubaiát jihnyan sibagoe peulayan Tuhan. Meunyoe ureuëng laén meudesya
1Timothy5:23 Bék lé laloe jieb ié mantong; jieb kheueh bacut ié anggô guna keutulông keumunyoh gata
1Timothy5:24 Desya siladum ureuëng
1Timothy5:25 Meunan cit deungon buet-buet nyang jroh bagaih that deuh teukalon. Dan nyang hana deuh pih
1Timothy6:1 Ureuëng-ureuëng Kristen nyang jeuet keu namiet
1Timothy6:2 Namiet-namiet nyang po jih ureuëng Kristen
1Timothy6:3 Soe-soe mantong nyang peurunoe ajaran laén seulaén nibak nyan dan hana situju ngon ajaran nyang beutôi nibak Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh
1Timothy6:4 na kheueh ureuëng nyang sombong hana jiteupeue sapeue! Peunyakét jih na kheueh galak meudobat dan meudakwa keuhai istilah-istilah akhé jih rhot nibak picék até
1Timothy6:5 meunan cit meusiliseh waham nyang hana putôh-putôh. Rot seumike ureuëng nyang lagée nyan ka paneuk dan hana lé nyang beuna. Awaknyan jipike hase jeuet keukaya rot agama.
1Timothy6:6 Beutôi agama teubri untông nyang rayeuk
1Timothy6:7 Sabab hana meusapeue pi nyang jeuet taba u dalam donya nyoe
1Timothy6:8 Teuma
1Timothy6:9 Teuma ureuëng nyang keuneuk jeuet keukaya
1Timothy6:10 Sabab nibak cinta ubak péng
1Timothy6:11 Teuma gata na kheueh ureuëng atra Po teu Allah
1Timothy6:12 Meujuang kheueh beubiet-biet keu udeb lagée ureuëng Kristen mangat gata tareubot hadiyah seujati dan keukai. Sabab keunyan kheueh Allah geutawök gata bak watée gata ta-aku Gobnyan dikeue ureuëng ramé bahwa gata meuiman ubak Almaseh.
1Timothy6:13 Dan jinoenyoe
1Timothy6:14 Taát kheueh ubak peurintah nyan deungon até nyang gleh dan hana meucupa trok ubak watée jih Tuhan geutanyoe Isa Almaseh geuteuka lom teuma.
1Timothy6:15 Keuhai teuka Gobnyan teuma geupeuteuntée bak watée nyang paih lé Allah keudroe. Gobnyan kheueh nyang matkuasa sidroe kong sagai; Gobnyan agong
1Timothy6:16 Gobnyan kheueh mantong nyang hana hase jikuasa lé maté; Gobnyan udeb lam cahya nyang hana hase jipeurab lé soemantong. Hana meusidroe manusia pi nyang ka lheueh jikalon Gobnyan. Keu Gobnyan kheueh horeumat dan kuasa siumu masa! Amin.
1Timothy6:17 Keu ureuëng-ureuëng nyang kaya ateueh rhueng donya
1Timothy6:18 Lakée kheueh nibak awaknyan mangat awaknyan jitunyok keubuet nyang jroh
1Timothy6:19 Deungon lagée nyan awaknyan ka jigumpôi atra nyang jeuet keumodal nyang gét keuwatée nyang teuma teuka. Dan deungon lagée nyan awaknyan teuma meuteumé udeb nyang keukai
1Timothy6:20 Peue nyang ka teupeucaya keugata
1Timothy6:21 Sabab na ureuëng nyang jipeugah bahwa awaknyan na peungeutahuan nyan
2Timothy1:1 Timotius
2Timothy1:2 
2Timothy1:3 Ulôn meulakée syukoe ubak Po teu Allah nyang lôn layani ngon até nurani nyang gleh lagée nyang geupeubuet lé indatu ulôn yoh masa ilée. Ulôn sabe lôn lakée teurimong gaséh ubak Allah pajan mantong ulôn ingat keugata lam doá
2Timothy1:4 Ulôn teuingat ubak até gata nyang seudeh. Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn meuharab that meurumpok ngon gata mangat ulôn biet-biet meugeumbira.
2Timothy1:5 Ulôn teuingat ubak keupeucayaan gata nyang biet-biet sunggoh ubak Almaseh
2Timothy1:6 Sabab nyan ulôn peuingat gata keutateupeue udeb karonya nyang geubri lé Allah ubak gata bak watée ulôn keubah jaroe lôn ateueh gata.
2Timothy1:7 Sabab Roh Allah nyang geubri ubak geutanyoe
2Timothy1:8 Sabab nyan bék kheueh malée tabri keusaksian keuhai Tuhan geutanyoe
2Timothy1:9 Allah geupeu seulamat geutanyoe dan geutawök geutanyoe mangat jeuet keu umat Gobnyan keudroe. Gobnyan geupeubuet lagée nyan kon dasai jih peue nyang ka tapeubuet
2Timothy1:10 Dan jinoenyoe
2Timothy1:11 Keuteupeusampoe Haba Gét nyan kheueh Allah geuangkat ulôn jeuet keurasui dan gurée.
2Timothy1:12 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn meudeurita lé mandum nyoe
2Timothy1:13 Seutôt kheueh ngon biet-biet ajaran nyang beutôi nyang ka ulôn bri nibak gata. Dan bah kheueh gata teutab tamumat nibak iman dan gaséh nyang ka jeuet keuhak milék geutanyoe sabab meusaboh ngon Isa Almaseh.
2Timothy1:14 Ngon geutulông lé Roh Allah nyang udeb lam tuboh geutanyoe
2Timothy1:15 Gata tateupeue bahwa banmandum ureuëng nyang na diwilayah Asia ka jitinggai ulôn
2Timothy1:16 Teuma keuluwarga Onesiforus kana padub goe jipeumangat até lôn. Seumoga Tuhan geubalaih gaséh sayang Geuh ateueh awaknyan. Bah kheueh ulôn na lam glab
2Timothy1:17 Meunan trok u Roma
2Timothy1:18 Dan gata tateupeue di Efesus jihnyan jai that-that ka jitulông lôn. Seumoga Tuhan geutunyok gaséh sayang Geuh keu jihnyan bak uroe Tuhan geupeu sidang banmandum umat manusia.
2Timothy2:1 Timotius
2Timothy2:2 Ajaran nyang yoh masa ilée ka gata deungoe nibak ulôn dikeue rakyat ba
2Timothy2:3 Gata meuseuti meusajan meudeurita sibagoe sidadu Isa Almaseh nyang seutia.
2Timothy2:4 Sidroe sidadu nyang teungoh meutugaih
2Timothy2:5 Sidroe ureuëng peumeuén ulah raga hana teuma jeuet keujuara watée jimeutunang
2Timothy2:6 Ureuëng meugo nyang ka jikeureuja brat
2Timothy2:7 Pike kheueh peue nyang ulôn peugah nyan
2Timothy2:8 Ingat kheueh nyoe: Haba Gét nyang ulôn peusampoe nyan na kheueh haba keuhai Isa Almaseh
2Timothy2:9 Sabab teupeusampoe Haba Gét nyan kheueh
2Timothy2:10 Nyang kheueh sabab jih ulôn tabah lôn tanggong banmandum nyan deumi keupeuntengan ureuëng-ureuëng nyang ka geupiléh lé Po teu Allah
2Timothy2:11 Keubiet beutôi nyang ulôn peugah nyoe
2Timothy2:12 Meunyoe tanyoe teutab tabah
2Timothy2:13 Meunyoe geutanyoe hana seutia
2Timothy2:14 Bah kheueh gata peuingat ureuëng-ureuëng keuhai mandum nyoe. Dikeue Allah
2Timothy2:15 Useuha kheueh lé gata deungon biet-biet mangat Allah geuangkée gata sibagoe ureuëng nyang patot tamubuet keu Gobnyan. Useuha kheueh mangat gata bék malée keuhai buet gata nyan
2Timothy2:16 Peujiôh kheueh tutoe haba nyang hana manfaát dan nyang teuhina Allah. Tutoe haba nyang lagée nyan teuma teuba manusia bak buet nyang leubeh jeuhet.
2Timothy2:17 Ajaran awaknyan bagaih that jimeu éue lagée peunyakét kanker nyang that-that meubahya. Lamkawan awaknyan jitamong cit keunan Himeneus dan Filetus.
2Timothy2:18 Awaknyan ka sisat nibak ajaran nyang beutôi
2Timothy2:19 Teuma dasai nyang kông nyang ka geupeugét Allah hana hase jiyok-yok. Di ateueh nyan na teutuléh lagée nyoe
2Timothy2:20 Lam rumoh nyang rayeuk na meuteumé meubagoe rupa peurabot. Na nyang teupeugét nibak pirak atawa méuh
2Timothy2:21 Ureuëng nyang jipeugleh droe jih nibak mandum nyang jeuhet
2Timothy2:22 Peujiôh kheueh peue-peue nyang jiharok lé ureuëng muda. Useuha kheueh ubak udeb lagée nyang geulakée lé Allah
2Timothy2:23 Bék kheueh peu rhoh droe nibak buet-buet nyang meudobat lé ureuëng-ureuëng bangai nyang hana jiteupeue sapeue. Gata tateupeue bahwa banmandum nyan jipeuteuka dakwa.
2Timothy2:24 Ureuëng nyang mubuet keu Tuhan hana patot jimeudakwa; jihnyan meuseuti ramah ateueh mandum ureuëng
2Timothy2:25 Jihnyan meuseuti ngon leumoh leumbot jipeurunoe ureuëng nyang galak meulawan; mudah-mudahan Allah geubri watée keu ureuëng-ureuëng nyan keu jimeutobat nibak mandum desya-desya awaknyan dan jituri keu ajaran nyang beuna.
2Timothy2:26 Deungon lagée nyan awaknyan ka jeuet keusadar lom teuma
2Timothy3:1 Ingat kheueh nyoe: Nibak uroe-uroe akhé teuma na keusosahan.
2Timothy3:2 Manusia jipeupeunteng droe jih keudroe
2Timothy3:3 Awaknyan hana jigaséh seusabe manusia
2Timothy3:4 Awaknyan galak meukianat
2Timothy3:5 Bah pi seucara lahé awaknyan taát jipeubuet keuwajéban agama
2Timothy3:6 Na lamkawan awaknyan nyang ka jitamong lam rumoh-rumoh

2Timothy3:8 Lagée toh Yanes dan Yambres jilawan Nabi Musa yoh masa ilée
2Timothy3:9 Teuma awaknyan hana teuma jiteume sapeue
2Timothy3:10 Teuma gata ka taseutôt ajaran lôn
2Timothy3:11 Gata ka takalon ulôn ji iénanya dan ulôn meudeurita. Gata tateupeue mandum nyang teujadi ateueh ulôn di Antiokhia
2Timothy3:12 Beutôi mandum ureuëng nyang keuneuk udeb meuiébadat dan udeb meusaboh ngon Isa Almaseh teuma ji iénanya
2Timothy3:13 seudangkan ureuëng-ureuëng jeuhet dan ureuëng-ureuëng buet teumipée meutamah jeuhet. Awaknyan jipeungét ureuëng laén padahai awaknyan keudroe pih keunong peungeut.
2Timothy3:14 Teuma keuhai gata
2Timothy3:15 Gata meuseuti teuingat bahwa yoh ubit gata ka taturi keu Alkitab. Alkitab nyan hase jibri keugata peungeurtian keumeuteumé ubak keuseulamatan meulalu iman ubak Isa Almaseh.
2Timothy3:16 Banmandum nyang teutuléh lam Alkitab
2Timothy3:17 Deungon Alkitab nyan ureuëng nyang layani Allah hase teupeuleungkab ngon sampoereuna keumeubagoe macam buet nyang jroh.
2Timothy4:1 Isa Almaseh teuma teuka lom lam donya nyoe dan geupeu sidang ureuëng-ureuëng nyang udeb dan nyang maté; dan Gobnyan teuka keugeuba peurintah sibagoe Raja. Ngon sabab nyan ulôn meulakée ngon meuharab that nibak gata dikeue Allah dan Isa Almaseh:
2Timothy4:2 Bah kheueh gata peusampoe haba nyang beutôi nyang teuka nibak Allah nyan
2Timothy4:3 Sabab teuma teuka watée jih
2Timothy4:4 Awaknyan jisumpai geulinyueng ateueh nyang beuna
2Timothy4:5 Bah kheueh lagée nyan
2Timothy4:6 Keuhai droe ulôn
2Timothy4:7 Ulôn ka lôn seutôt meutunang plueng deungon sigét-gét jih
2Timothy4:8 Dan jinoenyoe hadiah keu nyang meunang ka jipreh ulôn. Bak Uroe Kiamat
2Timothy4:9 Useuha kheueh dan teuka kheueh bak ulôn beureujang-reujang
2Timothy4:10 sabab Demas ka jitinggai ulôn sabab jicinta keu donya nyoe. Jihnyan ka jijak u Tesalonika. Dan Kreskes ka teuma jijak u Galatia
2Timothy4:11 Teuma Lukas nyang tinggai ngon lôn. Jaktueng kheueh Markus dan bah kheueh jihnyan tinggai meusajan gata
2Timothy4:12 Ulôn ka lôn yue Tikhikus jijak u Efesus.
2Timothy4:13 Meunyoe gata teuka
2Timothy4:14 Aleksander
2Timothy4:15 Gata keudroe meuseuti até-até keu jih nyan
2Timothy4:16 Bak watée ulôn phon-phon that lôn peusampoe peumbilaan lôn
2Timothy4:17 Gobnyan geubri teunaga keu ulôn sampoe ulôn hase lôn peusampoe banmandum Haba Gét nyan
2Timothy4:18 Keubiet Tuhan teuma geupeulheuh ulôn nibak tieb-tieb useuha nyang jeuhet ateueh ulôn. Gobnyan teuma geuba ulôn deungon seulamat lam keurajeuen Geuh di Syeuruga. Bah kheueh Gobnyan teupeuagong siumu masa! Amin.

Titus1:1 Aneuëk ulôn Titus! Ulôn
Titus1:2 Ajaran na kheueh sibagoe harapan bahwa geutanyoe tateurimong udeb seujati dan keukai. Allah ka geupeu janji udeb nyan sigohlom awai jamén – dan Allah hana mungken meusulet.
Titus1:3 Bak watée nyang paih
Titus1:4 Titus
Titus1:5 Ulôn tinggai gata di Kreta mangat gata hase tauroih hai-hai nyang peureulée teuatoe. Meunan cit
Titus1:6 Sidroe peupeumimpén jeumaáh na kheueh sidroe ureuëng nyang hana meucupa; ureuëng nyan peurumoh jih sidroe mantong; aneuëk-aneuëk jih nyang ka meuiman ubak Almaseh dan kon aneuëk nyang jeuhet hana jeuet teupurunoe.
Titus1:7 Peunilék jeumaáh na kheueh ureuëng nyang jiurôih buet Allah

Titus1:9 Ureuëng nyan meuseuti nyang jimumat kong that nibak ajaran nyang ji-iman
Titus1:10 Sabab jai that ureuëng nyang galak keubeurontak
Titus1:11 Ureuëng-ureuëng nyang lagée nyan meuseuti teusumpai babah jih

Titus1:13 Peue nyang geupeugah lé nabi nyan keubiet beutôi. Nyang kheueh sabab jih gata meuseuti tatam awaknyan deungon teugaih; mangat awaknyan teutab jimumat nibak ajaran-ajaran nyang beutôi
Titus1:14 hana lé jimumat bak dongeng-dongeng Yahudi atawa peuratoran-peuratoran nyang jipeuget lé ureuëng-ureuëng nyang tulak ajaran nyang beutôi nyan.

Philemon1:3 Kamoe meuharab that seumoga Allah Bapak geutanyoe dan Tuhan Isa Almaseh geubri beureukat dan seujahteura ubak gata.

Philemon1:14 Teuma ulôn hana kutem peubuet sapeue pi meunyoe Gata hana situju. Ulôn leubeh galak meunyoe Gata peubuet deungon até gata nyang rila; ulôn hana kutem paksa gata.
Philemon1:15 Mungken Onesimus jijak nibak Gata teuma sikeujab mangat Gata jeuet meuteumé jih nyan lom teuma keu siumu masa.

Hebrews1:1 Bak jamén ilée jai lagoena Allah meufeureuman ubak indatu geutanyoe meulalu nabi-nabi deungon geupeu guna meubagoe cara.
Hebrews1:2 Teuma nibak jamén akhé nyoe Gobnyan geumeututoe ubak geutanyoe deungon peurantaraan Aneuëk Gobnyan. Meulalu Aneuëk Geuh nyoe kheueh Allah geucebta alam seumeusta. Dan Po teu Allah ka geupeuteuntée bahwa Aneuëk Gobnyan nyoe kheueh nyang na hak geupeuteuntée peue-peue mantong.
Hebrews1:3 Gobnyan kheueh nyang peuteubiet keu agongan Allah nyang paleng meusyeuhu; Gobnyan kheueh gamba nyang paleng nyata nibak droe Allah keudroe. Gobnyan kheueh teuma nyang peulara alam nyoe sampoereuna deungon feureuman Geuh nyang paleng meukuasa. Óh ka lheueh Gobnyan teupeumungken manusia keuteupeubeubaih nibak desya-desya awaknyan keudroe
Hebrews1:4 Aneuëk nyan meuteumé jabatan nyang jiôh leubeh manyang nibak malaikat
Hebrews1:5 Hántom na Allah geupeugah meunoe ubak meusidroe malaikat pi
Hebrews1:6 Teuma bak watée Allah geu kirém Aneuëk Gobnyan nyang tuha lam donya nyoe
Hebrews1:7 Keuhai malaikat-malaikat Allah meufeureuman lagée nyoe
Hebrews1:8 Teuma ubak Aneuëk nyan Allah meufeureuman

Hebrews1:10 Allah meufeureuman lom
Hebrews1:11 Banmandum nyan teuma gadôh
Hebrews1:12 Bansigom alam raya nyoe Droeneueh lipat lagée bajée
Hebrews1:13 Po teu Allah hántom na meufeureuman lagée nyoe ubak meusidroe pi malaikat Gobnyan

Hebrews2:1 Nyang kheueh sabab jih geutanyoe harôh tamumat beukong that nibak ajaran-ajaran nyang ka tanyoe deungoe
Hebrews2:2 Peusan-peusan nyang geupeutrok lé dum na malaikat ubak indatu tanyoe teunyata beutôi
Hebrews2:3 Peue teuk lom ngon keuseulamatan nyang leubeh hebat nibak peusan-peusan nyan! Meunyoe geutanyoe hana tapako nibak keuseulamatan nyan
Hebrews2:4 Disampéng nyan
Hebrews2:5 Malaikat-malaikat hana meuteumé kuasa nibak Allah keu jipeurintah donya barô nyang teuma teuka
Hebrews2:6 Seubalek jih
Hebrews2:7 Lam watée nyang paneuk Droeneueh peujeuet awaknyan bacut leubeh miyueb nibak malaikat. Droeneueh bri ubak jihnyan pangkat nyang mulia dan teuhoreumat
Hebrews2:8 lagée teupeujeuet keu nyang mat kuasa ateueh peue mantong.” Deungon lagée nyan
Hebrews2:9 Teuma geutanyoe ka takalon Isa meukuasa! Gobnyan geupeujeuet bacut leubeh miyueb nibak malaikat bak watée nyang paneuk
Hebrews2:10 Keubiet ka sipatot jih Allah – nyang cebta peue-peue mantong keu meukeusut Gobnyan keudroe – teupeujeuet Isa nyang ba seulamat nyang sampoereuna meulalu deurita. Deungon lagée nyan Allah hase geupakat jai that ureuëng keu meusajan teupeuagong meusajan ngon Isa. Sabab Gobnyan kheueh nyang buka jalan keu awaknyan mangat jeuet teupeuseulamat.
Hebrews2:11 Isa geupeu gleh manusia nibak desya-desya awaknyan; dan Gobnyan nyang peugleh
Hebrews2:12 Isa geupeugah ubak Po teu Allah
Hebrews2:13 Dan Isa geupeugah lom lagée nyoe
Hebrews2:14 Lé sabab ureuëng-ureuëng nyang geupeugah aneuëk nyan
Hebrews2:15 Deungon cara nyan Gobnyan ka geupeubeubaih bubena ureuëng nyang sipanyang udeb jih ka jipeunamiet sabab jitakot ubak maté.
Hebrews2:16 Deungon lagée nyan deuh kheueh takalon bahwa kon malaikat nyang geutulông
Hebrews2:17 Nyoe meumakna bahwa Gobnyan harôh saban deungon syedara-syedara Gobnyan lam hai peue mantong. Dan deungon lagée nyan Gobnyan jeuet keu Imeum Agong nyang seutia dan na gaséh sayang. Deungon peulayan Geuh nyang lagée nyan desya manusia jeuet geupeu amphon.
